subject: Is excellence racist?
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2f4q3pdomofc993bkfj5e9l4h2ufost4ao01248_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh64ob4c1h2bs)

| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmi6maftadjh4c877ourl5e92794vmm9h2sn81oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh64ob4c1h2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlla6t3o6ld1t1bvqg49g5pde0763t317tno2qv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh64ob4c1h2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Unleashing excellence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
It's simple: if you're not performing, you're not getting paid

It's simple: if you're not performing, you're not getting paid
It's simple: if you're not performing, you're not getting paid
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---

Peter,

The failed education bureaucracy in America had its chance to get it right. And what do we have to show for it? A system that rewards tenure over performance, promotes victimhood, and lowers standards to paper over failure.

Meanwhile, our children are left to suffer the consequences.

**Today, 70% of U.S. 8th graders are NOT proficient in reading. That 's unacceptable. As Governor, I'll take a wrecking ball to the entire system. **

I won't play nice with the entrenched special interests holding our children back. It's time to build a new system that rewards EXCELLENCE. Ohio will be the first state in the nation to implement merit-based pay for public school teachers.

Teaching is a noble profession. And if you're a rockstar educator who's getting results, you can expect to be compensated handsomely for your excellence. On the other hand, low performers will no longer climb the ladder like everyone else.

This isn't a partisan issue. This is a common-sense revolution that will change the future of education.

But the education bureaucracy won't go down without a fight. Neither will the corrupt teacher's unions. They'll throw everything they've got at us to try and stop this reform from EVER happening. That's why I need your support.

Will you help us fix our education crisis?
**[SIGN MY PETITION: Institute merit-based pay for public school teachers!](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-8ZC4Unw "SIGN MY PETITION: Institute merit-based pay for public school teachers!")**

It's time to take a stand and fight for what's right. Join me in this revolution to transform our system and give our children the education they deserve.

Vivek Ramaswamy

Byron Donalds _****_

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z811mf7ml1takr3aokdurqd0tb88huqbqvq4ckt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6ap34c5h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5vv36755uae24pjc11oo8klh26tm9f360lljs4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6ap34c5h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zchme6bptsp70ta5cgkgv905al3338l6p3eq88pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6ap34c5h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv2su2uaj52vvn7jd034hdufiffrdd6f0mt2fr88_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6ap34c5h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6c9eoi8r8p67t8qun3sjhe7iu94uepaoefkvb28_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6ap34c5h2bs)

American Action News

Peter,

[**The Deep State is officially on notice.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=052a0172b09348bdb5b1d908744e7480&_e=2AVfnDBMdiQAqpLRgP3HorOCS3MHZ_Fb5HHTdSS7Zqm968AprG5_1ye-FSUqtiBHHu1UD968uZQIiCxUE-M19L3UMIJ-WGraquN5nl3SqK3t1Nwhi7lQNPB5W2GmH5-h3vwpSPvoiquCPk5rTFouAP-OuLvNpHsQPgudNPkGGrDSpIlIAZcw24Ve9vCL3CWTcFz7T6LIVfxofRnEGnPM7LAPTCycKfpbK0_5-0qQf7A_bWIoZ-zojJDzW83twrAwvKkANCsteXdTJEBakc5ZIEEIstcInobgXA0166cbfjJVoYZmmV9MH6s3S6hEisWDfYeT2NzFcIiDuuU5aHu1ig%3D%3D)

For far too long, they’ve had a stranglehold on our country, working behind the scenes to undermine our values, our democracy, and the very principles upon which this nation was built. Their secrecy and manipulation are why many hardworking Americans feel like they’ve been left behind.

| [ **STOP THE DEEP STATE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=052a0172b09348bdb5b1d908744e7480&_e=2AVfnDBMdiQAqpLRgP3HorOCS3MHZ_Fb5HHTdSS7Zqm968AprG5_1ye-FSUqtiBHHu1UD968uZQIiCxUE-M19L3UMIJ-WGraquN5nl3SqK3t1Nwhi7lQNPB5W2GmH5-h3vwpSPvoiquCPk5rTFouAP-OuLvNpHsQPgudNPkGGrDSpIlIAZcw24Ve9vCL3CWTrnTv3WWqusdYurfr-uuKGspBKC8Krq78HjC3WM3mRMosuysrckdFI6Ry1YOjsQivS8qJV0Kxm4DkGZuNO1QncfvpFBTevx3mM7bdJVCNhvu8MqZN8uG9XXylV4ppIfE9Js96yv86_8XYjSuic2AXpQ%3D%3D)
---

_But there’s good news. Our efforts to hold these individuals accountable are gaining serious momentum._

Kash Patel, a true patriot, a fearless defender of justice, and a man who has relentlessly pursued the truth, is coming to town. He’s not just any person–he is a man who knows how the Deep State operates, and he’s one of the few who dares to stand up to it.

**His presence here signals to those who have abused their power for too long:_Your time is up._**

[ **DRAIN THE SWAMP** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=052a0172b09348bdb5b1d908744e7480&_e=2AVfnDBMdiQAqpLRgP3HorOCS3MHZ_Fb5HHTdSS7Zqm968AprG5_1ye-FSUqtiBHHu1UD968uZQIiCxUE-M19L3UMIJ-WGraquN5nl3SqK3t1Nwhi7lQNPB5W2GmH5-h3vwpSPvoiquCPk5rTFouAP-OuLvNpHsQPgudNPkGGrDSpIlIAZcw24Ve9vCL3CWTSsHOdW5Zq2vuLo_QJ-yvIpThQFYdZw2lGYv11VIZ9QvWqn3OYM0w5_7zf7CSuXXT3Z_R9oCZx9J9WLZ1CfY31Kl9JGRd0Rhb1XrJW9Vxr_-Rk8q6lvvwKQkQWIUfEyosXgBlv9wNTa_gP8K_MzYS4g%3D%3D)

_The truth is coming to light, and justice will be served. Kash’s work will expose the corruption and lies. With Kash at the helm of the FBI, we will soon uncover the truth._

Together, with people like Kash, we will expose the shadows of corruption and restore the people’s trust in our government.

_**The Deep State should be on high alert because their time is running out. The American people deserve better, and we will ensure they get it.**_

[**Will you rush a $25 donation to my team to help us continue fighting to expose corruption and stop the Deep State?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=052a0172b09348bdb5b1d908744e7480&_e=2AVfnDBMdiQAqpLRgP3HorOCS3MHZ_Fb5HHTdSS7Zqm968AprG5_1ye-FSUqtiBHHu1UD968uZQIiCxUE-M19L3UMIJ-WGraquN5nl3SqK3t1Nwhi7lQNPB5W2GmH5-h3vwpSPvoiquCPk5rTFouAP-OuLvNpHsQPgudNPkGGrDSpIlIAZcw24Ve9vCL3CWTWiePagszNptJWnZyRUuTTgLyF5W4l6glCnyiFEMBndzJwrF4wewhTOEUyiXQ3AEM7h8mugo6CETEluREk_-OFjM0fYkg2Zz-uFG3Na-FpjFlf8FLXQSacdFc1oS4LdNaT9KWkpoiJuSv6QXxBqVrVw%3D%3D)

_Coach Tuberville_

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=052a0172b09348bdb5b1d908744e7480&_e=2AVfnDBMdiQAqpLRgP3HorOCS3MHZ_Fb5HHTdSS7Zqm968AprG5_1ye-FSUqtiBHHu1UD968uZQIiCxUE-M19L3UMIJ-WGraquN5nl3SqK3t1Nwhi7lQNPB5W2GmH5-h3vwpSPvoiquCPk5rTFouAP-OuLvNpHsQPgudNPkGGrDSpIlIAZcw24Ve9vCL3CWTHq7w6QwBw66x4JGdHx7WYxpE3XWQI8bl2ynAjrKKPULhh_6o1wKnEjFZqplswigM4iU6NQ_Sdm9TyYrYJ6IjGePpbDpcwDzpyFBRTn2XEK1IkEXy0R5zBPAhxR81i3OZjkamm9FBWZuwlD1eJAxSQg%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=052a0172b09348bdb5b1d908744e7480&_e=2AVfnDBMdiQAqpLRgP3HorOCS3MHZ_Fb5HHTdSS7Zqm968AprG5_1ye-FSUqtiBHHu1UD968uZQIiCxUE-M19L3UMIJ-WGraquN5nl3SqK3t1Nwhi7lQNPB5W2GmH5-h3vwpSPvoiquCPk5rTFouAP-OuLvNpHsQPgudNPkGGrDSpIlIAZcw24Ve9vCL3CWTiCabv8Dnu29R_RyGcEW_85u0xIm4CXJPQiIjYlis02t6AM6ER0CP4oermqXxn7AmAL2JXGWVEs-Z7SfmbiSkldx3n4QojJKsaVU_Dr58NGJmw2H7QR4UXUtm97iAWZ5QpQtvBSa6n_811wNrgq45ZA%3D%3D)

subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z086gf17mi0nba9rcr929jof1dpv6oh6gtsm5q5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66o32c5h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhb5iu1d2ia7vm5d2j7se3u2i3l4nlvfouqlujno_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66o32c5h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zri7rnnmlij17hmhpi2gc5rifhlvdhnouein3bu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66o32c5h2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3knqqt0pa25mhs3f30mb8aktj2fmfgl8qv5n4hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66o32c5h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's hear.com's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. ---

GOP Rep. Byron Donalds**[called out a CNN reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/91393e3b-87ee-4d31-a8a0-b325b63847a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for being overly critical of President Trump's tariff agenda after her network largely ignored the Biden administration's many economic failures.
> _**" You didn't cover it the way it needed to be covered. That's not my opinion, that's a fact!"**_
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/91393e3b-87ee-4d31-a8a0-b325b63847a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/91393e3b-87ee-4d31-a8a0-b325b63847a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Let's be clear about the numbers you are reporting," Donalds told CNN's Pamela Brown. "The reason why job growth numbers are down is because government workers are starting to lose their jobs at the federal level. They have increased the federal workforce in ways that are unsustainable!"
Brown pushed back against Donalds' confidence, saying that consumer sentiment was now at a 3 year low, naming tariff policy as a primary concern.
**[Donalds explained that tariff policy was only one part of the broader economic picture](https://substack.com/redirect/91393e3b-87ee-4d31-a8a0-b325b63847a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , then citing detrimental moves President Biden made while in office as a main cause for the current situation. "The last administration layers $2 trillion on the economy and then tried to back-fill it with stimulus packages and government hires!"
Brown countered on Donalds' statement once again, saying the $2 trillion wasn't just for regulations, "it was other issues as well..."
"No it was $2 trillion, listen, I know the facts, it was $2 trillion in regulations," Donalds snapped.
The congressman told Brown that America needs to give Trump's tariff strategy a chance so that he can meaningfully negotiate with Mexico, Canada and China. "When prices were rising in the United States, I didn't hear CNN talking about it much, as a matter of fact you ignored most of it!" Donalds went off at Brown. **["You didn't cover it the way it needed to be covered, that's a fact!!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/91393e3b-87ee-4d31-a8a0-b325b63847a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch Donalds take down this CNN reporter on live T.V.:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/91393e3b-87ee-4d31-a8a0-b325b63847a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By Priority Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/dcff447e-7a71-430c-b5c4-7ba04f71d1c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# GOP congresswoman DEMANDS Democrat mayors tell her the truth about sanctuary city spending
GOP Rep. Virginia Foxx forced sanctuary city mayors to answer one simple question: **[How much have they spent on illegal immigrants in their cities.](https://substack.com/redirect/fc35f8e1-b974-4bb1-b696-f84ec67e9a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
> _**"I don't need a speech, just answer the question!!"**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fc35f8e1-b974-4bb1-b696-f84ec67e9a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fc35f8e1-b974-4bb1-b696-f84ec67e9a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Tax payers have been bearing the brunt of the massive wave of illegal aliens whpo have entered the United States. The Biden administration seemingly declared tax payers and hard working Americans collateral damage in the pursuit open borders," Foxx told the Democrat mayors.
The congresswoman **[asked each mayor how much tax dollars they have spent on services for illegal immigrants in their cities.](https://substack.com/redirect/fc35f8e1-b974-4bb1-b696-f84ec67e9a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I don't need a speech, just tell me a number!"
Mayor Brandon Johnson of Chicago said he spent "roughly 1% of the city's budget over 4 years." Mayor Mike Johnston of Denver said he spent "$79 million over the last 2 years." Mayor Eric Adams of New York admitted he spent "approximately $6.9 billion" on illegal immigrants.
**[Mayor Michelle Wu explained that she could not answer the question](https://substack.com/redirect/fc35f8e1-b974-4bb1-b696-f84ec67e9a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** because Boston did not keep track of immigration status in these cases.
Watch Foxx make these Democrats sweat for what they did to their own citizens:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fc35f8e1-b974-4bb1-b696-f84ec67e9a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Bryon Donalds
subject: This is the biggest announcement of my life
body:
I’m running for Governor in Florida

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvsckpn97bjhbdh4mp55ag4d6lbtvm05uv18s67g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66p72cth2bs)
---
|
---
**MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT:**
I’m OFFICIALLY running for Governor of the State of Florida.
This is President Trump’s _STRONGEST_ Supporter in the House Byron Donalds - first and foremost I want to _**THANK YOU**_ for being a Die Hard MAGA Patriot.
It’s YOUR steadfast resolve that’s inspired me to serve the Great State of Florida.
****Also, THANK YOU to President Trump for already**ENDORSING **me.** MAGA!**

|
---
[SUPPORT MY RACE HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmk75p71ibb2am4fffhe9vqsanimqpl7r2sr0m78_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66p72cth2bs)
|
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2pip745q8s5fnctpdrbulavui7fhkmgmmqi89bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66p72cth2bs)
|
---
Trump will need allies across the map to help implement his agenda. As governor of the 3rd most populated state, I will assist in Mass Deportations, keep the Woke Agenda **OUT** of our schools, and have Florida serve as a shining light for freedom across the country.
Look - I don’t know what _obstacles_ lie ahead in this race, but I guarantee you the Democrats _**[won’t hand this over without a fight.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z79rqfuidok2f3l4ao2584qfu7g71l85vqdt2f00_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66p72cth2bs)**_
There’s nothing they hate more than a MAGA Patriot leading the G _reat State of Florida!_
So I’m lighting a **National MAGA Beacon** , calling on EVERY Patriot for aid in this critical hour!
_**[PLEASE, can you chip in a gift of $20.25 so I can begin building my war chest for the fight to come?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvgf2vn2lj2qfg8nmiuhg2a7i2algtje629sfcoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66p72cth2bs)**_

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zenh2ghm26llifnp3rm354inhnl2q6aau61k300g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh66p72cth2bs)
|
---
Thank you, and I look forward to standing shoulder-to-shoulder with you on this epic journey.
Byron Donalds _****_

|

name: Jason Smith =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?= Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts
subject: JD’s a hillbilly from Appalachia, I’m one from the Ozarks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It warms my heart that our Vice President says he’s a hillbilly from Appalachia – I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8247p1rj5pbothtbmvjkq7stv2a284sp34om9bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "Jason Smith")
---

It warms my heart that our Vice President says he's a hillbilly from Appalachia - I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

My name's Jason Smith. My dad was a preacher and my mom was a factory worker. They raised me in a single-wide trailer and we didn't even have running water until I drilled the well myself.

**I come from humble beginnings. Fast-forward to today, I 'm now the architect in Congress for President Trump's plan to slash your taxes.**

That can only happen here in America.

Unfortunately, the Democrat Party of today wants to take a sledgehammer to everything folks like you and I believe in. Hard work, our God-given rights, the government staying out of our business, merit over victimhood, never weaponizing the government against political opponents...

**_[All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from barging back into power.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrdo16vve8bnht3sdkdmrik18tar3kbudqmruleo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from bargain back into power.")_**

That's why I'm giving everything I've got to make these next four years under President Trump worth it. That's __also__ why I'm sending you this email. The Democrat Party is just a couple of seats away from taking back power in the House of Representatives.

We unloaded every dollar we had to hold the line and contact voters in enough swing districts to win in November. _And now we 're tapped out. Completely._

**So I 'm launching a major rebuilding effort with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to 1) refill our warchest, 2) get ahead of the 8-ball in battleground districts, and 3) keep our Republican Majority in control for ALL FOUR YEARS of Trump's term.**

**_[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to kick in a few bucks today?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqjfm2d8cr152ovo31f8540bqehrlt37rs0rkatg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to kick in a few bucks today?")_**
| | [Yes, I'll kick in ten bucks](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zovadg0ng28dsd3kh1i2slv0ho3h6tv19c8vutf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in ten bucks")
---

| [Yes, I'll kick in twenty bucks](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5p29rgo0shcg74rihndvtgp207qp07c4sdh4rk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in twenty bucks")
---

| [Yes, I'll kick in fifty bucks](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5p0q0qbh3iigmuuo29mma4qm0fnc0e4l28a4p5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in fifty bucks")
---

| [Yes, and I'll kick in even more](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z05jocdqbrslrssicjdkvcj134vkae60aefmidi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "Yes, and I’ll kick in even more")
---

I know it's early.

But last cycle, we won the House by about 7,000 votes. The Democrats outraised us by $80M and outspent us by $70M. And they almost won. Now President Trump's entire legislative agenda hangs in the balance.

**That includes his historic tax cuts that I 'm working on RIGHT NOW. **

It's going to take a fortune to save President Trump's House Majority. We don't have an army of Liberal billionaires at our beck and call. The Democrat Party obviously does.

_**[That's why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me - who kick in a few bucks here and there - are our best hope right now.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdner4i4a5h3ier8hoi6uejomu51ma31k9vqso4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "That’s why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me – who kick in a few bucks here and there – are our best hope right now. ")**_

The amount doesn't matter _nearly_ as much as the number of people who step up.

The fate of our House Majority (and of Trump's MAGA agenda) is in your hands. I can only hope you'll have the heart to save it.

Thank you,
_- Jason_

**CHAIRMAN JASON SMITH**
Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zj2djeqlvds3ilkcgbvm2hpue45g17aqcjil4gqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9qmsgtblg1e4l9l5cprprlou9266pt4g1k3l9e0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z755aolb37s2ef6lb1quit0mmk3cqj635rqtbr4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh6eo72c3h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---

Now President Trump's entire legislative agenda hangs in the balance. That includes his historic tax cuts that I 'm working on RIGHT NOW. It's going to take a fortune to save President Trump's House Majority. We don't have an army of Liberal billionaires at our beck and call. The Democrat Party obviously does. "That’s why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me – who kick in a few bucks here and there – are our best hope right now. " The amount doesn't matter nearly as much as the number of people who step up. The fate of our House Majority (and of Trump's MAGA agenda) is in your hands. I can only hope you'll have the heart to save it. Thank you, - Jason CHAIRMAN JASON SMITH Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. body:
I’m running for Governor in Florida

I’m OFFICIALLY running for Governor of the State of Florida.

It’s YOUR steadfast resolve that’s inspired me to serve the Great State of Florida.

Byron Donalds _****_

name: Gay Valimont
subject: We don’t do KINGS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Folks,

Donald Trump says a lot of crazy stuff but watching him lean in to proclaiming himself King is scary - and so gross.

Gross because he is ACTING like a king - flaunting the Constitution and the Rule of Law - in ways that are going to hurt every working American, seniors, veterans, you name it.

This is America and in America: WE DON’T DO KINGS.

I’m Gay Valimont, running for the 1st Congressional District seat in Florida’s Panhandle vacated by the sleazebag Matt Gaetz (who DEFINITELY would see Trump wear a crown).

To fight back against this talk of kings, I need your help-the special election is on April 1st! Can you help me defeat my Republican opponent - who will ALWAYS BEND THE KNEE to Donald Trump?

Can you give $15, $45, or even $100 today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton -- to help me WIN this crucial seat? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

We are told time and again that when Trump says this crazy crap he’s just trolling the libs, etc. etc. But haven’t you seen enough? The guy poops on a gold toilet! He has vassals and estates! He thinks himself ABOVE the law! He just does what he wants.

That seems rather KINGLY to me, and this is America: WE DON’T DO KINGS. Most of our ancestors came from the lands of princes and paupers to create a Constitution and a society where every man and woman is equal in their citizenship.

Let’s stop the Trump kingdom in its tracks: Donate $25 or whatever you can afford today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]I’ve been running for this seat for almost two years and NOT ONCE has anyone I’ve talked to spoken of the need for a president to act more like a king.

Here, everyone is concerned about the cost of homeowners insurance and eggs. Whether their Medicaid, Medicare or Social Security benefits are going to be slashed to pay for billionaires who live like kings.

Please, let’s all stand up to this just like the patriots before us.

With contempt for kings,

Gay Valimont
Democratic Nominee, FL-01

clean_body: Folks, Donald Trump says a lot of crazy stuff but watching him lean in to proclaiming himself King is scary - and so gross. Gross because he is ACTING like a king - flaunting the Constitution and the Rule of Law - in ways that are going to hurt every working American, seniors, veterans, you name it. This is America and in America: WE DON’T DO KINGS. I’m Gay Valimont, running for the 1st Congressional District seat in Florida’s Panhandle vacated by the sleazebag Matt Gaetz (who DEFINITELY would see Trump wear a crown). To fight back against this talk of kings, I need your help-the special election is on April 1st! Can you help me defeat my Republican opponent - who will ALWAYS BEND THE KNEE to Donald Trump? Can you give $15, $45, or even $100 today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton -- to help me WIN this crucial seat? [] We are told time and again that when Trump says this crazy crap he’s just trolling the libs, etc. etc. But haven’t you seen enough? The guy poops on a gold toilet! He has vassals and estates! He thinks himself ABOVE the law! He just does what he wants. That seems rather KINGLY to me, and this is America: WE DON’T DO KINGS. Most of our ancestors came from the lands of princes and paupers to create a Constitution and a society where every man and woman is equal in their citizenship. Let’s stop the Trump kingdom in its tracks: Donate $25 or whatever you can afford today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton! [] Donate [’ve been running for this seat for almost two years and NOT ONCE has anyone I’ve talked to spoken of the need for a president to act more like a king. Here, everyone is concerned about the cost of homeowners insurance and eggs. Whether their Medicaid, Medicare or Social Security benefits are going to be slashed to pay for billionaires who live like kings. Please, let’s all stand up to this just like the patriots before us. body:

Derek, did you see that a **Republican Congressman introduced a bill that would outlaw abortion nationwide?**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp_em20250310-abortionban?source=em20250310-39501&akid=39501%2E3422442%2EWW-oQS)

Abortion bans are deadly and dangerous. They are misogynistic and aim to control women’s health care decisions.

name: Jason Smith =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?= Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts
subject: JD’s a hillbilly from Appalachia, I’m one from the Ozarks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It warms my heart that our Vice President says he’s a hillbilly from Appalachia – I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zok4f8mc1r37fo1rqkv2vi8k32reh7fv5uo5mrt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "Jason Smith")
---

It warms my heart that our Vice President says he's a hillbilly from Appalachia - I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

My name's Jason Smith. My dad was a preacher and my mom was a factory worker. They raised me in a single-wide trailer and we didn't even have running water until I drilled the well myself.

**I come from humble beginnings. Fast-forward to today, I 'm now the architect in Congress for President Trump's plan to slash your taxes.**

That can only happen here in America.

Unfortunately, the Democrat Party of today wants to take a sledgehammer to everything folks like you and I believe in. Hard work, our God-given rights, the government staying out of our business, merit over victimhood, never weaponizing the government against political opponents...

**_[All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from barging back into power.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z567dnlu3gcvp46fpelr2fn39bntuusu8jlp8d1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from bargain back into power.")_**

That's why I'm giving everything I've got to make these next four years under President Trump worth it. That's __also__ why I'm sending you this email. The Democrat Party is just a couple of seats away from taking back power in the House of Representatives.

We unloaded every dollar we had to hold the line and contact voters in enough swing districts to win in November. _And now we 're tapped out. Completely._

**So I 'm launching a major rebuilding effort with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to 1) refill our warchest, 2) get ahead of the 8-ball in battleground districts, and 3) keep our Republican Majority in control for ALL FOUR YEARS of Trump's term.**

**_[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to kick in a few bucks today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdv57efspo2i9uapllt3hlm8jobmmv7hc8bt78fg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to kick in a few bucks today?")_**
| | [Yes, I'll kick in ten bucks](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpgcgtor1fguipsg7tam030dph8c7jqo5v9135do_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in ten bucks")
---

| [Yes, I'll kick in twenty bucks](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z33acq42abn5hcq7uj8j3epg1f6c595vq5a6a0n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in twenty bucks")
---

| [Yes, I'll kick in fifty bucks](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4v0an3odeuissi8q3p1podd0hq22dq92kqu9jr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in fifty bucks")
---

| [Yes, and I'll kick in even more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn33aki7pj0tkgqticcu2f6q28gonn7s5g9632e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "Yes, and I’ll kick in even more")
---

I know it's early.

But last cycle, we won the House by about 7,000 votes. The Democrats outraised us by $80M and outspent us by $70M. And they almost won. Now President Trump's entire legislative agenda hangs in the balance.

**That includes his historic tax cuts that I 'm working on RIGHT NOW. **

It's going to take a fortune to save President Trump's House Majority. We don't have an army of Liberal billionaires at our beck and call. The Democrat Party obviously does.

_**[That's why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me - who kick in a few bucks here and there - are our best hope right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkoo62ol0jogmr5i61510s3ubgjkb5a7ehnb3l5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "That’s why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me – who kick in a few bucks here and there – are our best hope right now. ")**_

The amount doesn't matter _nearly_ as much as the number of people who step up.

The fate of our House Majority (and of Trump's MAGA agenda) is in your hands. I can only hope you'll have the heart to save it.

Thank you,
_- Jason_

**CHAIRMAN JASON SMITH**
Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z37sd1ujph54tht498l5fu04k3do49vr5m40v6n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8mf60e2rv8kcjq6kmqc872a1f8ifc2d2tffp638_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh61pr2chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

My name's Jason Smith. My dad was a preacher and my mom was a factory worker. They raised me in a single-wide trailer and we didn't even have running water until I drilled the well myself. I come from humble beginnings. Fast-forward to today, I 'm now the architect in Congress for President Trump's plan to slash your taxes. That can only happen here in America. Unfortunately, the Democrat Party of today wants to take a sledgehammer to everything folks like you and I believe in. body:
And Dem Senator Repeatedly Dodges Jake Tapper’s ‘Simple Question’
About Whether He Will Vote For GOP Funding Bill

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbjmcl55iuntlnqjgf79p4rri99jqn9i15nltjpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7k9r7b9jhe9qb0t9jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuj72sjkm1qjf8jl64qb4t9m65rucdjnqkqr8d5hmngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpicdjnqpon4t5gekqb2df4c9imcpr1ccj3ctunmcpjct9heng669hmevajcs3lsmq39cdn6lpr49fg

name: Jason Smith =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?= Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts
subject: JD’s a hillbilly from Appalachia, I’m one from the Ozarks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It warms my heart that our Vice President says he’s a hillbilly from Appalachia – I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbjv19hl64dud2ebc66ta6ljk81nbkkgpole59g8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "Jason Smith")
---

It warms my heart that our Vice President says he's a hillbilly from Appalachia - I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

My name's Jason Smith. My dad was a preacher and my mom was a factory worker. They raised me in a single-wide trailer and we didn't even have running water until I drilled the well myself.

**I come from humble beginnings. Fast-forward to today, I 'm now the architect in Congress for President Trump's plan to slash your taxes.**

That can only happen here in America.

Unfortunately, the Democrat Party of today wants to take a sledgehammer to everything folks like you and I believe in. Hard work, our God-given rights, the government staying out of our business, merit over victimhood, never weaponizing the government against political opponents...

**_[All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from barging back into power.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9j6c27nfjm7uuiben8vu8msc5d4ad5ojucnvdco_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from bargain back into power.")_**

That's why I'm giving everything I've got to make these next four years under President Trump worth it. That's __also__ why I'm sending you this email. The Democrat Party is just a couple of seats away from taking back power in the House of Representatives.

We unloaded every dollar we had to hold the line and contact voters in enough swing districts to win in November. _And now we 're tapped out. Completely._

**So I 'm launching a major rebuilding effort with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to 1) refill our warchest, 2) get ahead of the 8-ball in battleground districts, and 3) keep our Republican Majority in control for ALL FOUR YEARS of Trump's term.**

**_[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to kick in a few bucks today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztns9ehp2knjedcdd9ktrscahblp5235pft7vno0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to kick in a few bucks today?")_**
| | [Yes, I'll kick in ten bucks](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqsmlqirp30d6diu9ftr51kphhbk71hpcja8c1jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in ten bucks")
---

| [Yes, I'll kick in twenty bucks](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znnv6nj4p7vnfcfjbvqvb6omeotor5dj5cvtafr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in twenty bucks")
---

| [Yes, I'll kick in fifty bucks](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6d4tdia97mve026tuanhf5porn5730j0cd8ub98_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in fifty bucks")
---

| [Yes, and I'll kick in even more](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9qbl9l8vcugsnordoj0kdkje42tkfals81lhal8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "Yes, and I’ll kick in even more")
---

I know it's early.

But last cycle, we won the House by about 7,000 votes. The Democrats outraised us by $80M and outspent us by $70M. And they almost won. Now President Trump's entire legislative agenda hangs in the balance.

**That includes his historic tax cuts that I 'm working on RIGHT NOW. **

It's going to take a fortune to save President Trump's House Majority. We don't have an army of Liberal billionaires at our beck and call. The Democrat Party obviously does.

_**[That's why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me - who kick in a few bucks here and there - are our best hope right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za8l0k7nh3n32m0lutv35p4rpmnefe8o5g2dtnn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "That’s why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me – who kick in a few bucks here and there – are our best hope right now. ")**_

The amount doesn't matter _nearly_ as much as the number of people who step up.

The fate of our House Majority (and of Trump's MAGA agenda) is in your hands. I can only hope you'll have the heart to save it.

Thank you,
_- Jason_

**CHAIRMAN JASON SMITH**
Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn64v3abeespjh877hlrin71saugcu23sqjc08pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1mo2td283oofdq01skguo8q0tcl5s22iobvbimo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs8elbh6lh6702ka0akpn7k9jfa9n481v2nt845g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2chh2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE

subject: This can’t be so

body:
Even after the President’s joint address, you’re still a “NO RESPONSE”?

ATTN: Friend,

Our records indicate that your voter profile is __still__ marked **[UNVERIFIED](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdklq3r3s8tcknih1cmpgfr33anq2fjbgeea9090_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2c9h2bs)** for 2025.

Especially after the President delivered his joint address to Congress, we figured this had to be some kind of mistake.

So please, don't delay. **[VERIFY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb9lcp5m3jbm1ocbip1cfe4kb860cjdfdr7jmigo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2c9h2bs)** your voter profile immediately.

Silence speaks volumes. The last thing we'd want is to have to mark your profile as "_NO_ _RESPONSE_."

**[Please privately complete (don't let someone view your screen) your Official 2025 Voter Questionnaire by midnight tonight. >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zakpbtd3vuci4ijmvlinq8uk78ftggt88ps6n4d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdh69or2c9h2bs)**

name: Lesley Davis
subject: Trump’s Guest Payton McNabb Kicked Out of Sorority for Wrongthink
body:
Why was she kicked out of her sorority? I have the details in a new Daily Signal column. | | | |
---
| | |
### It Wasn’t Enough for Payton McNabb to Be Permanently Injured by a Male in Women’s Sports. Her Sorority Also Kicked Her Out.
---
| Payton McNabb, the former high school volleyball player whose sports career was ruined after a male spiked the ball in her face, also faced punishment from her sorority for the crime of confronting a man who was using the women’s restroom. McNabb’s story has gained more attention after President Donald Trump invited her to his speech to Congress Tuesday and after Senate Democrats voted against a bill to exclude men from women’s sports Monday.
---
| [ ](https://gmail.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38e7573a4604819e3af8c7b86&id=fba3a55aca&e=6f9b7d8fd0)
---
| While the president noted McNabb’s tragic backstory, her sorority’s move against her has yet to be reported. The sorority Delta Zeta expelled McNabb on May 20, 2024, finding her guilty of violating the sorority’s “Anti-Bullying Policy” and of engaging in “Moral-Prejudicial Conduct.” The bullying violation involves any activity “reasonably perceived as being dehumanizing, intimidating, hostile, threatening, or otherwise likely to evoke fear of physical harm or emotional distress.” The prejudicial conduct violation involves conduct that may bring the sorority “into disrepute.” Her offense? Calmly confronting a man in a dress in a women’s restroom, recording him out of fear for her safety, and posting the video on X to warn other young women. [_I hope you will check out my column in The Daily Signal for the full story on McNabb's awful treatment from her sorority. _](https://gmail.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38e7573a4604819e3af8c7b86&id=2cbf8d6dab&e=6f9b7d8fd0)
---
|

---
| [Please check out previous stories here](https://gmail.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38e7573a4604819e3af8c7b86&id=e9fe3b0724&e=6f9b7d8fd0).
---
| | |
---
|

name: Senate Map Update
subject: Six toss-up races that we have to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
The Long Run has a proven record of success in races like these, and that’s been because your support
#
Team — We have an update on the Senate map for the 2026 midterms.
With Senator Tina Smith retiring next year, the Minnesota Senate race is now a **_toss-up.**_
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-march25.LNzNAs&refcode=em250310-1-240&t=1&akid=5499%2E196590%2Eyg-mlN)
That brings the amount of toss-up races in the Senate next year to six. These are must-win races if we want to take the majority in the near future:
* Georgia
* North Carolina
* New Hampshire
* Maine
* Michigan
* Minnesota

**Team — The Long Run has a proven record of success in races like these, and that’s been because of the support of people like you.**
From Arizona, to North Carolina, to here in Wisconsin – in races for both House and Senate – we were able to provide crucial resources to candidates who won some very close races last year.
Recommitting to our work is more important now than ever with Trump and Elon Musk pursuing their far-right agenda and the Republican party happily enabling them.
You can bet that they will be calling around to their corporate mega-donors following the news out of Minnesota as they look to expand their majority and cement their rule.
[**Please, help us continue to improve our track record and help deliver big wins for the fight for democracy. Invest in the next wave of changemaking candidates by making your first contribution to The Long Run today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-march25.LNzNAs&refcode=em250310-1-240&t=2&akid=5499%2E196590%2Eyg-mlN)

body:

Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3ECesQ3eA4dQQg5NWymttu1e0IDNxrs4sAYS7dtXpCgXS_7m0_zzkx97133mLCsY4tmZiSEysWOIH39vPixv_ushfhF_fsQf6Xev1il-2dQrPuRLS7uir8aXS_c2AX9f3kddXOGhz5-jfchbaGI9uX6lWRmZXHSGy8jmkElIQUvNo3OeNoLIALWGCBtstBJkFZeSa3oyCJHLkaPiAjhIhYIn0CEXDYiUI7YKgEl-z0nI2-Bagmm-UQjD4JN28FGfn-d5nO6HVQyrybZLsAldrBnm1WBY9bY3HcNKaymxsRA3DXax5JjFTWZ1bE2qn4xUQmRq3SKqZfb1NCyhtUyURXmIT_tnhumKvTVu8UyU-28bmW1Y_7cAG2jJj-ReL0yU_8vxtC7KQ33cH8uqLn4fUdWn_XP989fuFK9PFHIz3lzfuynNmOSv98JrvWuO_wIAAP__79GPQw)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3ECesQ3eA4dQQg5NWymttu1e0IDNxrs4sAYS7dtXpCgXS_7m0_zzkx97133mLCsY4tmZiSEysWOIH39vPixv_ushfhF_fsQf6Xev1il-2dQrPuRLS7uir8aXS_c2AX9f3kddXOGhz5-jfchbaGI9uX6lWRmZXHSGy8jmkElIQUvNo3OeNoLIALWGCBtstBJkFZeSa3oyCJHLkaPiAjhIhYIn0CEXDYiUI7YKgEl-z0nI2-Bagmm-UQjD4JN28FGfn-d5nO6HVQyrybZLsAldrBnm1WBY9bY3HcNKaymxsRA3DXax5JjFTWZ1bE2qn4xUQmRq3SKqZfb1NCyhtUyURXmIT_tnhumKvTVu8UyU-28bmW1Y_7cAG2jJj-ReL0yU_8vxtC7KQ33cH8uqLn4fUdWn_XP989fuFK9PFHIz3lzfuynNmOSv98JrvWuO_wIAAP__79GPQw)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3ECesQ3eA4dQQg5NWymttu1e0IDNxrs4sAYS7dtXpCgXS_7m0_zzkx97133mLCsY4tmZiSEysWOIH39vPixv_ushfhF_fsQf6Xev1il-2dQrPuRLS7uir8aXS_c2AX9f3kddXOGhz5-jfchbaGI9uX6lWRmZXHSGy8jmkElIQUvNo3OeNoLIALWGCBtstBJkFZeSa3oyCJHLkaPiAjhIhYIn0CEXDYiUI7YKgEl-z0nI2-Bagmm-UQjD4JN28FGfn-d5nO6HVQyrybZLsAldrBnm1WBY9bY3HcNKaymxsRA3DXax5JjFTWZ1bE2qn4xUQmRq3SKqZfb1NCyhtUyURXmIT_tnhumKvTVu8UyU-28bmW1Y_7cAG2jJj-ReL0yU_8vxtC7KQ33cH8uqLn4fUdWn_XP989fuFK9PFHIz3lzfuynNmOSv98JrvWuO_wIAAP__79GPQw)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3ECesQ3eA4dQQg5NWymttu1e0IDNxrs4sAYS7dtXpCgXS_7m0_zzkx97133mLCsY4tmZiSEysWOIH39vPixv_ushfhF_fsQf6Xev1il-2dQrPuRLS7uir8aXS_c2AX9f3kddXOGhz5-jfchbaGI9uX6lWRmZXHSGy8jmkElIQUvNo3OeNoLIALWGCBtstBJkFZeSa3oyCJHLkaPiAjhIhYIn0CEXDYiUI7YKgEl-z0nI2-Bagmm-UQjD4JN28FGfn-d5nO6HVQyrybZLsAldrBnm1WBY9bY3HcNKaymxsRA3DXax5JjFTWZ1bE2qn4xUQmRq3SKqZfb1NCyhtUyURXmIT_tnhumKvTVu8UyU-28bmW1Y_7cAG2jJj-ReL0yU_8vxtC7KQ33cH8uqLn4fUdWn_XP989fuFK9PFHIz3lzfuynNmOSv98JrvWuO_wIAAP__79GPQw)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3ECesQ3eA4dQQg5NWymttu1e0IDNxrs4sAYS7dtXpCgXS_7m0_zzkx97133mLCsY4tmZiSEysWOIH39vPixv_ushfhF_fsQf6Xev1il-2dQrPuRLS7uir8aXS_c2AX9f3kddXOGhz5-jfchbaGI9uX6lWRmZXHSGy8jmkElIQUvNo3OeNoLIALWGCBtstBJkFZeSa3oyCJHLkaPiAjhIhYIn0CEXDYiUI7YKgEl-z0nI2-Bagmm-UQjD4JN28FGfn-d5nO6HVQyrybZLsAldrBnm1WBY9bY3HcNKaymxsRA3DXax5JjFTWZ1bE2qn4xUQmRq3SKqZfb1NCyhtUyURXmIT_tnhumKvTVu8UyU-28bmW1Y_7cAG2jJj-ReL0yU_8vxtC7KQ33cH8uqLn4fUdWn_XP989fuFK9PFHIz3lzfuynNmOSv98JrvWuO_wIAAP__79GPQw)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3ECesQ3eA4dQQg5NWymttu1e0IDNxrs4sAYS7dtXpCgXS_7m0_zzkx97133mLCsY4tmZiSEysWOIH39vPixv_ushfhF_fsQf6Xev1il-2dQrPuRLS7uir8aXS_c2AX9f3kddXOGhz5-jfchbaGI9uX6lWRmZXHSGy8jmkElIQUvNo3OeNoLIALWGCBtstBJkFZeSa3oyCJHLkaPiAjhIhYIn0CEXDYiUI7YKgEl-z0nI2-Bagmm-UQjD4JN28FGfn-d5nO6HVQyrybZLsAldrBnm1WBY9bY3HcNKaymxsRA3DXax5JjFTWZ1bE2qn4xUQmRq3SKqZfb1NCyhtUyURXmIT_tnhumKvTVu8UyU-28bmW1Y_7cAG2jJj-ReL0yU_8vxtC7KQ33cH8uqLn4fUdWn_XP989fuFK9PFHIz3lzfuynNmOSv98JrvWuO_wIAAP__79GPQw)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GOmzAQhp_G3ECesQ3eA4dQQg5NWymttu1e0IDNxrs4sAYS7dtXpCgXS_7m0_zzkx97133mLCsY4tmZiSEysWOIH39vPixv_ushfhF_fsQf6Xev1il-2dQrPuRLS7uir8aXS_c2AX9f3kddXOGhz5-jfchbaGI9uX6lWRmZXHSGy8jmkElIQUvNo3OeNoLIALWGCBtstBJkFZeSa3oyCJHLkaPiAjhIhYIn0CEXDYiUI7YKgEl-z0nI2-Bagmm-UQjD4JN28FGfn-d5nO6HVQyrybZLsAldrBnm1WBY9bY3HcNKaymxsRA3DXax5JjFTWZ1bE2qn4xUQmRq3SKqZfb1NCyhtUyURXmIT_tnhumKvTVu8UyU-28bmW1Y_7cAG2jJj-ReL0yU_8vxtC7KQ33cH8uqLn4fUdWn_XP989fuFK9PFHIz3lzfuynNmOSv98JrvWuO_wIAAP__79GPQw)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
––––––––

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_

Good idea, bad bill.

# [Why We Killed Idaho's Blood Labeling Bill](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=158773070&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NzczMDcwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDE2MTg1NzksImV4cCI6MTc0NDIxMDU3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7tM9Ty6NsuRlO9NSezVsA3m05uZgQuvJotQ9k4rVX34)
### Good idea, bad bill.
| | [Brian Lenney - Nampa's Senator](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)

| Mar 10

| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d29a202-1573-47c3-9317-a52fddd8484b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last week, we on the Idaho Senate Health and Welfare Committee buried [House Bill 131 (H 131)](https://substack.com/redirect/52efb336-1ef0-43e5-a87b-a4e15b87af9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after the House shoved it through 53-17.
The idea was to Label every blood donation by mRNA COVID-19 vaccination status--Pfizer or Moderna shots--so recipients know what's flowing into their veins. Transparency's a great goal; and I wanted this to work.
But after two hours of testimony, we saw the truth: this bill was scientifically impossible as well as an interstate disaster waiting to happen.
## The Science Says No: No Test Can Relaibly Identify mRNA-Vaccinated Blood
Let's start with the fact that there's no reliable, rapid blood test to confirm if someone's had an mRNA COVID shot, especially not long after the jab. H 131 needed that certainty to work.
It didn't exist, and testimony made that painfully clear.
The mRNA itself--lipid nanoparticles in Pfizer's BNT162b2 or Moderna's shots--tells cells to churn out SARS-CoV-2 spike protein, then breaks down fast. A 2022 study out of Denmark used quantitative PCR (qPCR) to track it in blood, finding synthetic mRNA detectable for up to 15 days post-vaccination, max.
After that, enzymes shred it--_gone._
No rapid test, like a fingerstick lateral flow assay, can spot it months or years later. Even qPCR, a lab-only method needing hours and specialized gear, can't help at donation scale--_**Idaho 's blood banks process ~50,000 units yearly**_, and we're not hauling DNA sequencers to every site.
What about the spike protein it produces?
Typically, it's short-lived.
A 2023 study using proteomic mass spectrometry caught recombinant spike protein in vaccinated blood, _**but only for days to a couple weeks**_.
Another paper with ultrasensitive single-molecule assays found it in plasma up to 15 days post-shot, then it clears out--metabolized or flushed. Some labs, like Germany's INMODIA GmbH, offer spike detection in blood or tissue, but it's not rapid--it's a mail-in, wait-for-results process.
**Blood banks need answers now, not next week.**
Testimony drilled this in: no point-of-care spike test exists, period.
Labs like Germany's INMODIA GmbH can test for it, but it's a slow, mail-in deal--useless for blood banks needing instant calls. Testimony hammered it: no point-of-care spike test exists.
[Yale's latest, from a February 19, 2025, report](https://substack.com/redirect/217eccf4-d5db-4fa8-b8a8-46d2f2a4d538?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), threw a curveball (someone just sent this to me)--Akiko Iwasaki's team found "elevated levels" of spike protein in some folks with post-vaccination syndrome (PVS), alongside immune shifts like lower CD4 T-cells and higher inflammatory markers.
But it's no game-changer.
It's a small study--60 people, preprint, not peer-reviewed--_**focused on chronic symptoms, not every vaccinated donor.**_
They don't say how long spike lasts or why it's there, and it's not a rapid test we could use. It's not a smoking gun, and nowhere near ready for H 131's demands.
Then there's antibodies--the closest we've got. Rapid tests, like JOYSBIO's 25-minute kit, use a fingerstick to detect anti-spike IgG antibodies, which mRNA vaccines induce.
_Sounds workable, until you unpack it._
_**SARS-CoV-2 infection also triggers anti-spike antibodies, so a positive doesn 't prove vaccination.**_
Experts suggested a workaround: pair it with a nucleocapsid antibody test. mRNA shots don't code for nucleocapsid protein--only infection does. So, anti-spike positive and nucleocapsid negative might mean vaccinated, not infected.
But it's a house of cards. Antibody levels drop over time--studies show anti-spike IgG waning in months to years, depending on the person. Nucleocapsid antibodies fade too, especially post-mild infection.
Bottom-line: a blood donor vaccinated in 2021 could test negative now; an infected one might lack nucleocapsid markers later. False negatives, false positives--it's a mess.
No antibody combo guarantees a vax label long-term.
The Yale data only deepens the doubt--if spike's lingering unpredictably, antibodies might not even match up.
## Nail in the Coffin: Interstate Blood Flow
But even if we ignored or even SOLVED the test problem, H 131 would've imploded the moment blood crossed state lines.
I learned that Idaho's plugged into a national blood grid--Red Cross, America's Blood Centers--moving units to Washington, Utah, Montana, and back. Testimony laid out the numbers: 20-30% of our ~50,000 annual units go interstate. Hospitals here lean on that flow; rural ones especially need hubs like Seattle for rare types.
If we'd passed H 131, every Idaho donation would've needed a vax label.
_**No other state does this --none. **_
Our blood, tagged "vaccinated" or "unvaccinated," would hit a wall out-of-state. Places like Oregon or Wyoming don't track vax status, don't care, and don't have systems to handle our quirky labels. They'd reject our units as non-standard--red blood cells spoil in 42 days, platelets in 5, so delays kill supply.
_**Flip it around: their unlabeled blood rolls into Idaho, and H 131 says we can 't use it without testing every drop. But with no rapid test (see above), we'd be stuck--retest with slow lab methods or toss it. Either way, 5,000-7,500 units could vanish yearly, gutting our stockpile.**_
Donors travel too--Idahoans hit Spokane, Washington folks donate in Boise.
H 131 wouldn't bind out-of-state sites, so an Idahoan's donation there comes back unlabeled, unusable here. In-state travelers self-report? Sure, but memory fails, and some lie. Without a test to verify, it's chaos. Testimony showed us a disaster scenario: a wildfire or crash, and Montana's emergency blood sits at the border, rejected over label fights, while our rural hospitals bleed dry.
The FDA's another snag--they oversee blood nationally, and vax status isn't on their radar. Idaho going rogue could've lost us accreditation, cutting federal ties. Costs--millions for testing, tracking, lost units--would've crushed a system already down 10-15% in donors since COVID.
_We couldn 't risk that._
Two hours of this--scientists, blood bank reps, hard stats--convinced us: H 131 was a good idea that woudln;t work in the real world. No test can tag mRNA-vaxed blood with certainty, and interstate flow can't survive a lone state's rule.
We killed it to protect Idaho's supply, full-stop.

---

Legislation & St. Patrick's Day Parades ☘️

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a74383392ed7/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)

| | | |
---
| Good Morning,
Rob had a very busy week on the Hill and at home. Rob got to see President Trump’s first address to a joint session of Congress in his second term, voted to censure the disrespectful member who disrupted the speech, honored some hometown heroes, and took part in the St. Patrick’s Day celebrations in NEPA!
---
|
---
| Rob came back to NEPA for the weekend and was able to meet a lot of his constituents and be out in the community we all love. He marched in the Scranton St. Patrick’s Day Parade, attended the Larry Cook Center for Presidential Research commemoration, and read to students in Hazleton! Rob is back fighting for us in Washington, but you should see the team throughout the week before he gets back this weekend.
---
|
---
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=d3bfc458e6&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Vince the Pizza Prince, in Scranton. Be sure to support local businesses like Vince the Pizza Prince!
---
|
---
|
The Democrats are already coming after our Congressman for 2026! They’re gearing up to lie and slander Rob, and we need your help to put our side of the story out there. If you are able, please donate to our campaign to keep NEPA out of the grasp of the far-left.
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!

subject: My situation is in your hands, Friend.

body:
But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges

| | | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsqn9nfjv2pshvnkpuc7icqodgajjhc63v9tusgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj6coj4clh2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
| | [ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z48h4idd8d5phhgk461vh8vem2qnunv2ssngpp5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj6coj4clh2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. **[I'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoqsddaj1kfgthb2v754h80acino1sjn1qk3sa68_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj6coj4clh2bs)**

I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvsc26k9q8fb642ddl7aq75sjogm9n2hleins7h8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj6coj4clh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: The study of God
body:
What is our purpose?

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f2e46577b93a4727b3d89ab3d4741a29&_e=JwgvMsVMergLiuQjUsGATd6zVKUPosqm2TI9HI4Oj_ixs4abfk8aMjiCN0rd-xP7Cox7q1EnEZr9qnjFRdNU8uwGW7Z-imNYXEN4g_SZmyqjcOrg3a-vrwCPQqXiKMYR75WhlhIjW_rPcNaU-lYpBEhy451R8c4921qUDJfu57ibZXaTZdtIXoXYpwdvP5ho1P8Yc9_dPAKMxZaazBYDAxWgsVgKnqRprPNZaY7z-jLZcZaZHO-L7cO7gupglE6DWuXmi8JMXNueKOhlPtzGjykC_PvDT_HhNu3u5B64WeHGqQ0aG_J0LaW9VddKMumz05JITviriomeP57t-8N1deHi080sK8Hm73iZ1qlas5ROk4xDacbDL-hvfMb0BeLA8OsUTqyrCCcExqo4rkq1y_fP0hyr0Pq01SLHt7dGAmyX2L4tEgm-PaD-HNvrb4w3) Peter, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f2e46577b93a4727b3d89ab3d4741a29&_e=JwgvMsVMergLiuQjUsGATd6zVKUPosqm2TI9HI4Oj_ixs4abfk8aMjiCN0rd-xP7Cox7q1EnEZr9qnjFRdNU8uwGW7Z-imNYXEN4g_SZmyqjcOrg3a-vrwCPQqXiKMYR75WhlhIjW_rPcNaU-lYpBEhy451R8c4921qUDJfu57ibZXaTZdtIXoXYpwdvP5ho1P8Yc9_dPAKMxZaazBYDAxWgsVgKnqRprPNZaY7z-jLZcZaZHO-L7cO7gupglE6DWuXmi8JMXNueKOhlPtzGj9eDayNxFXNnuvcsHv8DCzdRb-MMC4G7uj5FrOH9BVDSy9Op2iM1GVKhZZoyY8apZUf8M7SpyepSusYcrOS9r1QE1QDkvDSIOCU_ywfLrfK_fvPSSXajszmR0mh2ETCcJNAr5nA2vYyHd9B_4sbgg4NarBKhZxDLHzWh-y5nab0C) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f2e46577b93a4727b3d89ab3d4741a29&_e=JwgvMsVMergLiuQjUsGATd6zVKUPosqm2TI9HI4Oj_ixs4abfk8aMjiCN0rd-xP7Cox7q1EnEZr9qnjFRdNU8uwGW7Z-imNYXEN4g_SZmyqjcOrg3a-vrwCPQqXiKMYR75WhlhIjW_rPcNaU-lYpBEhy451R8c4921qUDJfu57ibZXaTZdtIXoXYpwdvP5ho1P8Yc9_dPAKMxZaazBYDAxWgsVgKnqRprPNZaY7z-jLZcZaZHO-L7cO7gupglE6DWuXmi8JMXNueKOhlPtzGj-RMi-3ZI_v-2KCfK7L2-dyOlYehbJSrghxvcWKy7qH05hf_MrYRB6xtxJy_8F5ppGdEpMoWSOq8mvkK_lbjyLe2HFLhWRzepSm99pMFSnTobal4soGesOJfLKyeUbW1l0YVXzTSpOZuPXALblg_C9nbA1kwhDJIsesuBgUb6sEH). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f2e46577b93a4727b3d89ab3d4741a29&_e=JwgvMsVMergLiuQjUsGATd6zVKUPosqm2TI9HI4Oj_ixs4abfk8aMjiCN0rd-xP7Cox7q1EnEZr9qnjFRdNU8uwGW7Z-imNYXEN4g_SZmyqjcOrg3a-vrwCPQqXiKMYR75WhlhIjW_rPcNaU-lYpBEhy451R8c4921qUDJfu57ibZXaTZdtIXoXYpwdvP5ho1P8Yc9_dPAKMxZaazBYDAxWgsVgKnqRprPNZaY7z-jLZcZaZHO-L7cO7gupglE6DWuXmi8JMXNueKOhlPtzGj-dlJq4tMi5nTUyBb5hvRo2SSTmbEHeP6MZtCMu-7pDveRQO03F_pNSPd2ufkZT-bwNm_b-A42VInc6kr1s_2tw48opFLzKTFOaft1V1s8gdhuZVhF0SfYJ5xmQ741igUy276UkLz4CZiTsooG6fZXLh2TraOUGWiXpddhWZGlBb)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=f2e46577b93a4727b3d89ab3d4741a29&_t=v0q4VGvLQ_tj9H5Y8edHDndSP3dqDh8LdaGosD1T3QYpdZQ5FDPVCSeXQNCGevq-IA50uCeDCDQ2Y79ftorLL1wiFIfq5Kk4BOky0OqI8B2gBZj6f9H6uZSQDKY3RowM)

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: Republicans are attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf55ec9a0-c1ee-44fb-b520-2c18defaac9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| I’ll get straight to the point: Republicans are up with attack ads right now because they know I’m a threat. [Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us fight back?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8db33938-71f5-40af-b293-adfc7e294f89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c2db36a-b753-4a55-b345-32214cd0da26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | This is a race we can win, and they’re scared. If we win all three special elections this spring, we can flip the House and stop the GOP’s agenda. So, they’re grasping at straws to stop our grassroots momentum in its tracks. But, Peter, I won’t stoop to their level. I’m laser-focused on the issues that actually matter to folks and ready to represent this district better than anyone else ever has. [If you’re tired of the same old political playbook and ready to make real changes, I hope you’ll consider splitting a contribution between me and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb34f75b-e02b-4602-85ce-bb90422faad5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
