PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250310_repads_b2_f1_s1_c1_90op_rs-t1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf70008cf-1569-4527-8739-b884d88cabfe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

---|---
Peter,

Abortions are essential—[**and so are the people who provide them!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103590740/532633322/-1409479540?utm_campaign=25emcus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=providerday&sourceid=1150491&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjFlYWM5MS1jMWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLfISCM-hBMGVkcloou7eYVwbCIXgVcUFys0xM29_KI=&emci=af1a718b-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=221eac91-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

**For their compassion, dedication, and bravery, we ❤️ abortion providers—not just on Abortion Provider Appreciation Day but EVERY day. Let's make sure they know it. Send a message of appreciation today to** [**show your love for abortion providers.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103590742/532633323/-1409479540?utm_campaign=25emcus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=providerday&sourceid=1150491&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjFlYWM5MS1jMWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLfISCM-hBMGVkcloou7eYVwbCIXgVcUFys0xM29_KI=&emci=af1a718b-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=221eac91-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103590745/532633324/-1409479540?utm_campaign=25emcus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=providerday&sourceid=1150491&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjFlYWM5MS1jMWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLfISCM-hBMGVkcloou7eYVwbCIXgVcUFys0xM29_KI=&emci=af1a718b-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=221eac91-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [**SEND A MESSAGE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103590752/532633325/-1409479540?utm_campaign=25emcus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=providerday&sourceid=1150491&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjFlYWM5MS1jMWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLfISCM-hBMGVkcloou7eYVwbCIXgVcUFys0xM29_KI=&emci=af1a718b-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=221eac91-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
Our health care heroes face relentless attacks—threats of criminal prosecution, massive fines, and even jail time—simply for providing essential care. Many are the **only** providers in their area, while others care for patients forced to cross state lines.

**Through it all, they continue to provide lifesaving reproductive care,** empowering patients to make informed choices about their bodies and futures.

[**💖 Join us in showing our gratitude—send a message of appreciation now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103590757/532633326/-1409479540?utm_campaign=25emcus-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=providerday&sourceid=1150491&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjFlYWM5MS1jMWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLfISCM-hBMGVkcloou7eYVwbCIXgVcUFys0xM29_KI=&emci=af1a718b-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=221eac91-c1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

Now more than ever, we must support those who are on the front lines of the fight for reproductive rights and remind them they're not alone.

In solidarity,

Center for Reproductive Rights

clean_body: Send a message of appreciation ➡️ | | | ---|--- Peter, Abortions are essential— For their compassion, dedication, and bravery, we ❤️ abortion providers—not just on Abortion Provider Appreciation Day but EVERY day. Let's make sure they know it. Send a message of appreciation today to | "DONATE NOW" Our health care heroes face relentless attacks—threats of criminal prosecution, massive fines, and even jail time—simply for providing essential care. Many are the only providers in their area, while others care for patients forced to cross state lines. Through it all, they continue to provide lifesaving reproductive care, empowering patients to make informed choices about their bodies and futures. Now more than ever, we must support those who are on the front lines of the fight for reproductive rights and remind them they're not alone. In solidarity, Center for Reproductive Rights "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. name: The Democrats
subject: Update: DNC sues Donald Trump →
body:
We know there’s a lot of news happening right now, so we wanted to make sure you didn't miss this:
---
**_DNC Sues Trump Over Illegal Executive Order Threatening Free and Fair Elections_** We know there’s a lot of news happening right now, so we wanted to make sure you didn't miss this, Derek. Three weeks ago, Trump signed an executive order claiming that he gets to decide how independent agencies like the Federal Election Commission (FEC) interpret the law. The FEC, which Congress created after Watergate to regulate how money is raised and spent in federal elections, was designed to be bipartisan and insulated from the political whims of the White House. In this country, we are guaranteed fair elections with impartial referees — not a system where Trump can hand down his preferred campaign rules from his perch in the White House. This executive order is a grave threat to this guarantee. **The DNC is fighting back. Alongside the DCCC and DSCC, we’ve filed a lawsuit against Trump to stop his hostile takeover of the FEC.** For the future of our democracy, it’s absolutely critical that we not cede the institutions that safeguard our elections to Trump and his MAGA Republican allies. That means using every tool at our disposal — including aggressively confronting Trump’s illegal actions in the courts — to defend voters’ right to free and fair elections. Thank you again for your support as we fight back against Trump to protect our democracy. Thank you, The Democrats **Your support helps us continue to build a strong Democratic Party that can protect voters, fight back against Trump’s illegal plans, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for our democracy.** [**If this work is important to you, too, we hope you’ll consider chipping in $3 to help fund it:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250310_2936_fr&refcode2=2936_22930333_ANd0kD&akid=2936%2E22930333%2EANd0kD) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?refcode=em_20250310_2936_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2936_22930333_ANd0kD&akid=2936%2E22930333%2EANd0kD)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dedc91d7818a4710816faa80b858e922&_e=tDjcPdt1j3h-ZiWDAjR4Uc20bA90DpX2vsEnZucdR59OT02Uao_0iG6VFsgdFrQ0wCcwk1TUEJDS-S_gh6iOR2t0cFw8bo2x_AvwfG3UmA3eFf2Ceos2--js3onp0Coyi83EPA1M6YEwq4OuWTlEty97R0R7HhEU6sJbhIpXybSTeV-dYFv9bvJfJyRMQJWI7stMUdPMfglOyIlb-SQB2w_NG09-0VC-C4N3XLfA3E2uEN8_EtyzXPaREDkdFipujKFsZReb53wwbWEGz2RgfGnJb5lXsccpmrrqsCNIa0l5T5-YBlBtsldxxcs_ANcs1bYfbOYQ2Vt92XwF4VWEqmfFeBBO6xewv8C53nMMuywCD9ZE5eT_SA26MJR8zZjjr5Ju8Jss_kHuWS5ttrmncw%3D%3D)

| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dedc91d7818a4710816faa80b858e922&_e=tDjcPdt1j3h-ZiWDAjR4Uc20bA90DpX2vsEnZucdR59OT02Uao_0iG6VFsgdFrQ0wCcwk1TUEJDS-S_gh6iOR2t0cFw8bo2x_AvwfG3UmA3eFf2Ceos2--js3onp0Coyi83EPA1M6YEwq4OuWTlEty97R0R7HhEU6sJbhIpXybSTeV-dYFv9bvJfJyRMQJWI7stMUdPMfglOyIlb-SQB2w_NG09-0VC-C4N3XLfA3E2uEN8_EtyzXPaREDkdFipu2de5FF2cWHjX8-bYii9nUW3Yadh5EKKtkz1kX6_jTXKNnfODRz0T-gJgEge1YpaLpL9bQGWuvVgNmet4hQW3H6R5qqUJAoVGrYWRszJQ0fW9lzoqnVmm8YrdAQ7gg4U-fWOgrTpeU1cVLLJRPI1qXA%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dedc91d7818a4710816faa80b858e922&_e=tDjcPdt1j3h-ZiWDAjR4Uc20bA90DpX2vsEnZucdR59OT02Uao_0iG6VFsgdFrQ0wCcwk1TUEJDS-S_gh6iOR2t0cFw8bo2x_AvwfG3UmA3eFf2Ceos2--js3onp0Coyi83EPA1M6YEwq4OuWTlEty97R0R7HhEU6sJbhIpXybSTeV-dYFv9bvJfJyRMQJWI7stMUdPMfglOyIlb-SQB2w_NG09-0VC-C4N3XLfA3E2uEN8_EtyzXPaREDkdFipuT8sjrrZFEAhicT-7etmhA0Ak1cwH_Pv7OAihoZq1dgZcU2j-mG66-EZZo7XClSYTsAVeTiuRu9yMRaSxZxvrkZN38x6kkZEQaQWAYr_a2rJWflaC7tdfGDf_g1Rk8-d3P9wnNgQsVVbiPlbV3hqKSg%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dedc91d7818a4710816faa80b858e922&_e=tDjcPdt1j3h-ZiWDAjR4Uc20bA90DpX2vsEnZucdR59OT02Uao_0iG6VFsgdFrQ0wCcwk1TUEJDS-S_gh6iOR2t0cFw8bo2x_AvwfG3UmA3eFf2Ceos2--js3onp0Coyi83EPA1M6YEwq4OuWTlEty97R0R7HhEU6sJbhIpXybSTeV-dYFv9bvJfJyRMQJWI7stMUdPMfglOyIlb-SQB2w_NG09-0VC-C4N3XLfA3E2uEN8_EtyzXPaREDkdFipueUJp9vlhDTLftA0JM99Gp4yU70V7VC7eM52spo9L9TPd8LeV0Nkc7pULSuIkW_Eh7uZL5S8ZL5OXAJy5W7kzHRW6HOR2UeMuAf6IeukEu5UG-HCfRxbWvI3jmif__EAibzNY1OnlNVod-zNKK-xSrA%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dedc91d7818a4710816faa80b858e922&_e=tDjcPdt1j3h-ZiWDAjR4Uc20bA90DpX2vsEnZucdR59OT02Uao_0iG6VFsgdFrQ0wCcwk1TUEJDS-S_gh6iOR2t0cFw8bo2x_AvwfG3UmA3eFf2Ceos2--js3onp0Coyi83EPA1M6YEwq4OuWTlEty97R0R7HhEU6sJbhIpXybSTeV-dYFv9bvJfJyRMQJWI7stMUdPMfglOyIlb-SQB2w_NG09-0VC-C4N3XLfA3E2uEN8_EtyzXPaREDkdFipupoFJHqj57waRjbLV4HrTbOXfhQ4W-qlEeQZRDBDHC4jRW9S5Lt3d_E7dC9CIf93y6ETZwix3XB11qBLCkyOJflQs14HHHgO3000UHEF454kHT1IdQfzVsvyNdeyhadnZ-ciuul4ikMVWZWn6mo0SCg%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.

clean_body: | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. name: Tammy Baldwin HQ
subject: Failing to support veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy has worked across party lines to do right by our veterans and make sure they have the care, well-paying jobs, and community support that they have earned and deserve.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4618%2E35263%2EpQ5f4i)
Peter, Trump promised to take care of veterans — really, it’s in his massive campaign platform. Unfortunately, he’s doing the exact opposite. Trump and Elon Musk, under the charade of promoting “government efficiency,” are **cutting jobs that support — and employ — veterans** , including right here in Wisconsin. Tammy is fighting back because these brave folks put their lives on the line for our country and deserve quality care, good jobs, and respect. Peter, Trump promised to take care of veterans — really, it’s in his massive campaign platform. Unfortunately, he’s doing the exact opposite. Trump and Elon Musk, under the charade of promoting “government efficiency,” are cutting jobs that support — and employ — veterans , including right here in Wisconsin. Tammy is fighting back because these brave folks put their lives on the line for our country and deserve quality care, good jobs, and respect. Wisconsin is the proud home of servicemembers, veterans, and military families who have made incredible sacrifices for our country. Tammy has worked across party lines to do right by our veterans and make sure they have the care, well-paying jobs, and community support that they have earned and deserve. name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: ⚠️ Dangerous Ohio Legislation You Don't Know About!
body:
Learn about recent dangerous legislation in Ohio. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=14b7f2e11b&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=49da015fbe&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**CALL TO ACTION! WE NEED YOU!
THERE'S A DANGEROUS VOTER ID PLAY
BEING LED BY HOUSE REPUBLICANS!
STOP HB78! • STOP HB78!**

---
| There is a new bill in the Ohio House of Representatives that's been discovered by grassroots conservative activists that could be **incredibly dangerous to our elections** in Ohio.
There are 3 Ohio Republican legislators who are pushing a bill to have us give the state more biometric information by which to track & control us. It's a bill to allow for digital driver's licenses and digital state IDs. And **the legislation could allow these digital IDs to be used to vote**. It's baked into the bill, and the proposed amendment we've seen does nothing to fix this problem.
We are educating and activating Ohio's electorate to oppose HB78 in advance of Tuesday's (3/11/2025) proponent testimony (**[10 AM LIVE on The Ohio Channel](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a3ffda17a7&e=5c740fa3e2)**). **Please SHARE this email with everyone you know!**
If you watch the video shown below, you'll know everything you need to know to communicate with your elected representatives and committee members who will possibly vote on the bill THIS WEEK!
Starting Monday morning, we need to launch a statewide effort to call and write the legislators listed below to oppose HB78 and its amendment (AM_136_0123). **With the proposed DEMOCRAT "Ohio Voter Bill of Rights" constitutional amendment on the horizon—threatening to eliminate Ohio’s hard-won election safeguards—this is a top priority.**
All committee members and constituents who care about protecting election integrity safeguards (like Voter ID) and preventing a centralized digital control system must speak out.
**Governor DeWine announced in July 2024 that Ohio driver’s licenses and IDs can now be added to Apple Wallets. He and other Republican and Democrat legislators are pushing for digital ID, bringing Ohio one step closer to online voting.**

**CALL TO ACTION:**

Contact these GOP HB78 Sponsors & tell them: "**STOP WORKING ON HB78, THE DANGEROUS DIGITAL ID BILL"**

**Rep Thomas Hall** , [Thomas.hall@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:) & [Rep46@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-5094
**Rep Gary Click** , [Rep88@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-1374
**Rep Josh Williams** , [Rep44@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-1418

Contact these GOP Ohio House Technology & Innovation Committee Members & tell them: "**VOTE NO ON HB78, THE DANGEROUS DIGITAL ID BILL"**

**Chairman Thad Claggett** , [Rep68@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-1482
**Vice Chair Heidi Workman** , [Rep72@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-2004
**Rep Steve Demetriou** , [Rep35@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-5088
**Rep Ron Ferguson** , [Rep96@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-3735
**Rep Adam Holmes** , [Rep97@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-6014
**Rep Adam Mathews** , [Rep56@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-6027
**Rep Ty D. Mathews** , [Rep83@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-3819
**Rep Riordan McClain** , [Rep87@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-6265
**Rep Melanie Miller** , [Rep67@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-0961

**HB78 DIGITAL ID SUMMARY HIGHLIGHTS:**
###
**Key Issues with HB78 and Digital ID Implementation**
* **Undermines Ohio’s Voter ID Law** – Weakens physical photo ID verification for in-person voting.
* **Unreliable Identity Verification** – Voting systems (e.g., e-pollbooks) cannot authenticate or verify mobile driver’s license data.
* **Lack of Government Oversight & Transparency** – No public access to records due to private third-party contracts.
* **No Security or Privacy Standards** – No mandated consumer protection for biometric data storage and use by private vendors.
* **No Oversight of Private Vendors** – Third-party vendors (e.g., BMV & AAMVA) operate without public accountability.
* **No Vendor Liability** – No disclosure requirements for data breaches, compromises, or theft of personal information.
* **Risk of Data Interception** – No guarantees that biometric data transmission won’t be intercepted by compromised telecom or internet systems.
* **Use of Out-of-State Digital IDs** – Allows verification via other states’ digital IDs without defining security standards.

### **Additional Concerns**
* **Potential for Government Overreach** – A private vendor-controlled digital ID system could lead to surveillance, social credit scoring, and restricted access to essential services (e.g., financial, medical, travel).
* **Pathway to a New Constitutional Amendment** – Enables the **Ohio Voter Bill of Rights** , which would make physical voter ID checks optional, replacing them with unverifiable digital ID—potentially enabling online voting.
* **No Cost Analysis** – The bill lacks a fiscal review, despite likely requiring **tens of millions of dollars** in IT system upgrades and security enhancements.
* **Opposes Radical Government Transparency** – HB78 contradicts efforts to restore oversight and accountability in government activities.
* **Contradicts Trump’s Voter ID Goals** – Goes against President Trump’s push for universal **physical voter ID verification** across all 50 states.

**EPISODE: "Ohio Republicans are Pushing Surveillance-State Legislation"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7c46afddce&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| | ** **
**DON'T FORGET!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!**

---
| Are you aware there's an Ohio bond issue on the primary ballot in May? If not, you're not alone!
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

body:

Hi there, it’s Jared. I might be the new kid on the block in the Judiciary Committee, but trust me – I’m more than ready to go toe-to-toe with Jim Jordan, the chair of the House Judiciary. Look, I didn’t join Congress to sit back and twiddle my thumbs. I’m here to shut down Jordan’s dangerous agenda, stop extremists in their tracks, and fight for real policies that help everyday Americans. [**But to do that, I need you in this fight with me. body:

---
| |
---
| Greater Georgia Newsletter March 10, 2025
---
| We are now two months into 2025, and a lot has happened across the State of Georgia! The legislature is in full swing advancing cost relief for Georgians and enacting conservative priorities that complement President Trump's conservative agenda. Grassroots organizations are thriving and organizing as Georgians are energized by fast and decisive federal action. Our team has been hard at work tracking federal and state developments and engaging with citizens across the state. There's never been a more exciting time to be part of this growing effort!
Last year, Greater Georgia made a huge impact up and down the general election ballot, helping to deliver conservative messaging to key groups of minority and under-engaged voters across the Peach State, and maintaining strong conservative majorities in the Georgia Senate and House of Representatives.
But our work is just beginning. This year, with local and municipal elections on the ballot, we will continue to build Georgia's conservative infrastructure through voter registration and updates, diverse community engagement, and issue advocacy - including election trust and integrity.
None of this important work would be possible without dedicated supporters like you, and we hope you'll join us this year as we fight to keep Georgia free, prosperous, and the greatest place to live, work, and raise a family!
---
| |
---
| 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION
---
| | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAwP_eRrnTjG4Q_xNbyybWnRtX5xANqlVJ6eSaeVwMM8SNzzR5WaHanwJSRizAlo0NzQ721vxfqDsO1wNvLYvySesfLyrsXpmYot212Rn1LJpe7TA4fluzx_g_Ty8Y7A7H_TnRvLhhN-w40s8Fnpf2cJ6LTRr_A5HZqTeoQR3nL1pBIg8zmHUiuL0VSI-soRO9UeBFfQ8piHn4KMXz-ozhzPZwZ65JBd-UhQAXVg7SnJrbxiLXv7SfXn7AOR75MW&c=8_e80ITP0tYhOo3j4_-ykdzwXuL3DmwAp7MiFZ68Wk3lRjeV5RSO5g==&ch=nDOd5t6FGJkZIOFtFdeShd8wO4jjgAcQbfZEl1ONww8KKl4GJ1jITQ==)
---
| The Georgia General Assembly's 2025 legislative session began on January 13th and, having already reached crossover, is scheduled to run through April 4th. Greater Georgia is playing an active role in tracking and advocating for legislation that aligns with Georgia's conservative values and will strongly fight against legislation undermining them. Below is an update on Gov. Brian Kemp's legislative priorities, as well as key pieces of legislation we're tracking:
Governor's Priorities In his [State of the State Address](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAwP_eRrnTjG4Q_xNbyybWnRtX5xANqlVJ6eSaeVwMM8SNzzR5WaHYrnEa28SjI-4ld3OOdunTlI5Vx7P4hdTk3lzvcxXs3np4qV-KrzB9-_j0xrBr6ZbAjz9gyKtovYawl1jLPb8ZvMv61E3kyblEch5UIE3X3gsb61QI2LzeQ9qTdf2gl9-jioeoKvOonltJ9EUDNUhLo3QvCNmJdAcAtqI2MMwkycCwDJ2Z6C8VSIEXVCk5x4Et8ry9PsqHxo&c=8_e80ITP0tYhOo3j4_-ykdzwXuL3DmwAp7MiFZ68Wk3lRjeV5RSO5g==&ch=nDOd5t6FGJkZIOFtFdeShd8wO4jjgAcQbfZEl1ONww8KKl4GJ1jITQ==), as well as at the annual [Eggs and Issues](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAwP_eRrnTjG4Q_xNbyybWnRtX5xANqlVJ6eSaeVwMM8SNzzR5WaHYrnEa28SjI-mXEFG1_tuuWMvkymRm_u0qD1r7mo0L6az54ygHIRNgPDdcMLb0SDz0FZ6eUliBMlZ_kXum77wxt3WPzq1K8pByl1TYL_yKErZEPIJihF3mnyFftP8SIII52g_9GFuInYjlqyPK1r5CnczCIBbSaxJDZp5qpwIg8e9rQhqakpWSgO2fZN0i3_ue-il3b1w3wobdyWLlA1O5rrASVgmCwCSshf8rNx6_zj&c=8_e80ITP0tYhOo3j4_-ykdzwXuL3DmwAp7MiFZ68Wk3lRjeV5RSO5g==&ch=nDOd5t6FGJkZIOFtFdeShd8wO4jjgAcQbfZEl1ONww8KKl4GJ1jITQ==) event, Governor Kemp highlighted a number of his legislative priorities for 2025. View our summary below or click the respective links to read his full remarks.
Tort Reform
* Governor's top priority for this legislative session.
* Proposed [tort reform package](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAwP_eRrnTjG4Q_xNbyybWnRtX5xANqlVJ6eSaeVwMM8SNzzR5WaHYrnEa28SjI-OJhOoDCG5IzttQNhSoLgcLDi7AtfVl_2Vg8Q-EW_54K2XNlxgb0TnEihXNlvqDeAx4pmat9klgppaOR1vGo3o_56sUAa1D_QfHkUlB9HOGL59GLyFZzdHfmleqrhWqVBxRL6xzGQ45roGx0yPieEbyzkYjXbExa0f1Pdlpf7ko4m8PNFvi8LCvDE46iHLWxW1Z52hveeAzCZNyfTzNibZlUdnVotqDZJ&c=8_e80ITP0tYhOo3j4_-ykdzwXuL3DmwAp7MiFZ68Wk3lRjeV5RSO5g==&ch=nDOd5t6FGJkZIOFtFdeShd8wO4jjgAcQbfZEl1ONww8KKl4GJ1jITQ==) will level the playing field in Georgia courtrooms, ban hostile foreign powers from taking advantage of consumers and legal proceedings, aim to stabilize insurance costs for businesses and consumers, increase transparency and fairness, and ensure Georgia continues to be the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

Workforce Development
* Ensure Georgia remains the top state in the nation for business and talent by aligning our education pathways to access high-demand, high-skill, and high-wage careers.
* Use the previously unveiled Georgia High Career Demand List to continue aligning education and job training programs with the needs of employers, grow our skilled workforce, ensure training programs meet industry standards, and increase awareness of career opportunities across the state.
* Introduce the Top State for Talent Act to incorporate Georgia MATCH into the individual graduation plans of students beginning in the 9th grade; align existing, career-tech and academic credentials with the Georgia High Career Demand List; increase opportunities for articulation from high school to postsecondary programs in those high demand fields; and include a return on investment analysis measuring the effectiveness of secondary and postsecondary programs that are aligned with the high demand career list.

Infrastructure
* Provide another $250 million, like last year, to double Georgia's grant investment in local roads without doubling the cost for local governments.
* $530 million to invest in freight and logistic transportation infrastructure.
* Another infusion of $250 million into the Georgia Environmental Finance Authority fund to support the development of water, wastewater, and solid waste infrastructure projects.

Education
* Fund $53 million for additional school security grants to K-12 public schools to improve school safety, bringing the annual total to over $150 million.
* Prevent biological men and boys from playing in women's and girls' sports.
* Improve threat management coordination between schools and strengthen penalties for the offense of threatening death or serious injury to individuals at school.
* Make it easier for Georgia schools to hire qualified school psychologists.

| Latino Day at the Georgia State Capitol February 5, 2025 Greater Georgia joined some of our Hispanic partner organizations, including Our America and the Latino Conservative Organization, in celebrating the third annual Latino Day at the Georgia State Capitol. Greater Georgia was proud to celebrate the contributions of Georgia's Latino community to our great state, and we look forward to continuing our hard work of growing the conservative movement across all of Georgia's diverse communities.

| Voter Registration Drive at Clark Atlanta University February 26, 2025 Greater Georgia hosted a successful tabling event at Clark Atlanta University, one of Georgia's many historically black colleges and universities. Volunteers assisted students with verifying their voter registration, successfully registering 4 new voters, and checking the voter status of more than 58 students.

| Georgia March For Life March 6, 2025 Our volunteers were out in full force at the Georgia March for Life, advocating for pro-life and pro-family policies and helping voters check their registration status. We successfully helped 58 marchers check and update their registrations to be sure they're ready to vote in this year's local elections!

Anyone who is passionate about the conservative movement is encouraged to apply.

clean_body: | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter March 10, 2025 | We are now two months into 2025, and a lot has happened across the State of Georgia! The legislature is in full swing advancing cost relief for Georgians and enacting conservative priorities that complement President Trump's conservative agenda. Grassroots organizations are thriving and organizing as Georgians are energized by fast and decisive federal action. Our team has been hard at work tracking federal and state developments and engaging with citizens across the state. There's never been a more exciting time to be part of this growing effort! Last year, Greater Georgia made a huge impact up and down the general election ballot, helping to deliver conservative messaging to key groups of minority and under-engaged voters across the Peach State, and maintaining strong conservative majorities in the Georgia Senate and House of Representatives. But our work is just beginning. This year, with local and municipal elections on the ballot, we will continue to build Georgia's conservative infrastructure through voter registration and updates, diverse community engagement, and issue advocacy - including election trust and integrity. None of this important work would be possible without dedicated supporters like you, and we hope you'll join us this year as we fight to keep Georgia free, prosperous, and the greatest place to live, work, and raise a family! | | | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION | | == | The Georgia General Assembly's 2025 legislative session began on January 13th and, having already reached crossover, is scheduled to run through April 4th. Greater Georgia is playing an active role in tracking and advocating for legislation that aligns with Georgia's conservative values and will strongly fight against legislation undermining them. Below is an update on Gov. Brian Kemp's legislative priorities, as well as key pieces of legislation we're tracking: Governor's Priorities In his ==, as well as at the annual == event, Governor Kemp highlighted a number of his legislative priorities for 2025. View our summary below or click the respective links to read his full remarks. Tort Reform Governor's top priority for this legislative session. Proposed == will level the playing field in Georgia courtrooms, ban hostile foreign powers from taking advantage of consumers and legal proceedings, aim to stabilize insurance costs for businesses and consumers, increase transparency and fairness, and ensure Georgia continues to be the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Workforce Development Ensure Georgia remains the top state in the nation for business and talent by aligning our education pathways to access high-demand, high-skill, and high-wage careers. Use the previously unveiled Georgia High Career Demand List to continue aligning education and job training programs with the needs of employers, grow our skilled workforce, ensure training programs meet industry standards, and increase awareness of career opportunities across the state. Introduce the Top State for Talent Act to incorporate Georgia MATCH into the individual graduation plans of students beginning in the 9th grade; align existing, career-tech and academic credentials with the Georgia High Career Demand List; increase opportunities for articulation from high school to postsecondary programs in those high demand fields; and include a return on investment analysis measuring the effectiveness of secondary and postsecondary programs that are aligned with the high demand career list. Infrastructure Provide another $250 million, like last year, to double Georgia's grant investment in local roads without doubling the cost for local governments. $530 million to invest in freight and logistic transportation infrastructure. Another infusion of $250 million into the Georgia Environmental Finance Authority fund to support the development of water, wastewater, and solid waste infrastructure projects. Education Fund $53 million for additional school security grants to K-12 public schools to improve school safety, bringing the annual total to over $150 million. Prevent biological men and boys from playing in women's and girls' sports. Improve threat management coordination between schools and strengthen penalties for the offense of threatening death or serious injury to individuals at school. Greater Georgia was proud to celebrate the contributions of Georgia's Latino community to our great state, and we look forward to continuing our hard work of growing the conservative movement across all of Georgia's diverse communities. | | | | | Voter Registration Drive at Clark Atlanta University February 26, 2025 Greater Georgia hosted a successful tabling event at Clark Atlanta University, one of Georgia's many historically black colleges and universities. Volunteers assisted students with verifying their voter registration, successfully registering 4 new voters, and checking the voter status of more than 58 students. | | | | | Georgia March For Life March 6, 2025 Our volunteers were out in full force at the Georgia March for Life, advocating for pro-life and pro-family policies and helping voters check their registration status. We successfully helped 58 marchers check and update their registrations to be sure they're ready to vote in this year's local elections! | | | | | INTERNSHIP APPLICATIONS NOW OPEN Greater Georgia is now accepting internship applications for Summer 2025. Every semester, we are proud to hire college students and recent college graduates for paid internships with our organization. Anyone who is passionate about the conservative movement is encouraged to apply. | | == | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | | | | | | | WHAT WE'RE READING | == John Fetterman Says Dems May Have Lost Key Demographic Forever == White House Preparing Order to Cut Thousands of Federal Health Workers == Georgia House OKs revised spending plan with hundreds of millions for prisons, hurricane relief == Trump Moving to Keep Trans Athletes from Playing Women's Sports * == 'Tough decisions' in store for 'sanctuary' cities after Bondi turns off federal funding spigot | | | | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: It’s the economy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
It is never far from my mind that I was elected by Michiganders on the same ballot as President Trump.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2254%2E135344%2EyczEDZ)

When I gave the official response to President Trump’s State of the Union, I chose to do it in the town of Wyandotte, Michigan – a town that both Trump and I won last November.
If you’re not from a swing-y community like that, let me tell you a little more about those voters.
A recent focus group in Michigan and other battleground states gives us some good examples.
People think Elon Musk is "weird," they think Democrats are "too woke," and while his approval numbers are slowly ticking down, they admire President Trump's sense of action. He seems to be doing something new every day.
But at the end of the day, they care about the economy. Here are some notes from the focus group:
* "'Money just doesn’t go as far as it used to,' said Chris, a Trump voter from Michigan."
* "Almost every focus group voter complained about the cost of housing, eggs, bacon, gas, construction materials, interest rates, you name it."
* "[A]lmost all said they fondly remembered when Democrats put the focus squarely on working people."

This is the path forward for Democrats to win towns like Wyandotte: working to preserve and expand the middle class.
And in order to do that, we have to bring down the price of things we spend the most money on.
We need to make more things in America with good-paying, union jobs – and bring our supply chains back home from places like China.
We need to give American businesses the certainty they need to invest and create the jobs of the future.
And we need a tax system that’s fair for people who don’t happen to make a billion dollars.
[**Can you make a small contribution - $5, $50 or whatever you can afford - to help me elect a new generation of leaders who lay out an economic plan for our future?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar25.ecmY5i&refcode=em250310-1&t=2&akid=2254%2E135344%2EyczEDZ)

name: CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES ---------- House Republicans
subject: jaw-dropping new report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
House Democrats just announced a $9.5 MILLION warchest – outraising Conservatives by over $4 MILLION.

| |
---
| | | Our hearts just SANK...

**House Democrats just announced a $9.5 MILLION warchest - outraising Conservatives by over $4 MILLION. They just SHATTERED their own fundraising record.**

This is the worst possible news for Conservatives. Why?

Because now House Democrats have the ammunition to OBLITERATE our Conservative House Majority. And to rub salt in the wound, there are TWO Special Elections just weeks away from right now.

But we can either throw in the towel or step up in a HUGE way...

_**[If we want to DEFEND our House Majority, FAST-TRACK President Trump's strong agenda, and SAVE this country of ours, it'll take an army of grassroots Conservatives stepping up to eclipse their massive fundraising haul.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm9qa1pht32tnfii3jr9sipb2cbrmkvbmj5i955o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj6ap72cph2bs "If we want to DEFEND our House Majority, FAST-TRACK President Trump’s strong agenda, and SAVE this country of ours, it’ll take an army of grassroots Conservatives stepping up to eclipse their massive fundraising haul.")**_

_**CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES:**_
---
| | [STEP UP TO THE PLATE RIGHT NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmbiuni6rkneppeo5q4q08f1gqpnfsq2qmao7rn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj6ap72cph2bs)
---
Look -

This isn't one of those moments to wait for someone else to help. We're falling dangerously behind the Democrats in the fundraising race. And if too many Patriots sit out, they will BURY us in false and misleading attacks.

If we fail to outraise, outspend, and organize those on the other side of the aisle: It's all over. That's why we're rushing to send you this message.

_**[We're pleading with you to step up to the plate and help us save our Pro-Trump House Majority](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z14drs5tfp913qqqtoc9hmf1mqe10kf3agoprrv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj6ap72cph2bs "We’re pleading with you to step up to the plate and help us save our Pro-Trump House Majority")**_

_**CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES:**_
---

---
The Democrats have billionaires at the ready to help them buy their way to victory. But we have a grassroots network that is bigger and better than theirs. If we can come together as a team, we can rally a massive comeback and help President Trump make HISTORY!

**So - with everything on the line - can we count on you to step up?**

For America,
House GOP

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103596394/532642742/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWEyNTgwNS1jOGZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXOM-B6d1i6KvY2_T9NCIab_3pp0u1fkOYgtIvPBcNM=&emci=0f968d51-c4fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=09a25805-c8fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)
---
We’ll keep this one quick, team.
You might already know there’s a voter suppression bill sitting in the House right now. The deceptively named **Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act (SAVE Act)** would prevent millions of people from registering to vote.
People who don’t have passports, married women who have changed their last names, and anyone without immediate access to their birth certificate could lose their right to vote.
Before this bill reaches the House floor, we have to let Congress know we won’t tolerate any threats to our voting rights.
[Add your name RIGHT NOW and demand that Congress stop the SAVE Act from becoming law. We can’t afford to be silent.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103596396/532642744/-1582714226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWEyNTgwNS1jOGZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXOM-B6d1i6KvY2_T9NCIab_3pp0u1fkOYgtIvPBcNM=&emci=0f968d51-c4fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=09a25805-c8fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | We’ll keep this one quick, team. You might already know there’s a voter suppression bill sitting in the House right now. The deceptively named Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act (SAVE Act) would prevent millions of people from registering to vote. People who don’t have passports, married women who have changed their last names, and anyone without immediate access to their birth certificate could lose their right to vote. Before this bill reaches the House floor, we have to let Congress know we won’t tolerate any threats to our voting rights. | Let's do this, NextGen America | = |

name: COURIER Newsroom
subject: Trump’s economic disaster was predictable – the legacy media let it happen
body:
Throughout the 2024 election, economists, Democrats, and even some Republicans warned that Trump’s policies would wreck the economy while benefiting only the wealthy. Now, not even 100 days into his presidency, those warnings are coming true.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103596507/532642970/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkODNhMTktYzhmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JqsW0NIj-yN_-jNQHUmfLEepG7WtCRrhTQpgMqkOwCY=&emci=92455fe8-c6fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7dd83a19-c8fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
The stock market is in freefall. Donald Trump’s reckless trade war with Canada and Mexico is looming, threatening higher prices on everything from cars to groceries.
As recession fears grow, Trump and MAGA insist the chaos is all part of the plan—that Americans must endure “pain” on the path to Trump's mythical vision of American greatness.
**It’s all bullshit.**
Throughout the 2024 election, economists, Democrats, and even some Republicans warned that Trump’s policies would wreck the economy while benefiting only the wealthy. Now, not even 100 days into his presidency, those warnings are coming true.
[**So why didn’t the legacy media sound the alarm? Why was there endless coverage of egg prices but barely any acknowledgment that Kamala Harris was the only candidate with policies to help working families and build on post-pandemic economic recovery?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103596510/532642973/2081197767?refcode=20250310_Trump_crash&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkODNhMTktYzhmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JqsW0NIj-yN_-jNQHUmfLEepG7WtCRrhTQpgMqkOwCY=)
**[FIGHT BACK!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103596512/532642975/-1581427288?refcode=20250310_Trump_crash&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkODNhMTktYzhmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JqsW0NIj-yN_-jNQHUmfLEepG7WtCRrhTQpgMqkOwCY=)**
**The media’s double standard got us to this moment.**
Throughout the campaign, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden were held to an impossibly high standard, while Trump was treated with kid gloves.
CNN even admitted it—on air. After Harris’ October 23 town hall, their anchors acknowledged she was judged more harshly than Trump, before quickly brushing it off as "just the world she lives in."
And it wasn’t just CNN. _The New York Times_ was reportedly “at war” with the Biden administration throughout the campaign, relentlessly framing Biden’s presidency as a failure while downplaying the chaos and economic risks of a second Trump term.
**Then there’s the media’s ongoing failure to deal with Trump’s nonstop torrent of lies. Instead of calling out his economic nonsense with real analysis, they covered his bullshit like it was all a game—debating whether his lies will "resonate" with voters rather than simply reporting the truth.**
And the truth about his economic plans was always obvious: economists spent the entire campaign warning that Trump’s policies would accelerate inflation and push the global economy to the brink.
The result? Millions of Americans walked into the voting booth without a clear picture of the stakes. Now, as the economy spirals and recession fears mount, those same media outlets are feigning surprise—once again spending more time speculating about voter reactions than holding Trump accountable for his predictable, reckless failures.
**COURIER was founded to take on this broken model of political coverage.****We will hold Trump accountable and always put the truth ahead of clickbait and false equivalency.**
_[**If you want real accountability, chip in $25 today to support independent journalism that tells the truth.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103596513/532642978/2081197767?refcode=20250310_Trump_crash&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkODNhMTktYzhmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JqsW0NIj-yN_-jNQHUmfLEepG7WtCRrhTQpgMqkOwCY=)_
**[STAND WITH COURIER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103596514/532642979/-1581427288?refcode=20250310_Trump_crash&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkODNhMTktYzhmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JqsW0NIj-yN_-jNQHUmfLEepG7WtCRrhTQpgMqkOwCY=)**
In solidarity,
The COURIER Team

clean_body: This is urgent | | | | We've been trying to reach you for weeks, but our messages have been met with radio silence. I'm worried that Big Tech is censoring my messages to you. Did you get this, Friend? As a key ally of House Republicans, we need your expertise to guide our partnership with Elon Musk's DOGE. Together, we're on a mission to expose the waste and corruption in Washington and bring transparency to the government's biggest budget busters. I have some bad news, though - the deadline to submit our official DOGE Survey has passed. "But since you’re such an important part of our team, we are making an exception and keeping it LIVE for the next 24 HOURS so that you can submit your response." We're only extending the deadline for our DOGE survey because we really need to hear from you! | | " EXTENDED DEADLINE: 24 HOURS SUBMIT DOGE SURVEY NOW!" "Use the link below to access the DOGE survey and join the mission while the survey is LIVE:" | | | "ACTIVATE DOGE SURVEY " We're counting on you to help us unleash the DOGE and bring accountability to Washington. Please don't let us down Sincerely, Erika House Survey Services | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/TpVayBGDN-PGl5EklBMof4D2Mi26ygYY2DI2_hTKJEZhnqasOmL1gWGMJJ5-vpun_lroItRWtCwn8yI7_81DrWrWxn4WkzGnE8PVNIGA0kHZTZjRKwa2-YJExpkgyvatLcv2c7LZw1h1KnXg0ycocmNNL-dNIew_kfJfCr1MefaagwPyOM4Hl1FA1NFJlkDtdg3eYwCyWKAetYmtZfAddMJ1MRSe3ivgMKPW7Ta7Jm_xl_EUNnXIl4H1dO8RYoJ_tglJ_8GeOUoThWTopB2Ki62CkfdtWgaOEsOSBvMPJNTVE07EeDxmEZykG4ABNU1KpKUkc9n-1zIT-iV7TGUs4Swb11XjHSHn-AmtPXfZnatYMMvVeomqfFbP4dtHn-CWYO8zUHrz8Dh0a-xUUcyCZCkHbPuivjypzwCE2vuR11cMRaWPOKp0lUY8DkiTFQFuvmNJ25rmo_lelx7PtU1f_a3rwhZstL2IlPYd8ecr2_fb2si8lU9yoabHQYwAZDWSJV4WbQiQhYsEJyLwLZEcTz_ZKQqrxQ/oXz4eqVfkJDZ8IpIgsaL87DMAWydNBYE/6)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/19lyRJUt9RPI7ZAPax9qrYISf7CE-XZbQ4kIeVTSXzevS47iv5qtfsiDYLV9LLXEmPKnFQAU7VLu5Zcr5an11OFS4MNrOr5v6cbRE-RCF0MD9E786XWBpmK1z7toQ1aEd1mm_bGYPgBlEoG_osc7xyMBzA7e9SzD2gVZyYkK0zfJdkK4sQHWQM2bp5noAdB2t7XptwjVsM5p9Vsf9-a0Uki0KQt9_CjrkkNpsKlbMnRbVjXIJzVlKmvnwi0W6pF75y8O-kSLubsMNTFO071LtfRKgJgQen4c3OX_yOKiCtWAkhz4Vd5hDtCy8JEPZK50hLNiCxWxvi0WWVSVLDrSXyHlI3ykQDUU4tHWqjWc3K9DENWUlgWxVNBrnUpx_n2iE2rcp3SUsQi1LIinScuKfNbhPBAA6E75Z8Bmr_n5quSUlqY3lfZ_pXELloKKp_eOmE-UP_CN44gH9geLIgOPKg4GuScAL0kf13kSh4GUQHCSV9HeY2Yx5UtGVbge8sL4icP93k3ELsEAeIHC4tgMh0B5IWmJSA/-Z7KiizPGSOHgXBBEIA_Ryb-AAD0bags/6) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/tyEjYvKhuDHBn4M_BGqbgYCVDmgRprZ8a1aF5QPbQ1RhkB-u_TLOtbTdJc4QwdhBFvj2BCWohHRtcwUNfJlRpTNv7WrQ4A3uX1nq97GNGsrBl481woT9QW981HA_okHrxwXO440vZY6xcgM7PsC3Ogbiq9PnCr8T9JdMgF-ldOMdlu-iBZ0nCTaVLMQlm_3CpT8ViszAWTzAoPREccYnUo9zHHQAPH7z1UmSYqrgORfgMxFraoi2hSNayzA-YQoMzCiFs3bqjDg9CqSlpOLuD80QiO51dwqvCydMc6JOWfDNmNAOtzsrNgSwN4kei-qwxcDtsLkowI9fIYPSSuF9uL7zZARFEKgrKxBc0HBfDYQ7LqxAo7WBZk7Jiolp1h80GrFA6p_rEE3HQ5N-enjOQ_QlOPK2GO-Y3lFtt61RKlJH4yVxG2QA3JxHcpLJyxitdKY8aHFOBVSomarU8AbHhOhOH1mWtXVuccChh6Q3-gsIXB2Yy-1lzlkDrJnehenoCeeF_fwOF6xoiq9Uw8Z76TbTdbdCfA/SrCK39sKcuQVKuxXh_bQvVRXT75RGOog/6) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/jx9-PBxT_2XelvoQAHfP6nR-7x8GwM5DfEJUAdmFvIcWoRy4p793jyjf-Yx-ivB5CPZDczYAyqXQtFUcvj84wqbtD9PU5HJ4IBRfD5QrdQnA-el8EGTBN3r_YbFocNElPpRojME22z4Jffby-PdDPHMthZwTWnr0yLwp7zbDE8IY3U5zqhP22b-ipadAe2y5hPupOI_e0mRM4SsJS0vmU5pHiImg5oWe88Vg1NHd5Etgjx8YvBz3KWNQC4YAf6r8I2QR2kKJxxulL3ZlXjfs957-lK2MQFIwZP05v27rubnhVuyxr1uAKxHvcnKaZztg-ZzsTFAA6jXcNt1faTgHdyn1wd0c0r4TLoKereRjHenzmNB-9nwA9Ur-EDN1aarOKjgQ0-8XNNe9JmbFkIgDF5EkbCUtwCBQXKGbiaHDwuh7ZdcFzXZn7oIxU2iLibjRXYILBYGKCSz0vnB814wf39eSvGw0pYqgqQ-1HZ5-K9F9EjiKMl10y4kyHRRe5ie7gcgJGnu2uvPz03dEjYf4Gr9_lw_liQ/33gof3g9ep2RAmYby58lLf7NrMhEndHc/6) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Standing Firm with Ukraine: A Call to Action
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Dear Friend,
Recent events have highlighted a troubling shift in our nation's foreign policy. President Trump's abrupt decision to halt U.S. aid to Ukraine, following a contentious Oval Office meeting with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, has sent shockwaves through the international community.
This move not only undermines Ukraine's struggle for sovereignty but also signals a retreat from America's longstanding commitment to global democracy. Senator Lindsey Graham, a staunch advocate for robust foreign policy, has cautioned that withdrawing support from Ukraine could lead to consequences "ten times worse than Afghanistan," potentially emboldening adversaries like Russia and China. I need your help.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/58574E4E5530646352503867654465386B716D5465577151486A4F4945597A35544B4B2B47705A467251505A665368766932344A31762F44734E50766141536A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-10%20at%2012.14.21%E2%80%AFPM.png]
As your candidate for Congress in Florida's 1st District, I cannot stand idly by while our nation's principles are compromised. My commitment to you includes:
🔷Advocating for Steadfast Support: Ensuring that the United States remains a reliable ally to nations defending their sovereignty and democratic values.
🔷Promoting Global Stability: Recognizing that America's security is intertwined with the stability of our allies and partners worldwide.
🔷Upholding Moral Leadership: Standing against authoritarian aggression and supporting those who fight for freedom and democracy.
Abandoning Ukraine in its hour of need not only dishonors their sacrifice but also jeopardizes global stability.
I urge you to stand with me in supporting policies that reflect America's true values. Together, we can ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope and a defender of democracy. Chip in $8 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]

Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/58574E4E5530646352503867654465386B716D5465577151486A4F4945597A35544B4B2B47705A467251505A665368766932344A31762F44734E50766141536A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-26%20at%208.43.55%E2%80%AFAM.png]
22 days separates us from a Congressional election that can change the course of our government. Let’s make it happen.
Thank you for your unwavering support.
Sincerely,
Gay Valimont
Candidate for Congress, FL-1

name: John Fetterman
subject: making it clear where i stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Now that Republicans have introduced a national abortion ban in the House, I want to make it clear where I stand.
#
Derek, it's John Fetterman.
Now that Republicans have introduced a national abortion ban in the House, I want to make it clear where I stand.
**I will *never* vote to restrict a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. That right is sacred and non-negotiable. Period.**
Apparently these guys don’t care that a majority of Americans supported _Roe._
They don’t care that access to safe abortion saves lives.
They don’t care that the right to choose what happens to your body + your future is a sacred, fundamental, HUMAN right.
Derek, make no mistake. Republicans dumped MILLION$ into PA last year, and will almost certainly keep doing that year after year, because they know this seat is critical to outlawing abortion nationwide.
**[I will *always* stand strong for the right to choose, but I’m counting on you to help me keep this seat 🔵. Can you kick in $5 today to support my work in the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250310?refcode=em20250310-9977&refcode2=9977_434096_FPUQ85&akid=9977%2E434096%2EFPUQ85)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250310?amount=5&refcode=em20250310-9977&refcode2=9977_434096_FPUQ85&akid=9977%2E434096%2EFPUQ85)**
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250310-9977-footer&t=1&refcode2=9977_434096_FPUQ85&akid=9977%2E434096%2EFPUQ85)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9977%2E434096%2EFPUQ85)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: RIOTS + REVIVALS | America + Ephesus | Acts 19
body:
Yesterday, God did extraordinary things at Sheridan.Church in Tulsa + OKC! We finished Acts 19, where the Apostle Paul ministers in Ephesus and RIOTS
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10949.1.858e1245ee082d0c9953ab8b3ac6e981) |
---
Yesterday, God did _extraordinary things_ at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10950.1.5d96766e4d4ae86c10b8604651a53c36) in Tulsa + OKC! We finished **Acts 19** , where the Apostle Paul ministers in Ephesus and [RIOTS + REVIVALS](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10951.1.4e2a66a2a8676cc9e1420e9a07ab54a9) break out. The culture of Ephesus is so similar to our culture in the West. Although the culture is corrupt that does not stop God from moving. Acts 19 gives us incredible insight of what we need in our nation today. In this message, I give the **4 Signs of REAL Revival** out of Acts 19. I believe this will _bless you_ and _encourage you_! Watch[RIOTS + REVIVALS](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10952.1.a4e9cb4d2b00c3d38cff1b662e0d1d50) here: [https://youtube.com/live/DtIwEiknXVo](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10953.1.d291d00623b1178ff531f03c9634d125) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church:** -Wednesday, April 9 @6:30pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1554718](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10954.1.0621e9519f35a67d5bd6513e0bfb71ea) -Thursday, May 8 @6:30pm: **Roger Stone** | _More Info TBA_ Please consider partnering w/[Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10955.1.c961efe91eede30ba9e838f9db80584e) by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10956.1.3f0f53613c258244d86bb500319ef84a) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

## Eric Trump Inside | Protesters Outside
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10965.1.67e20831f49e96331e510ff029e5e0ed)

This week, I sat down with [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10966.1.f372c7b216eb7ff7127c1f93e59e3819) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10967.1.590b5aa46fa90a82bb9275d5ca18a000) in Tulsa, OK for an _incredible conversation_ about a wide range of subjects from the **2024 Election** , **DOGE** and the **Great American Comeback** while protestors outside were not thrilled with a Trump speaking at a church... Watch [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10968.1.4e12053c31cd5b6b05c2664f23eb2812) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10969.1.cf5384305101d898daf98ed92eba6d91) here: [https://youtu.be/uH0zK20NJ18](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19666038.10970.1.4b578ba3086164098d5d43af2b32403c)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103600875/532653896/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20250310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzkyMDcwMzEtY2NmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mS9Tr0Pa-VNYGvRV3MnHSSpupwvZSXpkJPidJcYQhhY=)

The fight for the House majority is on, and Arizona is at the heart of it. We're just a few seats away from flipping control from **red** to **blue** , and the focus is on these three critical battleground districts: **AZ-01
AZ-02
AZ-06** To flip these districts and reclaim the House for Democrats, we need to mobilize every resource we have. **[Can we count on you to chip in $3 for these 3 key seats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103600876/532653897/-94917156?amount=3&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20250310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzkyMDcwMzEtY2NmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mS9Tr0Pa-VNYGvRV3MnHSSpupwvZSXpkJPidJcYQhhY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103600877/532653898/-94917156?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20250310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzkyMDcwMzEtY2NmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mS9Tr0Pa-VNYGvRV3MnHSSpupwvZSXpkJPidJcYQhhY=)**

[**Please respond before 11:59 PM on 03/10/2025.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60156?t=4&akid=22915%2E4449941%2E-dAJme)

[**Official Fight for Reform National Polling**]() [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60156?t=5&akid=22915%2E4449941%2E-dAJme) [**Do you think Donald Trump should be impeached? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60156?t=6&akid=22915%2E4449941%2E-dAJme) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60156?t=7&akid=22915%2E4449941%2E-dAJme)

Donald Trump was convicted on 34 felony offenses and has already been impeached twice before!

And now, he’s working every day to dismantle our Democracy by firing federal workers, ruining our international relations with our closest allies, and allowing unelected billionaires like Elon Musk to run amuck in our government.

You are 1 of 4 Democrats in your area selected to participate. Without your confirmation, our data will be incomplete. [**_Please, take 30 seconds to complete your poll before our 11:59 PM deadline. _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60156?t=10&akid=22915%2E4449941%2E-dAJme)

**From:** Mike Carey
**Subject:** It’s going to be a knife fight.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=333707faa3c64e2f8bb8f23f2172437c&_e=G8gOk4kJiFSxff4-IFSjhgNM0lraAFoahO4tm6fEa6EduQCKFD7mhhksFvyJqd3k7LzBKaqhZKJwv92dbLZTCTg-mbzYXfVpkKR4Vphnq3D46aezhQIbRAO7erNShatl5k9b-zOCeh_vhVkaeRZUxPUzBAMKDk1nNr_rHpgS7ZUoYrJnuZqYDJLn0cFoISaK0MgNNjn7svPEvRv-Ft2CCapuAxtBebM--2DOLDlDNMhgj3a2SSLzIi-xz-PFgLydoox1mrxv_KsKsEetNIMKXM9ye5mD1etSlT9Za2OJIwq4Hs2_C5AWKNJrJUqmLNDYTSVM3ILdO0_ESvil3lyPmXYVeC0bTqOayoLP0cZg4yuj5roPxZyqQZrLKBWJRXRF5vy8KYf_VcpJ-iIfDWyEHg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

The battle to keep our House Majority has already started, and in the words of the _Cook Political Report,_ it will be a **_“Knife Fight.”_**

We knew this would happen with such a slim Republican Majority in the House, but I didn’t expect it to be this bad. We currently have a two-seat majority, and the outlook isn't promising. This election will be critical.

_**Here are the quick stats:**_

**Total Toss-Ups: 18 seats

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I can vouch for Vivek 100%
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
So can the President. Let me explain:

|
---
| | |
Y'all -

I value your time so I'll keep this short and sweet:

_My friend, Vivek Ramaswamy, JUST launched his campaign for Ohio Governor. _

Look, he's the real deal. I have full faith and confidence in his conservative chops, tenacity, and partnership with President Trump when it comes to saving the country.

**I can vouch for him 100% - so can President Trump. That's why he endorsed him THE SAME DAY Vivek announced his candidacy.** **[That's why I'm respectfully asking you to become a Founding Donor to Vivek's campaign.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfulrqs9rli7c8dalp08qcck07pi8ne5vd4p4ego_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj69o34s5h2bs "That’s why I’m respectfully asking you to become a Founding Donor to Vivek’s campaign.") **
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3md2atps2pllcnipugdpbhhnfdjhokuaq05sg3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj69o34s5h2bs)
---
| | [**PLEASE DONATE TO VIVEK 'S CAMPAIGN ->**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3448lpj1l0e96spn7i6n52cmb4d5r7u1qut8110_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj69o34s5h2bs)
---
So there you have it:

I'm all in with Vivek running for office in his home state of Ohio. If you live in the Buckeye State, you're lucky - he's the best in the business.

But I want to be clear: you don't have to be an Ohioan to support his campaign. He will be a fighter for ALL OF US and the values we hold dear. He wants to be an example of strong MAGA governance that others can follow.

**[So, if you want to be a part of history, I IMPLORE YOU to pitch in and become a Founding Donor today.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8vhtp6ruins3iuor4ug259t0ptjoo5rsj14vah0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cdj69o34s5h2bs "So, if you want to be a part of history, I IMPLORE YOU to pitch in and become a Founding Donor today.")**

God bless you,
Marsha

**Marsha Blackburn**
U.S. Senator for Tennessee

---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat! Remember: We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. name: Rick Larsen
subject: Republicans want to line the wealthiest pockets by stealing your health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Half of the children born in Whatcom County last year were born into families who use Medicaid as their primary source of health care.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103603186/532657292/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM3YjVmZi1jZWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AkrYANCpZfCP9BgN0IYBjfoyQ2bFq3ikM3od1Y0Sahk=&emci=ec8ad8e8-ebfa-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3c37b5ff-cefd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Half of the children born in Whatcom County last year were born into families who use Medicaid as their primary source of health care.** Now, their health care is at risk because of the Republican Rip-Off. The Republican budget betrays the middle class, like those families in Whatcom County, by gutting services that help millions of families afford health care, put food on the table, and receive a quality education. **Instead of lowering the cost of everyday items for American families, they are focused on handing a $4.5 trillion tax cut to the richest Americans and wealthiest corporations.** **The Republican budget would devastate hard-working families in Northwest Washington.** Under the Republican budget plan, families in Washington's Second Congressional District would see cuts to health care and other essential services, including:
* 34,000 people who get coverage via the Affordable Care Act will see premiums increase by an average of $1,460/year
* 186,000 people will be at risk of losing health coverage through Medicaid, including more than 80,000 children and 18,000 seniors
* 93,000 people will be at risk of losing food benefits, making food more expensive or even out of reach

These are our friends and neighbors that are being negatively impacted by the Republican Rip-Off and their potential budget cuts.**I voted no on the Republican Rip-Off, and I will continue to fight against Republican efforts to drive up costs for middle-class families.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick
