name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I need your help.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103603256/532657479/-2002425095?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjczZmYyNC1jZmZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mMYud1tOEkiGyI1_cwmTZcLFb0sojtgsDwcsVXg3EU0=)
Peter,

It’s Hakeem Jeffries. My colleague Rep. Whitesides’ race in CA-27 has been named to the DCCC’s Frontline list. Frontline is the DCCC’s battle-tested program to provide Democratic Members of Congress from competitive seats the resources to run aggressive, forward-looking and people-centered campaigns.

[**This is a must-win race if we are going to win back the House in 2026. Can you chip in $10 right now to their re-election campaign and help flip the House?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103603257/532657480/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.10.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjczZmYyNC1jZmZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mMYud1tOEkiGyI1_cwmTZcLFb0sojtgsDwcsVXg3EU0=)

George is fighting to build an economy from the bottom up and the middle out — not the top down. It is critical that we support George to put an end to corruption and chaos. [**He can’t do it without your help. I’m asking you to give $10, or whatever you can today to support George.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103603258/532657481/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.10.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjczZmYyNC1jZmZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mMYud1tOEkiGyI1_cwmTZcLFb0sojtgsDwcsVXg3EU0=)

House Republicans and their billionaire donors are going to do whatever they can to stay in power. With your help, we can take back the majority, restore order in the People’s House and put a much needed check on the reckless Trump administration.

Keep the faith,
Hakeem

Dear Friend,

name: California Democratic Party
subject: Save the Date – CADEM May 2025 Convention in Anaheim!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
California Democrats,
When devastating wildfires swept through our communities, we joined together to rebuild. As the economic tides shifted, we held our ground as the world’s fifth largest economy. And even now, with Republicans controlling Washington DC, California Democrats continue to lead—not only a resistance—but a new way for California to move forward.
This is the California story—one of resilience and unwavering progress, even in the face of adversity. This is California Strong.
Join us as we celebrate this strength and chart our path forward at the 2025 California Democratic Party Convention in Anaheim from May 30 - June 1. Together, we'll elect new Party Officers and Regional Directors, welcome new delegates, and begin the hard work of organizing for 2026.
The road ahead starts now. Be a part of it!
cadem.org [cadem.org]
* Friday, May 30 - Sunday, June 1, 2025
* Location: Anaheim Hilton and Convention Center, Anaheim, CA
* Registration: Opens April 2025
Thank you,
California Democratic Party

California Democratic Party
1830 9th St
Sacramento, CA 95811
United States

name: Team Fair Shot
subject: At least 3️⃣ special elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
We don't have to wait for next November to make an impact in the House majority. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103606383/532663666/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjgxY2FhOC1kMmZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MoXNka5_QfV4K8oypCRMtiorF5l427DlNnn-2IKPqk4=)
---
Peter — We know things are chaotic right now, but there’s a silver lining we want to share with you: **We don't have to wait until next November to make an impact on the House majority.** At least _three_ special elections are slated to take place to fill vacancies in the House this year, but there’s a possibility that there could be more. These will be some of the first elections since Trump's win — and it's going to be a huge test of Democrats' strength. We need to show that Democrats are fired up and ready to fight back. It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/r2oFUJ2s38Cj0QFrgaEKGuHbbb5HN_88XYYS9TLeBE7vPZOvTp0T40eZ8NhDntO2Zz8s3JFS66H9zZR3Nz6sSBm-bZMxDtITvSDm1TTOOZnpQ3NppROS56vqpyqAlj5ygZ9dhEHQipX1fX2zXn7nl9XEIFN77lruI6BvXTRY3iyD5Ck8xzv8tHEQ68Y198Qtxk7fs6Eno7DWIlk5OiKcCzwKVAZsSeOjuW1NnE5jXucj8NHsblMzjQxEidpWwGMzaPj1aWLsifrGp6hshCTNwskSZE1kKJimitKUVbMNE8Sd7K3OX_jUn1fFce9Rcd_UsHzTK0qoGl8wq_nLpxIfoWXURczqUov4o5doV4xuuabPZpSG3a1w1DZeIneWuJ_wNp-7eFOquwuyZvycj3j9cqAELxvWMa3_P8vOoRpAmU66KzCrbhIJQlz1Ed9VSmb4MDVypXfa8UXDfam6s3eBS1Vmgp7w9umLnHtfSgv5jfc93LcAWQkOwxAT07WMPWhSXbNofD3qgf4VHwdQjtJu5JirOOjvQA/SKBnS44MNn8TtmF0QmoQrCvQ4kcnjuWK/6) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/b4yOcFUUNwZsswfUoLReua8HfgpscFGhpOC72Cno_zeQjBABip2C9voycAOvqU-m8dvdnLhCS4_tnPyi6K0vHmwGInEnbC_uIqHOHxmQe8hZshSkPAnaL__tnbD0vvh3YElxLGgh0p78R7jcS5Kn9glkznhqikUA90QJkhbpKlvQpFd0dFWxEnw6hbIlMpdHEZy_fE5aslm8bKmrAb6TNeL3rk4Xigo26vkgwd5Q9nLK6rOb1NZddj2n8Fds8Bzk0Kv-JLAl0lfqbyQhSJy-yxazeL1HdopMgbn6M4WSNXS3mUFPMYsnHSwDgeZ9FU-zdk5UstyDT8iosabkyf5G_XHfILwhRZ4uWGNRzxH_s9LkR885PInufZCbEv08vQSe29ISYHQARtmjXKwFHLivrlXU9Li3nQtVxZbeiTGtOIwrH2wSfFPCvOchTVeGqriJ2dRdcuXgTSIio0zcwA8KgWQazi02TE6ORjtMCaTewMLrNRnN0PEBzpACcN158fUygkJv2DvsnB6CXIeWuHVZACRBhAYEOA/_zMjNiCjqbn7NOKax6poF3bfwh7f4sQi/6) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

subject: Elon Musk’s hostile takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
We need to keep our state out of the hands of right-wing oligarchs.

Hi, it’s Ben Wikler, Chair of the Wisconsin Democrats. I know how we’ve all been feeling lately – like there’s no check on what Donald Trump and Elon Musk are doing to our country. Like MAGA is all-powerful. If you want to know where Trump and Musk’s real weakness lies, all you have to do is follow the money. **Elon Musk has already dropped _MILLIONS_ of dollars to bankroll Brad Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign here in Wisconsin**, because Musk and Trump know that Wisconsin’s highest court stands as a check on their lawless coup – and they know that extremist Republican Brad Schimel will be nothing but a rubber-stamp on their assault on constitutional checks and balances. **That’s why we’re launching The People v. clean_body: We need to keep our state out of the hands of right-wing oligarchs. Hi, it’s Ben Wikler, Chair of the Wisconsin Democrats. I know how we’ve all been feeling lately – like there’s no check on what Donald Trump and Elon Musk are doing to our country. Like MAGA is all-powerful. If you want to know where Trump and Musk’s real weakness lies, all you have to do is follow the money. Elon Musk has already dropped MILLIONS of dollars to bankroll Brad Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign here in Wisconsin, because Musk and Trump know that Wisconsin’s highest court stands as a check on their lawless coup – and they know that extremist Republican Brad Schimel will be nothing but a rubber-stamp on their assault on constitutional checks and balances. That’s why we’re launching The People v. Musk – our official push to spread awareness about Musk’s hostile takeover of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and raise enough grassroots funding to fight back against his massive ad buys. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Elon Musk and Donald Trump want a MAGA Supreme Court to ban abortion with no exceptions for rape or incest; to overturn elections when they don’t like the results; and to suppress voters that don’t kiss their ring. But we’re not going to let them buy this election. body:
Right-wing billionaires are using their fortunes to bankroll extreme Republicans and fund their self-serving agendas in the states. But here’s the good news: | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$4,000,000.** That’s how much PACs tied to right-wing billionaire Elon Musk have dumped into Wisconsin’s all-important state Supreme Court race. **Let’s put that into perspective:**
* A **$4,000,000** investment could buy **over half a million orders of Culver’s Cheese Curds.**
* A **$4,000,000** investment could buy **444,938 6-packs of Spotted Cow beer.**
* **$4,000,000** is the total of **571,428 donations of $7 to the DLCC** and our movement to elect state Dems.

[One $7 donation from you, paired with thousands will ensure our state Democrats across the country can continue competing against GOP mega-donors like Elon Musk. That’s how much PACs tied to right-wing billionaire Elon Musk have dumped into Wisconsin’s all-important state Supreme Court race. Let’s put that into perspective: A $4,000,000 investment could buy over half a million orders of Culver’s Cheese Curds. A $4,000,000 investment could buy 444,938 6-packs of Spotted Cow beer. $4,000,000 is the total of 571,428 donations of $7 to the DLCC and our movement to elect state Dems. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | $4,000,000 is a drop in the bucket for a billionaire like Elon Musk. name: Tim Kaine
subject: Concrete ways to push back against the Trump Administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends,
I’ve shared with you details on the five-part Democratic strategy to push back against the lawless Trump Administration — Courts, Congress, States, Elections, and Activism.
Today, I want to offer a few concrete ways YOU can be a part of that strategy with your activism.
1. Join existing groups who are coordinating grassroots actions to fight back .

A few I recommend are Indivisible [https://indivisible.org/take-action-now] , ACLU [https://www.aclu.org/] , NAACP [https://naacp.org/take-action] , Planned Parenthood [https://www.plannedparenthoodaction.org/act] , and Human Rights Campaign [https://www.hrc.org/get-involved/take-action] , but there are many groups that have been on the ground for years building up their strategies and resources — getting connected with them is a great place to start if you’re not sure what steps to take.

2. Reach out directly to members of Congress by phone at (202) 224-3121.

Call your representatives (look them up here [https://www.congress.gov/members/find-your-member] ), and urge them to oppose reckless measures from the Trump Administration. Right now, it’s particularly important to voice your concerns about the GOP budget, which lays the foundation for $4.5 trillion in tax cuts to the wealthy at the expense of programs like Medicaid and SNAP.

These calls don’t have to be long (or intimidating!) — just start by saying where you’re from, and then explain briefly why you oppose the GOP budget measures that direct major spending cuts to critical programs in order to fund tax cuts.

While it’s helpful to hear from constituents who agree with our Democratic pushback, what’s even more important right now is making sure congressional Republicans feel the very real strong public opposition to their proposals . If you or anyone you know lives in a Republican district or a state with a Republican senator, calling them is very meaningful. Please encourage others to join you!

3. Use your wallet to send a message.

Boycotts and economic pressure have long been powerful tools in political movements — from the Montgomery Bus Boycott during the civil rights movement to modern efforts that target corporations funding extremist policies. Where and how you spend your money matters.

If a company is backing anti-democratic efforts, consider taking your business elsewhere. Many groups like Accountable.US [https://accountable.us/] and OpenSecrets [https://www.opensecrets.org/] track corporate political spending, so you can make informed choices.

4. Share fact-checking information and updates about Democratic actions online.

Our online communities can be just as influential as those off-line, and a great way to push back against misinformation and misleading GOP messaging is to share factual updates on your own social media networks. The DNC’s FactPost News account [https://www.facebook.com/factpost] is a good place to start, and news organizations like NPR and the AP regularly share fact checking stories as well. Your own friends and family are often more likely to be influenced by you than by an advertisement or politician, so using your voice in your network is a big deal.

5. Donate what you can to support the elections happening this year .

In less than a month, Wisconsin will hold an election for their state Supreme Court that will determine the bench’s balance of power — and Elon Musk has already gotten involved, pouring millions of dollars in to support the Republican candidate. Your donations can make a real impact in the final weeks of this race, so consider chipping in to the Wisconsin Democratic Party’s efforts right here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wisdems2025] .

And of course, Virginia has our own critical elections coming up in November (less than eight months away!). We have the chance to flip all three statewide offices blue, electing a Democratic governor and making a clear statement of rejection to the national GOP and Donald Trump. My Common Ground PAC will be laser-focused on supporting our great VA Democrats, so if you can pitch in to support our work, I would be grateful! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
I’ll continue to share updates about what I’m doing in the Senate to advocate for our values, and what Democrats are doing across the board to save our country and our democracy.
I’m incredibly grateful for this team’s continued support of this work, and your dedication to standing up for our shared beliefs. I still believe in the greatness of our nation, and that we can move forward by working together.
Thanks for reading,
Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/P5FfEbyeIEejNQSsVSzanQ2?unsubscribedata=8EPDqSzIS3swqrwojXd2UJwkkX%2BHqfutA3rx7sfXRtd%2Blxda7RXkB4tjuE4YgHZROfK60U8HFbSr9CfA31cKYozz9Y9S%2Fp1VIbCYb6btwSTDDBYxVg%2BW1cA077P7E1DFU065iSvovTpdfel39xwK2jXV%2FbHlZypRZQebzQPQYG0WtpYLjC4WCgBX%2Fy%2BmfcD04cix6%2Bu6t0OcdbkdAGcGpI2EZiIHHwD2UHlpXUzeJdS%2Bo5K2XtQqQb3AzRbnzmV78zBbSpDjGEMgXL74xZC%2BeisgKSaJj98LoH0VTeuG7V8cUpXx4rmNUqjPF4GgURDj5Oj517eCKuWDItHqZdezxkn8QjGhIu58KZLOfn6c6XtocYW4YXhcas%2Bn6evXkOB2PeW4jP1nVGB0lXcaH5mVjYPL%2BiaiRRg%2B08MKDIKcjEw%3D .

[](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=2a89b0d142&e=94c8429215)
| | | | | Friend,I am John Goodman—a father, a veteran, and a **lifelong proud Illinoisan**. I enlisted in the U.S. Air Force 27 years ago because I believed in America's potential. I fought alongside brave men and women who always had each other’s backs.But today, I see an America I barely recognize. Our rights are under attack. Our children are being failed. Our cities are unsafe. Our values are being erased. And for me, it’s more than politics— _**it’s personal**_.**I lost my son to the woke left. 💔** He struggled with mental health and turned to the system for help. Instead of receiving the care he truly needed, he was pushed into a life-changing decision—encouraged, without consideration, to transition. Feeling confused and vulnerable, he was lured into a homeless shelter offering free transition services. And just like that, my son was gone._**This madness has to stop.**_
That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate—to fight for the next generation, to protect our families, and to put an end to this insanity. My mission is clear: stand up for veterans, restore justice and fairness, strengthen community safety, and ensure every Illinoisan has the opportunity to thrive. I’m not just running—I’m ready to serve again, fighting for a stronger, more prosperous Illinois.We The People deserve better than Dick Durbin. We deserve someone who is ready to fight for the people of Illinois. Someone who isn't looking to be a lifetime career politician (Dick Durbin has been serving in the Federal Government since I was 2). I will sign the Term Limits Pledge. I will fight for tax breaks, and fiscal responsibility with balancing the Federal budget. I will fight to get the government's nose out of our personal business. I will fight for small businesses. I will fight to protect our children and our veterans.

But I can’t do it without **YOUR** support![_**With your donation today,**_](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=baa292284d&e=94c8429215)_**you can make a difference, and end the era of woke left extremism,**_[_****_](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=e5e3f2c050&e=94c8429215)[_**I can’t wait to have you join me in this fight.**_](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=8804abde64&e=94c8429215)
I won’t sit by and watch the next generation inherit a broken America. I want to lead them toward the Golden Age of America. With your support, we can win this race—for Illinois and for America._For America,__John Goodman_ _Republican Candidate for US Senate serving Illinois_
---

subject: Bernie strongly disagrees with James Carville

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1011&refcode=email-20250310_v&akid=7823%2E5885482%2EWE9m-9 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — while
Trump and Elon Musk turn our country into an Authoritarian Oligarchy,
famous Democratic strategist James Carville is literally advising that
“Democrats should roll over and play dead” and simply let the GOP
“crumble.”

Bernie STRONGLY disagrees.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22374?t=1060&akid=7823%2E5885482%2EWE9m-9 ][IMG]

Robert Reich echoed Bernie’s call for action as Trump’s agenda causes real
harm in real time. “Many of you ask me: Where’s the Democratic Party? I
wish I had a good answer. At a time when America needs a strong, bold,
courageous opposition, the Democrats’ silence is deafening,” he said.

They’re right. Democrats have been rolling over and playing dead too long.
And now we’re staring down Trump’s plan to cut $880 billion in Medicaid to
help fund a $4.5 trillion tax break to the ultra wealthy. Social Security,
the Department of Education, our most vulnerable and our environment are
all at risk. Each of us are being impacted, so Democrats sitting on the
sidelines until election time is UNACCEPTABLE.

That’s why Bernie is rallying folks across the country on his Fighting
Oligarchy Tour and Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team of 57,000+
volunteers are mobilizing to protect critical government services —
including Medicaid and Social Security.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1057&express_lane=true&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250310nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7823%2E5885482%2EWE9m-9 ]Will you donate right now to join Our Revolution and Bernie in our fight
to protect the American people from Trump and Musk’s dangerous agenda?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250310nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7823%2E5885482%2EWE9m-9 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250310nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7823%2E5885482%2EWE9m-9 ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250310nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7823%2E5885482%2EWE9m-9 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250310nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7823%2E5885482%2EWE9m-9 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Despite all of the public’s pushback against Trump and Congressional
Republicans, Democrats are still meeting with Big Tech oligarchs, begging
for money to fund focus groups and ‘message testing.’ It’s not a mystery,
Bernie has been coming directly to we the people for YEARS now and
amplifying our voice — NOT THE 1%.

It’s why thousands have rallied with Bernie in Wisconsin, Michigan, Iowa,
and Nebraska in the last few weeks. And it’s why he founded Our Revolution
— to empower each of us to stand up to the Oligarchs and make our
government and economy work for us. Rather than playing dead or working
deals with the donor class, Democrats need to be actively connecting with
the real people of this country and joining in our genuine effort to make
real our democracy.

To stop the runaway train of Trump’s Authoritarian Capitalism, it will
take a massive, organized Grassroots Army and the resources we need to
protect the working class. We need to keep all Democrats in check and flip
only two (2!) Republicans to block the worst of Trump’s agenda. We are not
powerless in this moment, and we are more powerful together.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1054&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250310nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7823%2E5885482%2EWE9m-9 ]Will you chip in a donation today to take the fight to Trump and the
Oligarchs? Our movement is the True Opposition that can stop Trump 2.0
from cutting Medicaid, Social Security, and other essential services.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

subject: Did you see our survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39512%2E3422442%2EXS1JNZ)
Hey Derek, did you see the survey we sent you last week?
Katie Porter’s PAC, Truth to Power, wants to hear what your priorities are as we gear up for 2026. **[Will you take a moment to complete our short survey?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20250310?source=em20250310-39512&akid=39512%2E3422442%2EXS1JNZ)**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Truth to Power [info@katieporter.com]
To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
Date: Sat, Mar 8, 2025
Subject: [Survey] Help us set our priorities!_
Derek,
Katie Porter wants to know what’s on your mind as we work to support the next generation of leaders. **[Can you take our short issues survey to share your thoughts with us?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20250310?source=em20250310-39512&akid=39512%2E3422442%2EXS1JNZ)**
Unlike many in Washington, Truth to Power is committed to supporting candidates who _actually_ listen to what the American people need–not what special interests want. We rely on surveys like this to help set our priorities.
**[So please, will you take a moment to complete this brief survey as we lay the groundwork for 2026? Your answers will help us strengthen our movement across the country.](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20250310?source=em20250310-39512&akid=39512%2E3422442%2EXS1JNZ)**
[Take the Survey](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20250310?source=em20250310-39512&akid=39512%2E3422442%2EXS1JNZ)
Thank you for your time,
Team Truth to Power

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250310-39512&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39512_3422442_XS1JNZ&akid=39512%2E3422442%2EXS1JNZ)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39512%2E3422442%2EXS1JNZ).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

clean_body: | | | | | | Trump’s Plan To Avoid The Elites Raid On Your 401(k) Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again. But don’t think for a second that the Dems on the inside will go down without a fight. Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future. They use these tactics to enrich themselves while everyday Americans watch their retirement accounts slowly erode under market volatility. The constant volatility benefits them, but it’s draining the hard-earned money in your retirement accounts. Whether it’s a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension, your post retirement future could be in serious danger if you are not aware of the options you have to protect your wealth from their game. The good news is, Trump is fighting for you! Thanks to a crucial IRS loophole that President Trump kept open, you can transfer your funds tax-free and penalty-free to a safer, more reliable option that isn’t tied to the manipulated stock market. Don’t wait until it’s too late. Dems in the Senate and the House could make moves to close this loophole at any time, and once it’s gone, you’ll be back at the mercy of a rigged system. ** secure your future before the deep state strikes again with another wave of orchestrated volatility. | | | AMERICAN HARTFORD GOLD GROUP 11755 Wilshire Blvd, 11th Floor Los Angeles, CA 90025

clean_body: | Team — This is big news and we had to make sure you heard it: Jason has been named the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s (DCCC) Recruitment Chair and will be helping to lead Democrats’ strategy to take back the House in 2026. 👏 We need your support to begin this work on the right foot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jason Crow and the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This team helped us flip this seat in 2018, defeat a Republican incumbent who’d been bought out by the NRA and other special interests, and helped to deliver a Democratic House majority. It’s clear that Republicans are still beholden to the MAGA agenda. Whether they’re gutting Medicaid and Head Start programs or allowing Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire, unfettered access to Americans’ data, Republicans are putting the interests of an elite few ahead of the American people. In his new role, Jason will find the next generation of leaders looking to represent their communities. Supporting a new generation of energizing and diverse leaders for the Democratic Party will help us build the representative government we deserve. Republicans have a historically narrow majority — and building a strong foundation will help us support critical races nationwide, take back the House, and give us the coalition we need to fight back against Donald Trump’s extreme MAGA agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jason Crow and the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support. — Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
It's time for merit to make a comeback.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c23695dbb06a4dd0933578ae999359e4&_e=rIIFVMe8Uu3yjKiTu-WdQewhfbMZsfSwO2z9Q56_QxQfPLIQAcX9--rqgwPwBWkXYKIxkJspIDtIuP8gLq9IYf4E_wD_y4w9swM9JL_VSeZMJs6dzE8P7XNECvy5SzEjuvXyrFq2HG0kVCW8aEEBd5wl50S3GkMopJhljKgCDTrt7XqpiZYcXSKpuzT8XpeE0D1Dq6fFtWDvKWpMb06o0dNbZCWTuGnQA4Xe9DrNZ1-c-R7W1G7bH7OCS_Qb2cTCd0THDKWKj_8tiPpr5DJ8ge12IoMjDQ0nmA5XrzoQ2_7F5QxD8dfyF2P1XNmQNw8j_w-nKoBFm5NjOGpqBap6P9Ixass7soLyku73TQ9fXL5-rIWLPPlwiPHP9o1PCqku)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c23695dbb06a4dd0933578ae999359e4&_e=rIIFVMe8Uu3yjKiTu-WdQewhfbMZsfSwO2z9Q56_QxQfPLIQAcX9--rqgwPwBWkXYKIxkJspIDtIuP8gLq9IYf4E_wD_y4w9swM9JL_VSeZMJs6dzE8P7XNECvy5SzEjuvXyrFq2HG0kVCW8aEEBd5wl50S3GkMopJhljKgCDTrt7XqpiZYcXSKpuzT8XpeE0D1Dq6fFtWDvKWpMb06o0dNbZCWTuGnQA4Xe9DrNZ1-KTZzkAo8HKLA3OD7nAXt9xsSYNd8hn-gYN7GdzXjmOckQWDdivhC55lF60Z_X6cypYGbXlisB1uvcYdtxVFF3Ndwir5fGDFkCEPO81hNKdcK1bLOVD49jR2NIfo965785wBwHCY4qt0vbVgvn8B4V).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c23695dbb06a4dd0933578ae999359e4&_e=rIIFVMe8Uu3yjKiTu-WdQewhfbMZsfSwO2z9Q56_QxQfPLIQAcX9--rqgwPwBWkXYKIxkJspIDtIuP8gLq9IYf4E_wD_y4w9swM9JL_VSeZMJs6dzE8P7XNECvy5SzEjuvXyrFq2HG0kVCW8aEEBd5wl50S3GkMopJhljKgCDTrt7XqpiZYcXSKpuzT8XpeE0D1Dq6fFtWDvKWpMb06o0dNbZCWTuGnQA4Xe9DrNZ18VNA6BR37rbqiiCRpiaAAbrxJnPQiphjqxJRQ3ryxyA0sryCGoeFCaFu0xrA9jDQhPq6cCXiEtQJOcxNZO1T2JgAbb1c91kIb5fupTvXYVlYHoq-uBAVn-2_Dn2zdaME2gwm9NoxDUhHVkr6W0c4HM)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c23695dbb06a4dd0933578ae999359e4&_e=rIIFVMe8Uu3yjKiTu-WdQewhfbMZsfSwO2z9Q56_QxQfPLIQAcX9--rqgwPwBWkXYKIxkJspIDtIuP8gLq9IYf4E_wD_y4w9swM9JL_VSeZMJs6dzE8P7XNECvy5SzEjuvXyrFq2HG0kVCW8aEEBd5wl50S3GkMopJhljKgCDTrt7XqpiZYcXSKpuzT8XpeE0D1Dq6fFtWDvKWpMb06o0dNbZCWTuGnQA4Xe9DrNZ18ChRpKIXpJfYJaCcHLtKCSvU-K-9o5ukDzhPB0EoMT1S43rc4iwiBRocbsJLnW7urM8jRSiKHhnQ2OC7LFsBL0Ywm16T_gc79DEMHAnNCGc3T23GqjWdLRQ9aWTiINTrBl1TMox4wmIWUI5G1Me4yF)

Thank you!
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=c23695dbb06a4dd0933578ae999359e4&_t=jfcCb_R6Qe4aoUpHsa3xVrtll5iRVTa-LMDWAK9cacQPHq7JohW-fDhdw4qmVVg1VIhV35r1cGhArJNx9L4Zvsxo_MpuKTSsqP76HtgcFj7_S7IB6qI0h4ivM5RrSELA)

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: We Hear You Loud and Clear – Time to Fight for 2026!
body:
We appreciate everyone who took time to fill out the survey, now we can take this info and use it for the fight towards a BIG win in the midterms.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wqheb-vixczu-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **_We Hear You Loud and Clear_**
---
| | | | Dear friend, Last week we sent out a survey to touch base with our followers and see what matters most to them. We were delighted with the amount of people who took time to fill out the survey, and we learned a lot about where our people stand on the state of politics today, We’ve heard your concerns, and we’re ready to take action. As we approach the 2026 midterms, your top priorities are clear: protecting Social Security and Medicare from GOP cuts, safeguarding democracy by defending election integrity and the Supreme Court, addressing the economy to help working families, securing reproductive rights, and expanding healthcare access while blocking GOP rollbacks. The actions of Republican politicians are more concerning than ever. You’ve overwhelmingly told us that cutting Medicare and Social Security must stop. National abortion and IVF bans must be blocked, and the Affordable Care Act must be protected from repeal. The rise of far-right justices in the Supreme Court is a real threat, and we must stop them from solidifying their control. Looking ahead to the 2026 midterms, voters are energized to flip red seats blue. There’s also a strong demand for fresh leadership, with many calling for bold, progressive voices to lead the way. It’s clear—voters don’t just want to defend the status quo; they want a new, evolving Democratic Party that fights for the issues that matter most. [**_We need your help to make this vision a reality. Donate to support campaigns that will flip seats and build momentum for the future. Share our message on social media and volunteer for phone banking, canvassing, and more. The fight for 2026 starts now—let’s win this together._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wqheb-vixczv-kyd76rh2/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---
| [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wqheb-vixczw-kyd76rh3/)
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wqheb-vixczx-kyd76rh4/)
---
| [Chip in $100](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wqheb-vixczy-kyd76rh5/)
---
| [RUSH $250](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wqheb-vixczz-kyd76rh6/)
---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2wqheb--15aab-kyd76rh9&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2wqheb--15aab-kyd76rh9&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: tell me your favorite small business!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Team,

Trump’s chaos goes too far and threatens the success of the people and businesses that are trying to thrive here. As Governor, I’ll make sure Jersey families and small businesses get the support they deserve.

We’re traveling around Jersey on a “Stop the Chaos” tour – which means a lot of time on the road. I’m always looking for the best places to visit. Please, take a couple of minutes to tell me about your favorite small business here in Jersey. [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/jg-smallbusiness-2025]

CLICK HERE TO TELL ME NOW [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/jg-smallbusiness-2025]

With Jersey being the Diner Capital of the world, we know the value of small businesses. From these diners to other restaurants, shops, and more, small businesses make Jersey special.

I want to make sure to visit all the best places across our state, but I need your help to make our list! [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/jg-smallbusiness-2025]

Thanks for taking a minute to share, I hope to see you out there soon!

Thanks,

Josh
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. Last Saturday night the United States entered a new level of oppression, and if we do not all act now to oppose it, then free speech is officially dead, fascism has officially taken hold, and each of us who oppose Trump's fascism are absolutely next. **Let 's Address This.**
**More than 123,000 activists have subscribed to** _**Let 's Address This.** _**We are doing everything in our power to stave off fascism in the United States. Subscribe and join us.**

## Summary of Trump's Fascist Acts
Last Saturday night Donald Trump committed the following fascist acts:
* Sent ICE to illegally detain a legal U.S. resident without a warrant or charge because he peacefully protested the U.S. government's policies.
* Initially tried to arrest the resident's U.S. citizen wife, who is eight months pregnant with their child.
* Abducted that legal resident to an undisclosed location, and is refusing to share with his family or his lawyer where he's being detained, why he's being detained, and on what criminal charges or even probable cause he's being detained.

We would expect such injustice from a dictatorship, but instead, this is what Donald Trump is currently doing to U.S. green card holder Mahmoud Khalil and his U.S. citizen wife.
## ICE is Officially Trump's Gestapo
If ever there were any doubt as to the role ICE would serve and has served under Trump's regime, let those doubts now vanish. ICE is Trump's Secret State Police, i..e Gestapo. Period. The Gestapo, of course, were Hitler's secret Nazi police that abducted dissenters and stifled opposition with threats, force, and torture. With Saturday night's secret ICE raid on the campus of Columbia University to arrest Mahmoud Khalil, it is clear Trump plans to use ICE how Hitler used the Secret State Police. Here's what happened.
Khalil is a graduate of Columbia, is a documented U.S. green card holder, is married to a U.S. citizen, and has no criminal record whatsoever.
But he had one fatal "flaw."
Khalil dared exercise his Constitutionally protected freedom of speech. Khalil was a lead organizer in the peaceful protests at Columbia University to oppose the U.S. Government's decision to continue to fund Netanyahu as he committed his well documented war crimes against Palestinians. ICE first claimed Khalil's visa was being revoked. Once informed that Khalil is here on a green card and is married to a U.S. Citizen, ICE changed its story and stated that his green card is being revoked. But that is not a decision or authority within the purview of ICE or the U.S. State Department. That is only a decision an immigration judge can make, and only after the government procures a judicial warrant, makes a legal arrest, files applicable charges, tries a person in a criminal proceeding, convicts them in that proceeding, and the accused exhausts all appeals.
None of that happened here. Not one bit of it.
Far from the due process our Constitution affords every person--citizen or not--the Trump regime executed a de facto autocratic move to stifle dissent and disappear a dissenter. And now, given that neither Khalil's wife, nor any other member of his family, nor his lawyer know where he is, and given that Khalil has received no due process of his Constitutionally protected rights, it is absolutely correct to state that the Trump regime's denial of these basic human rights amounts to torture. Khalil's lawyer Amy Greer released the following statement:
> Amy E. Greer is an associate at Dratel & Lewis and issues this statement:
> Last night ICE agents wrongfully arrested Mahmoud Khalil, claiming his student visa was revoked - even though Mahmoud is legal permanent resident (green card) and not in the U.S. on a student visa. Confronted with that fact, the ICE agents detained him anyway. Overnight we filed a habeas corpus petition on Mahmoud's behalf challenging the validity of his arrest and detention. Currently we do not know Mahmoud's precise whereabouts.
> Initially we were informed this morning that he had been transferred to an ICE facility in Elizabeth, New Jersey. However, when his wife - a U.S. citizen who is eight months' pregnant and was threatened with arrest as well by the ICE agents last night - tried to visit him there today, she was told he is not detained there. We have subsequently received reports that Mahmoud may be transferred as far away as Louisiana. We will vigorously be pursuing Mahmoud's rights in court, and will continue our efforts to right this terrible and inexcusable - and calculated - wrong committed against him.
> ICE's arrest and detention of Mahmoud follows the U.S. government's open repression of student activism and political speech, specifically targeting students at Columbia University for criticism of Israel's assault on Gaza. The U.S. government has made clear that they will use immigration enforcement as a tool to suppress that speech. Many individuals and organizations have expressed support for Mahmoud and outrage at the government's conduct, and have offered their assistance in the legal proceedings. Mahmoud greatly appreciates all of that support, as do we.
Again, ICE is Trump's Gestapo, and we shouldn't even try to pretend otherwise.
The Trump regime, which prides itself on free speech, is outraged that Khalil used his free speech to protest genocide. Columbia University, which prides itself on diversity of thought, welcomed alt-right Nazis to speak on campus in 2017, yet has now expelled students who spoke out against Israel's assault on Gaza.
The hypocrisy is stark as it is dangerous. But it begs an even deeper question that no one in corporate media has yet answered.

## Did Columbia Collaborate With Trump to Abduct Khalil?
A Columbia University spokesman confirmed that ICE does not have authority to enter campus without a judicial warrant, but then refused to answer whether ICE provided a warrant before illegally entering and abducting Khalil. That means only one of two possible options exist. Either:
* Columbia University is working in secret collusion with the Trump regime, or
* The Trump regime is further violating the law by illegally entering Columbia University without permission.

If the former is true, it would be an unprecedented betrayal of Khalil's privacy, because it would have meant that the University somehow notified ICE of Khalil's location and address and helped coordinate the raid. Such an act should put every Columbia student, faculty, and staff on notice, that their University is colluding with a fascist regime out to abduct anyone who questions its authority. And it should mean the courts should order Khalil's immediate release. If the latter is true, it would mean the Trump regime has no regard for our Constitution, and the courts should strike them down immediately, and still order Khalil's immediate release.
And notwithstanding any potential collaboration, the Trump regime just cancelled $400M in grants and contracts to Columbia University over antisemitism allegations--not because Columbia allowed alt right Nazis to speak on campus, but because Columbia didn't strongly enough condemn and expel pro Palestine speakers on campus. This is what white supremacy in 2025 America looks like. Indeed, what actually is antisemitic is ignoring the many Jewish voices who--alongside Palestinians--loudly and unapologetically protested the genocide in Gaza. What actually is antisemitic is ignoring the dozens of Jewish and Palestinian students [who suffered a chemical attack at the hands of pro-Israel counterprotestors](https://substack.com/redirect/0ad51059-5d51-40bc-952f-41c13c25dc17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It is no surprise, therefore, that Jewish Americans are standing in solidarity with Khalil and demanding his release. Bend the Arc: Jewish Action stated:
> Columbia student and New Yorker, Mahmoud Khalil - who was targeted and detained for constitutionally protected speech - should be home with his 8 months pregnant wife today. Not missing in ICE detention, unreachable by his lawyers. The White House's authoritarian actions are being falsely done in our name as Jews, by a President and politicians who actively use antisemitism and do not speak for Jews.
Indeed, if condemnations of genocide make you feel personally attacked, then you're telling on yourself. The only way out of this injustice is unity against fascism.
**If you 're finding value in this article and call for justice, please join our efforts as a free or paid subscriber.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..dA1VAObvR-alaLdRxkLPAA21vBgTGmc1pHbbDs-AjBQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=158742616)
## We Must Stand United Against This Fascism
The petition to release Khalil has already exceeded 1 million signatures--please take a moment to sign it, linked at the bottom of this article (and if you are not a U.S. Citizen please do not use your real name for your own safety). Likewise, [contact your member of Congress via phone or email](https://substack.com/redirect/89697045-da71-49b9-9646-2f539aeb1be8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and pressure them to demand Khalil's immediate release. Here is a sample email to send and script to follow:

**Sample Email

Subject:** Urgent: Condemn the Arrest of Mahmoud Khalil & Demand His Release

Dear [Representative/Senator] [Last Name],

I am writing to urge you to publicly condemn the Trump regime's unjust arrest of Mahmoud Khalil and demand his immediate release. This is a blatant violation of human rights and due process, and silence from our elected officials is unacceptable.

The Trump administration's crackdown on dissent is accelerating, and the arrest of Mahmoud Khalil is yet another chilling example of authoritarian overreach. If we fail to speak out now, this sets a dangerous precedent for further abuses of power. As your constituent, I need to know where you stand.

I urge you to take immediate action by:
✅ Issuing a public statement condemning Khalil's arrest
✅ Calling on the Trump administration to release him immediately
✅ Demanding transparency and oversight to prevent further political targeting

I will be following up to see what action you take. Thank you for your time, and I look forward to your response.

Sincerely,

[Your Name][Your Address][Your Email]
* * *

**Phone Script** Hello, my name is [Your Name], and I am a constituent from [Your City/Zip Code]. I am calling to urge [Representative/Senator] [Last Name] to publicly condemn the Trump administration's arrest of Mahmoud Khalil and demand his immediate release. This is a clear violation of human rights and an alarming sign of growing authoritarianism.

Will [Representative/Senator] [Last Name] issue a public statement condemning this unlawful arrest and take action to ensure Khalil's immediate release? Silence is not an option. We need bold leadership now more than ever.

Thank you, and I look forward to your response.
* * *
Make no mistake, if we do not loudly condemn and stop this injustice against Khalil now, it will get far worse, and each of us will be next. Think about the timeline preceding this point:
* What began as demonization of asylum seekers
* Then advanced to a ban on asylum altogether
* Then advanced to mass round ups of immigrants, documented and undocumented,
* Then advanced to codifying mass round ups and mass deportations without due process via the Laken Riley Act
* Then advanced to locking up immigrants in a 30,000 person concentration camp in Cuba
* And is now advancing to secret police abducting legal US residents in the middle of the night to oppress speech they don't like--all without a warrant, without charge, and without any indication where he's being held and under what conditions.

This is how autocrats and dictators seize illegal power. This is how fascism takes at hold, slowly at first, and then all at once. This is not supposed to happen in a democratic republic like the United States, where the Constitution, separation of powers, and due process of law are supposed to matter--yet here we are. And anyone who thinks Trump will arbitrarily stop here on his own is sorely mistaken.
My thoughts are not only with Mahmoud Khalil, but also with his wife and their child expected in just a few weeks. The trauma she is facing is absolutely impacting their child, and the risks to her and her yet unborn child's health cannot be overstated.
I've already written [at length at the Nazi style anti-immigrant strategy Donald Trump has enacted](https://substack.com/redirect/fc597bc1-1c64-4dc2-865c-07bb4d8355f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the steps we can take to counter his fascism. That guidance still applies now so feel free to re-read that piece. It is of paramount importance we stand united, left and right, to demand justice and due process of law. If Khalil committed a crime as the Trump regime claims, then let them prove it through a court of law and let him be convicted by a jury of his peers. If he did not, then release him and pay him restitution for the illegal denial of his rights afforded under the U.S. Constitution.
[Petition to Release Mahmoud Khalil](https://substack.com/redirect/4fb775bd-1874-4cd3-ba06-e0e0b27ae95b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
First they came for the asylum seekers, then they came for the immigrants, then they came for the U.S. green card holders.
This is America today, but it doesn't have to be. Let us demand justice.
**The fight to stave off fascism under this new regime is growing. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! ICE claims it is acting on US State Dept orders, without warrant or charge, and refuses to inform Khalil's U.S. Citizen wife or his attorney of his whereabouts | | | Mar 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | Last Saturday night the United States entered a new level of oppression, and if we do not all act now to oppose it, then free speech is officially dead, fascism has officially taken hold, and each of us who oppose Trump's fascism are absolutely next. Let 's Address This. More than 123,000 activists have subscribed to Let 's Address This. We are doing everything in our power to stave off fascism in the United States. Subscribe and join us. | | ---|---|--- Summary of Trump's Fascist Acts Last Saturday night Donald Trump committed the following fascist acts: Sent ICE to illegally detain a legal U.S. resident without a warrant or charge because he peacefully protested the U.S. government's policies. Initially tried to arrest the resident's U.S. citizen wife, who is eight months pregnant with their child. Abducted that legal resident to an undisclosed location, and is refusing to share with his family or his lawyer where he's being detained, why he's being detained, and on what criminal charges or even probable cause he's being detained. We would expect such injustice from a dictatorship, but instead, this is what Donald Trump is currently doing to U.S. green card holder Mahmoud Khalil and his U.S. citizen wife. ICE is Officially Trump's Gestapo If ever there were any doubt as to the role ICE would serve and has served under Trump's regime, let those doubts now vanish. ICE is Trump's Secret State Police, i..e Gestapo. Period. The Gestapo, of course, were Hitler's secret Nazi police that abducted dissenters and stifled opposition with threats, force, and torture. With Saturday night's secret ICE raid on the campus of Columbia University to arrest Mahmoud Khalil, it is clear Trump plans to use ICE how Hitler used the Secret State Police. Here's what happened. Khalil is a graduate of Columbia, is a documented U.S. green card holder, is married to a U.S. citizen, and has no criminal record whatsoever. But he had one fatal "flaw." Khalil dared exercise his Constitutionally protected freedom of speech. Khalil was a lead organizer in the peaceful protests at Columbia University to oppose the U.S. Government's decision to continue to fund Netanyahu as he committed his well documented war crimes against Palestinians. ICE first claimed Khalil's visa was being revoked. Once informed that Khalil is here on a green card and is married to a U.S. Citizen, ICE changed its story and stated that his green card is being revoked. But that is not a decision or authority within the purview of ICE or the U.S. State Department. That is only a decision an immigration judge can make, and only after the government procures a judicial warrant, makes a legal arrest, files applicable charges, tries a person in a criminal proceeding, convicts them in that proceeding, and the accused exhausts all appeals. None of that happened here. Not one bit of it. Far from the due process our Constitution affords every person--citizen or not--the Trump regime executed a de facto autocratic move to stifle dissent and disappear a dissenter. And now, given that neither Khalil's wife, nor any other member of his family, nor his lawyer know where he is, and given that Khalil has received no due process of his Constitutionally protected rights, it is absolutely correct to state that the Trump regime's denial of these basic human rights amounts to torture. Khalil's lawyer Amy Greer released the following statement: Amy E. Greer is an associate at Dratel & Lewis and issues this statement: Last night ICE agents wrongfully arrested Mahmoud Khalil, claiming his student visa was revoked - even though Mahmoud is legal permanent resident (green card) and not in the U.S. on a student visa. Confronted with that fact, the ICE agents detained him anyway. Overnight we filed a habeas corpus petition on Mahmoud's behalf challenging the validity of his arrest and detention. Currently we do not know Mahmoud's precise whereabouts. Initially we were informed this morning that he had been transferred to an ICE facility in Elizabeth, New Jersey. However, when his wife - a U.S. citizen who is eight months' pregnant and was threatened with arrest as well by the ICE agents last night - tried to visit him there today, she was told he is not detained there. We have subsequently received reports that Mahmoud may be transferred as far away as Louisiana. We will vigorously be pursuing Mahmoud's rights in court, and will continue our efforts to right this terrible and inexcusable - and calculated - wrong committed against him. ICE's arrest and detention of Mahmoud follows the U.S. government's open repression of student activism and political speech, specifically targeting students at Columbia University for criticism of Israel's assault on Gaza. The U.S. government has made clear that they will use immigration enforcement as a tool to suppress that speech. Many individuals and organizations have expressed support for Mahmoud and outrage at the government's conduct, and have offered their assistance in the legal proceedings. Mahmoud greatly appreciates all of that support, as do we. Again, ICE is Trump's Gestapo, and we shouldn't even try to pretend otherwise. The Trump regime, which prides itself on free speech, is outraged that Khalil used his free speech to protest genocide. Columbia University, which prides itself on diversity of thought, welcomed alt-right Nazis to speak on campus in 2017, yet has now expelled students who spoke out against Israel's assault on Gaza. The hypocrisy is stark as it is dangerous. But it begs an even deeper question that no one in corporate media has yet answered. Did Columbia Collaborate With Trump to Abduct Khalil? A Columbia University spokesman confirmed that ICE does not have authority to enter campus without a judicial warrant, but then refused to answer whether ICE provided a warrant before illegally entering and abducting Khalil. That means only one of two possible options exist. Either: Columbia University is working in secret collusion with the Trump regime, or The Trump regime is further violating the law by illegally entering Columbia University without permission. If the former is true, it would be an unprecedented betrayal of Khalil's privacy, because it would have meant that the University somehow notified ICE of Khalil's location and address and helped coordinate the raid. Such an act should put every Columbia student, faculty, and staff on notice, that their University is colluding with a fascist regime out to abduct anyone who questions its authority. And it should mean the courts should order Khalil's immediate release. If the latter is true, it would mean the Trump regime has no regard for our Constitution, and the courts should strike them down immediately, and still order Khalil's immediate release. And notwithstanding any potential collaboration, the Trump regime just cancelled $400M in grants and contracts to Columbia University over antisemitism allegations--not because Columbia allowed alt right Nazis to speak on campus, but because Columbia didn't strongly enough condemn and expel pro Palestine speakers on campus. This is what white supremacy in 2025 America looks like. Indeed, what actually is antisemitic is ignoring the many Jewish voices who--alongside Palestinians--loudly and unapologetically protested the genocide in Gaza. What actually is antisemitic is ignoring the dozens of Jewish and Palestinian students . It is no surprise, therefore, that Jewish Americans are standing in solidarity with Khalil and demanding his release. Bend the Arc: Jewish Action stated: Columbia student and New Yorker, Mahmoud Khalil - who was targeted and detained for constitutionally protected speech - should be home with his 8 months pregnant wife today. Not missing in ICE detention, unreachable by his lawyers. The White House's authoritarian actions are being falsely done in our name as Jews, by a President and politicians who actively use antisemitism and do not speak for Jews. Indeed, if condemnations of genocide make you feel personally attacked, then you're telling on yourself. The only way out of this injustice is unity against fascism. If you 're finding value in this article and call for justice, please join our efforts as a free or paid subscriber. We Must Stand United Against This Fascism The petition to release Khalil has already exceeded 1 million signatures--please take a moment to sign it, linked at the bottom of this article (and if you are not a U.S. Citizen please do not use your real name for your own safety). Likewise, and pressure them to demand Khalil's immediate release. Here is a sample email to send and script to follow: Sample Email Subject: Urgent: Condemn the Arrest of Mahmoud Khalil & Demand His Release Dear [Representative/Senator] [Last Name], I am writing to urge you to publicly condemn the Trump regime's unjust arrest of Mahmoud Khalil and demand his immediate release. This is a blatant violation of human rights and due process, and silence from our elected officials is unacceptable. The Trump administration's crackdown on dissent is accelerating, and the arrest of Mahmoud Khalil is yet another chilling example of authoritarian overreach. If we fail to speak out now, this sets a dangerous precedent for further abuses of power. As your constituent, I need to know where you stand. I urge you to take immediate action by: ✅ Issuing a public statement condemning Khalil's arrest ✅ Calling on the Trump administration to release him immediately ✅ Demanding transparency and oversight to prevent further political targeting I will be following up to see what action you take. Thank you for your time, and I look forward to your response. Sincerely, [Your Name][Your Address][Your Email] Phone Script Hello, my name is [Your Name], and I am a constituent from [Your City/Zip Code]. I am calling to urge [Representative/Senator] [Last Name] to publicly condemn the Trump administration's arrest of Mahmoud Khalil and demand his immediate release. This is a clear violation of human rights and an alarming sign of growing authoritarianism. Will [Representative/Senator] [Last Name] issue a public statement condemning this unlawful arrest and take action to ensure Khalil's immediate release? Silence is not an option. We need bold leadership now more than ever. Thank you, and I look forward to your response. Make no mistake, if we do not loudly condemn and stop this injustice against Khalil now, it will get far worse, and each of us will be next. Think about the timeline preceding this point: What began as demonization of asylum seekers Then advanced to a ban on asylum altogether Then advanced to mass round ups of immigrants, documented and undocumented, Then advanced to codifying mass round ups and mass deportations without due process via the Laken Riley Act Then advanced to locking up immigrants in a 30,000 person concentration camp in Cuba And is now advancing to secret police abducting legal US residents in the middle of the night to oppress speech they don't like--all without a warrant, without charge, and without any indication where he's being held and under what conditions. This is how autocrats and dictators seize illegal power. This is how fascism takes at hold, slowly at first, and then all at once. This is not supposed to happen in a democratic republic like the United States, where the Constitution, separation of powers, and due process of law are supposed to matter--yet here we are. And anyone who thinks Trump will arbitrarily stop here on his own is sorely mistaken. My thoughts are not only with Mahmoud Khalil, but also with his wife and their child expected in just a few weeks. The trauma she is facing is absolutely impacting their child, and the risks to her and her yet unborn child's health cannot be overstated. I've already written and the steps we can take to counter his fascism. That guidance still applies now so feel free to re-read that piece. It is of paramount importance we stand united, left and right, to demand justice and due process of law. If Khalil committed a crime as the Trump regime claims, then let them prove it through a court of law and let him be convicted by a jury of his peers. If he did not, then release him and pay him restitution for the illegal denial of his rights afforded under the U.S. Constitution. First they came for the asylum seekers, then they came for the immigrants, then they came for the U.S. green card holders. This is America today, but it doesn't have to be. Let us demand justice. The fight to stave off fascism under this new regime is growing. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right.

The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy. **Now Musk and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting** , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's.

“ _Our entire democracy is now at risk_ ,” they wrote. “ _History will judge what we do at this moment._ ”

With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP. **[Team, none of this happens without everyone doing their share. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. clean_body: WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger| | | | | We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right. The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy. Now Musk and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's. “ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ” With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP.
