name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: March Newsletter
body:
Welcome to the fourth installment of Teichert in the Trenches!
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - March 2025
Welcome to the fourth installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly newsletter highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs! ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/NlCD4RgvR40c)
---
| | | The topics of Israel, Gaza, Russia and Ukraine were big news items during the past month. This NewsNation interview covers a lot of ground in a short amount of time. (February 11th)
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG13EXv1dZJgdaBrW9hw/g4zubAGj-e5E)
---
| | | It was reported this month that CIA drones were being used to support Mexican ground forces to eliminate the threat of drug cartels south of the border. I appreciated the opportunity to join Jon Scott on Fox News to discuss this important national security topic and public safety concern. (February 23rd) ** _Thoughts by Teichert_** I hope that you all enjoyed the leadership lesson I distributed through email a few days ago on Leading In a Crisis. I’ve been working on a unique definition of leadership that I’ll unveil in the next month or so via this same email distribution list. More to follow!
---
| | | | [ "The World Is Better Off Because Israel Has Stood Strong"](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG7uggjyojTAjPUbUSIC/tw8oqUgSpxwK)
---
| | | I appreciate The Times of Israel for publishing my thoughts related to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s visit to the United States in early February.
---
| | | | [ "Embracing Shared Humanity in Leadership"](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEm8pYvztcepEnLSksS/f569kMHZzvp3)
---
| | | I thoroughly enjoyed this raw and authentic podcast with former army NCO and current law enforcement leader Ayman Kafel. I just got his book in the mail and am looking forward to reading it.
---
| [ Ministry in Unexpected Places - Military](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdayNtB3m8v465R3Si/e_zH1KfotPlv)
---
| | | It was a true joy to join the Consider It Joy Podcast to discuss the topic: ministry in unexpected places. The discussion was fun, informative and practical. ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**
---
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
🧠 Leading a revolutionary leap in U.S. advanced design and manufacturing🧠
📣 🔥 I enjoyed an eye-opening quick trip to LA recently to engage with the amazing team at Divergent. Through a decade of designing and building Czinger Vehicles and other high end automobile components, they are on the verge of an earth-shattering breakout in aerospace & defense and dual-use advanced design & production that will turbocharge American competitiveness and revolutionize national security capacity.

💥 The cars were cool, but the opportunity for strategic scaling is unmatched!
| | | |
---
📚 Finding pop-up copies of BOOM! 📚

🙏 Thanks to Cinco Hamilton for snapping a picture of this one he discovered in the Atlanta Airport!

💥 🧠 It might be a bit sneaky, but when I travel I typically bring a few extra copies of BOOM! and just leave them in the book stores in the airport. I only place them in an open slot, because I would never replace or cover up another author’s books. And, I have no idea what happens to them, but I enjoy thinking about the possibilities. In this case, a few days after I went through Atlanta, Cinco saw this copy sitting on the shelf.

🔥 Consider it a mix of the innovation concepts about begging for forgiveness instead of asking permission, accepting risk, and everything is waiverable. And as General Chuck Yeager Rules are made for those unwilling to make up their own—but you better be right!”

|
---
Quality time with a true American hero!

Yesterday was the perfect day to put on my flight suit and trek down to the southern tip of Maryland to spend quality time with Colonel (ret) James Krilich. While he is battling cancer, his memory is sharp as always and I was inspired to hear details about his amazing career. With only a high school degree, he went from Army Private to Colonel, serving in Vietnam as an artillery officer under Major Colin Powell and eventually serving directly under four Secretaries of Defense.

🔥 Those who serve today stand on the shoulders of giants, with none bigger and mightier than Colonel Krilich.

📣 It was also a great reminder of something said by General

💥 I walked away from our time together inspired and recommitted to Support and Defend the Constitution of the United States!
| | | **_Behind the Scenes_**
---
| | | I’m writing a kid’s book – and a solid draft is now complete! It’s about a dragon who can’t fly using his own wings and so he joins the air force. It doubles as a metaphor about resilience, leadership and innovation for all ages. I’m excited to complete it, and I’ll keep you updated along the way! ** _My Bookshelf_**
---
| | | |
---
“When we start seeing others as objects, we begin provoking them to make our lives difficult. We actually start inviting others to make us miserable. We begin provoking in others the very things we say we hate.”
| | | |
---
“Creativity doesn’t live in isolation. Emotional intelligence, our ability to connect and empathize, transforms insights into impact. A technical solution, no matter how brilliant, will fall flat if it fails to resonate with its audience. Just ask any failed startup with perfect code and zero users. This ability to connect emotionally with others gives ideas meaning, purpose, and relevance. It ensures that creativity doesn’t just solve problems but addresses the needs, desires, and aspirations of the people it serves.”
| | | |
---
Dennis, a fighter pilot from my hometown who flew 200 missions during the Vietnam War, was a role model to me growing up in Port Angeles, Washington. I especially appreciate the humility of his story mixed with faith, family and service. It’s a great reminder that what you see on the outside of a man isn’t the whole Man, I seemed indestructible, but perhaps not forever. If I appeared to be Superman on the outside, I was a total mess on the inside ... I had been gifted with every talent and opportunity to make a significant impact on the world and had miserably failed.”

Great leaders are humble, approachable, and credible! Dennis is all 3!
|
---
“It’s precisely the fact that I could have chosen a different and perhaps equally valuable way to spend the afternoon that bestows meaning on the choice I did make. And the same applies, of course, to an entire lifetime ... The exhilaration that sometimes arises when you grasp this truth about finitude has been called the ‘joy of missing out,’ by way of a deliberate contrast with the idea of the ‘fear of missing out.’ It is the thrilling recognition that you wouldn’t even really want to be able to do everything, since if you didn’t have to decide what to miss out on, your choices couldn’t truly mean anything.” ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**
|
---
| [ An Emphatic Warning (Feb 1st)](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV37CqMDvd0tOpPM2y/x1TjtA4drREE)
---
| [ Pining Away (Feb 8th)](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMVG1nXO576ihZNedE/OcpvJxIMbFix)
---
| [ Flying Box Springs In Our Lives
(Feb 15th)](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDxOqkiYEbCY0JLxDU/KR-0fxgpmFs1)
---
| [ Not Characterized by Senile Benevolence (Feb 22nd)](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGn5PXfhtiO5INJ3KFnk/Wf68RbnStjT3)
---
| | | **_Blast from the Past_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGtwrgUf4sXZOCbnIYO0/K95EHtC0HcKC)
---
| | | |
---
🍔💥🔥 A key to success – responsiveness and adding oversized value 🔥💥 🍔

❤️ My fiancé at the time (Melonie of course) came to visit me in the U.K. from California. On her way to the airport, she stopped by to get me an In-N-Out Burger (a Double-Double with no tomato and both grilled & regular onions). She threw it in container of dry-ice as a part of her carry-ons (pre-9/11) and I enjoyed it from the comfort of my British home. That’s real love!

✒️ I decided to write to the company to let them know of our geographically separated enjoyment of their amazing product. The following are what I received back from their Corporate Customer Service Manager and their Company President!

📣 There are two things largely missing today that In-N-Out demonstrated brilliantly in this situation as a part of their unique culture that should inform the leadership style of all of us:

1️⃣ Responsiveness – how many times have you reached out to someone far less important than a Company President and they didn’t respond? Your customers and collaborators are human beings, and if you are too busy to respond then you should rethink your culture, reassess your sense of self-importance, and reconsider your ability to continue on in your position.

2️⃣ Adding Oversized Value – Not only did these two leaders respond, but they added unexpected value – 2 free t-shirts and 7 gift certificates. By adding value they increased their own value! (It’s a textbook example of the concepts by Bob Burg and John David Mann in one of my favorite books – “The Go-Giver”)

🔥 🍔 This type of culture and customer experience are part of the reason that I am a committed customer for life. In fact, my first stop after I landed in LA this past week for a quick meeting was a world-class burger – a Double-Double protein style with no tomato and both grilled & regular onions!
** _Rejoin Opportunities_** I’ll be speaking at Baylor University on March 26th, attending a Symposium on U.S. – Japan relations at the SMU Tower Center in Dallas on March 27th, and preaching at a youth conference in Hattiesburg, Mississippi on March 28th and 29th. ** _Dad Joke of the Month_** I was surprised to learn this month that Albert Einstein was a real person. I always thought he was just a theoretical physicist!
| | | |
---
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| You've received it because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
---
| [View in browser](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/mr/sh/SMJz09SDriOHUOWhOt45QHGsupy4/sr-uvBlhNtMn)| [Unsubscribe](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/un/sh/SMJz09a0vkbXqU0NAdDsZ4A0AXaC/-ka-IEDWnDCz)
---

And the same applies, of course, to an entire lifetime ... The exhilaration that sometimes arises when you grasp this truth about finitude has been called the ‘joy of missing out,’ by way of a deliberate contrast with the idea of the ‘fear of missing out.’ It is the thrilling recognition that you wouldn’t even really want to be able to do everything, since if you didn’t have to decide what to miss out on, your choices couldn’t truly mean anything.” PLUS Posts for the Month | | | | | | | | Blast from the Past | | | | | | | | 🍔💥🔥 A key to success – responsiveness and adding oversized value 🔥💥 🍔 ❤️ My fiancé at the time (Melonie of course) came to visit me in the U.K. from California. On her way to the airport, she stopped by to get me an In-N-Out Burger (a Double-Double with no tomato and both grilled & regular onions). She threw it in container of dry-ice as a part of her carry-ons (pre-9/11) and I enjoyed it from the comfort of my British home. That’s real love! ✒️ I decided to write to the company to let them know of our geographically separated enjoyment of their amazing product. The following are what I received back from their Corporate Customer Service Manager and their Company President! 📣 There are two things largely missing today that In-N-Out demonstrated brilliantly in this situation as a part of their unique culture that should inform the leadership style of all of us: 1️⃣ Responsiveness – how many times have you reached out to someone far less important than a Company President and they didn’t respond? Your customers and collaborators are human beings, and if you are too busy to respond then you should rethink your culture, reassess your sense of self-importance, and reconsider your ability to continue on in your position. 2️⃣ Adding Oversized Value – Not only did these two leaders respond, but they added unexpected value – 2 free t-shirts and 7 gift certificates. By adding value they increased their own value! (It’s a textbook example of the concepts by Bob Burg and John David Mann in one of my favorite books – “The Go-Giver”) 🔥 🍔 This type of culture and customer experience are part of the reason that I am a committed customer for life. In fact, my first stop after I landed in LA this past week for a quick meeting was a world-class burger – a Double-Double protein style with no tomato and both grilled & regular onions! Rejoin Opportunities I’ll be speaking at Baylor University on March 26th, attending a Symposium on U.S. – Japan relations at the SMU Tower Center in Dallas on March 27th, and preaching at a youth conference in Hattiesburg, Mississippi on March 28th and 29th. Dad Joke of the Month_ I was surprised to learn this month that Albert Einstein was a real person. I always thought he was just a theoretical physicist! | | | | | | | | Teichert in the Trenches | Washington, DC | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | You've received it because you've subscribed to our newsletter. | |

Unfortunately, that's enough to make you a LOT of enemies.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10dc34c74d764125be4a34fb56c26ab3&_e=MT3bSQNQgmW-hbj-eP6sxRXdW27aAEIaGXqcvbqBd17WJN6Ga_TUllMdc-pDQfj5hgry6urFXSElkWr3MBxFRglmSAWul_FREqR402yVx-byhKWTkJwSq6gebgWFvZJBczKof7hgvLTi4IKykwVBjPzF9t3jqoBUC-PeF4r9t8EIkJoL8ihlc2W2Cubt9Tyli6K1wcHed_d4cM_uTy64qLP70YJWbkR3rEKIW6WXHotsnb94zGk8eMD77YIzexnrUALIfE9IbKOEWrCqgqxTMF19DQ6wzmJmrsum2tLh8Kbz7FQcNBFBrzcpYvtgyKaRB_P8T-gKe6h3OTcJNjahHa4EpGTUohzlIlgBgsctqQys5f0GIkRQJnSFpU9yuAdJ)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10dc34c74d764125be4a34fb56c26ab3&_e=MT3bSQNQgmW-hbj-eP6sxRXdW27aAEIaGXqcvbqBd17WJN6Ga_TUllMdc-pDQfj5hgry6urFXSElkWr3MBxFRglmSAWul_FREqR402yVx-byhKWTkJwSq6gebgWFvZJBczKof7hgvLTi4IKykwVBjPzF9t3jqoBUC-PeF4r9t8EIkJoL8ihlc2W2Cubt9Tyli6K1wcHed_d4cM_uTy64qLP70YJWbkR3rEKIW6WXHoueDScIn3jek4oqoXD8ViRf0_4j1gKM8V5AKT3THllCHkFjerUWZ8JxYBU91JCdfPQDlyyPRrkGK3H0AsGAJTCJAWjWkYviU2NBFDRQCBJgS4OSip4JcLD8qGWx0Jxz1KGlxARYuSWpSCENEE4OoPxn)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10dc34c74d764125be4a34fb56c26ab3&_e=MT3bSQNQgmW-hbj-eP6sxRXdW27aAEIaGXqcvbqBd17WJN6Ga_TUllMdc-pDQfj5hgry6urFXSElkWr3MBxFRglmSAWul_FREqR402yVx-byhKWTkJwSq6gebgWFvZJBczKof7hgvLTi4IKykwVBjPzF9t3jqoBUC-PeF4r9t8EIkJoL8ihlc2W2Cubt9Tyli6K1wcHed_d4cM_uTy64qLP70YJWbkR3rEKIW6WXHos8rtsLrDQXRY2UxxqqykwsOrdiXOvjA1OJWuHUc2fP6UqDpZqcneamj1PDY4ZU5-T0jISkYwBQ6sLXG1mO2PP_Li9TqSt2KfiMXSHhV4_3FdCREe8KgK4XkH6tm8Zibl_FD6vty_hcSle-HVEJ8fZZ) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10dc34c74d764125be4a34fb56c26ab3&_e=MT3bSQNQgmW-hbj-eP6sxRXdW27aAEIaGXqcvbqBd17WJN6Ga_TUllMdc-pDQfj5hgry6urFXSElkWr3MBxFRglmSAWul_FREqR402yVx-byhKWTkJwSq6gebgWFvZJBczKof7hgvLTi4IKykwVBjPzF9t3jqoBUC-PeF4r9t8EIkJoL8ihlc2W2Cubt9Tyli6K1wcHed_d4cM_uTy64qLP70YJWbkR3rEKIW6WXHotnDKFPxoMKrmLuyZKrssb2OOQmu4iOCIt9N_WraJTGULxmtScPrj2LBlm4IUsjVOTu6QnplinHmS3_xjnFnX7rL-qRntSgrcSVLMctRQPz8SkpigsPKM9MA3XaZh6ZRFr2qcoel7EWahQ-mb5fPCub)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10dc34c74d764125be4a34fb56c26ab3&_e=MT3bSQNQgmW-hbj-eP6sxRXdW27aAEIaGXqcvbqBd17WJN6Ga_TUllMdc-pDQfj5hgry6urFXSElkWr3MBxFRglmSAWul_FREqR402yVx-byhKWTkJwSq6gebgWFvZJBczKof7hgvLTi4IKykwVBjPzF9t3jqoBUC-PeF4r9t8EIkJoL8ihlc2W2Cubt9Tyli6K1wcHed_d4cM_uTy64qLP70YJWbkR3rEKIW6WXHouhWZxMeKBWlcysq5U8lX8qC7xXGmWcE5BYXA-9fT1Fn1V-uF5DCzR5oFp1XomlsSIOhfb1YFXEu5QH8N6oxQxSaLTurxbYWq8gy_uOm19ePP6eZrWKv2elJi0dtfhxh9DBH_ohTeSDGlKZPtxYShEO)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10dc34c74d764125be4a34fb56c26ab3&_e=MT3bSQNQgmW-hbj-eP6sxRXdW27aAEIaGXqcvbqBd17WJN6Ga_TUllMdc-pDQfj5hgry6urFXSElkWr3MBxFRglmSAWul_FREqR402yVx-byhKWTkJwSq6gebgWFvZJBczKof7hgvLTi4IKykwVBjPzF9t3jqoBUC-PeF4r9t8EIkJoL8ihlc2W2Cubt9Tyli6K1wcHed_d4cM_uTy64qLP70YJWbkR3rEKIW6WXHou6kJqLKnZAtHq_h4fLzJShGQTfeuVApig-zRyM4uN8s-tiUi4LJ9aU548pmB5BPynUoszXzuPv8mZOYMWC2cw_-KqjkZbYyp42vfJ2KjWPLCTdEld3lvln8HV-oLK4POhUrZbBrG1K5F_LrIfgFlmM)

clean_body: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103613956/532678466/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDUwMzVhNy1kY2ZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgtePlEvK2M2t8UM2pZAfLU3hPW2Z5byWVvxWCtKIag=)
Peter, Here’s a story I recently encountered that might be instructive: A local, family-owned lumber company in IL-17 reached out to me in deep concern, because for the first time in over 40 years, their next shipment of 2x4’s from Canada is labeled **“Cost TBD.”** They have made clear, like so many local businesses, that long-term price uncertainty will close his business. He is not alone. Every day I hear from my constituents who want me to find common sense solutions to lowering prices. They want groceries to be cheaper, they want to afford their prescription drugs, and they want to afford a home to raise their kids in. They’re not getting any of that from Donald Trump. While the President is focused on punishing Canada for no reason, he’s ignoring the real Americans like those in my district who have everything going up – including the number of unemployed workers. **Trump might be forcing these working folks to pay an incredible cost with no reward in the end, but I will keep fighting to deliver on the issues my neighbors care about the most. I am in Washington to get results for YOU, not to play politics.** More soon, \- Eric | **Before you go:** Our best bet to push back on these attacks on our workers is by flipping Congress and forming an impenetrable blue wall. Your support of any amount today will ensure we have the right fighters in Congress to protect the American people.

name: Derek Lyons - RITE
subject: RITE PAC POSTS VICTORY FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY IN GEORGIA, PRESERVES ABSENTEE BALLOT APPLICATION DEADLINE
body:
RITE PAC wins dismissal of a challenge to GA absentee ballot application deadline |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE PAC POSTS VICTORY FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY IN GEORGIA, PRESERVES ABSENTEE BALLOT APPLICATION DEADLINE** (Atlanta, GA – March 10, 2025) – Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections PAC (“RITE PAC”), an organization dedicated to protecting election integrity, today announced a victory for election integrity in Georgia with the dismissal of a challenge to the state’s absentee ballot application deadline. The U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Georgia dismissed a lawsuit brought by liberal activists, which attempted to strike down Georgia’s deadline for requesting absentee ballots. Georgia requires voters to submit absentee ballot applications no later than 11 days before an election, enabling the state to process applications in a timely manner. Activists, supported by the Biden Department of Justice, contended that this commonsense deadline violated the voting rights of Georgia’s citizens. On March 7, the court soundly [rejected](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=f637744402&e=ea91f782ea) the challenge, ruling that the union failed to demonstrate that the deadline harmed the plaintiffs in any way.. This is RITE PAC’s second big win in this case. RITE PAC helped defeat plaintiffs’ effort to set aside the deadline in the runup to the 2024 election. And now RITE PAC has secured dismissal of the case in its entirety. RITE PAC supported the Georgia Republican Party’s intervention and participation in the lawsuit. “This case was nothing more than yet another attempt to undermine commonsense election safeguards that protect against last-minute chaos and help enable secure and orderly absentee voting,” said RITE PAC President and CEO Derek Lyons. “It is up to the state legislature, the duly elected representatives of the people, to regulate absentee voting—not some outside interest group trying to interfere with the democratic process.”
###

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Our last recourse against an authoritarian dictator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If Democrats are going to effectively fight back against Donald Trump, we need a three-pronged approach.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250310-4838-footer&t=1&akid=4838%2E420207%2EcdRXKv)
Hi Peter, it's Pramila Jayapal.
If Democrats are going to effectively fight back against Donald Trump, we need a three-pronged approach:
1. **We have to use every power we have in Congress.** We may not have the votes to move bills, but we can absolutely use our platform to call out and shine a light on abuses of power.

2. **We have to fight back in the courts.** This work has been underway since the moment Trump took office, and we’ve already won some important victories on things like the birthright citizenship executive order.

3. **We have to embrace inside-outside organizing.** That means training people for nonviolent resistance, preparing for potential strikes, and getting ready to seize the moment when we can have a giant coordinated movement to protest the destruction of our democracy.

[**If you're with me in this fight, will you pitch in $3 to support my work — both inside and outside of Congress — today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250310?refcode=em20250310-4838&amount=3&refcode2=4838_420207_cdRXKv&akid=4838%2E420207%2EcdRXKv)
Right now Democrats are working to fight back in Congress and in the courts.
**But in a situation where an authoritarian dictator refuses to listen to court orders, our last recourse will be nonviolent resistance in the streets.**
That’s why my campaign is getting ready to host nonviolent resistance trainings both virtually and in-person, to ensure everyone has the tools they need to speak up and fight back.
But none of this work would be possible without your support, Peter. Your grassroots donations enable me to keep up the fight in Congress _and_ enable my campaign to organize year-round — and I’m counting on you now as much as ever to keep going.
[**So if you can, please pitch in $3 or any amount that works for you today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250310?refcode=em20250310-4838&amount=3&refcode2=4838_420207_cdRXKv&akid=4838%2E420207%2EcdRXKv)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250310?amount=3&refcode=em20250310-4838&refcode2=4838_420207_cdRXKv&akid=4838%2E420207%2EcdRXKv)**
Thank you, Peter. We have a lot of work ahead of us, but together we can grow our progressive movement, put a stop to MAGA's authoritarianism, and finally build a government that serves _all_ the people.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250310-4838-footer&t=2&refcode2=4838_420207_cdRXKv&akid=4838%2E420207%2EcdRXKv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Right now Democrats are working to fight back in Congress and in the courts. But in a situation where an authoritarian dictator refuses to listen to court orders, our last recourse will be nonviolent resistance in the streets. That’s why my campaign is getting ready to host nonviolent resistance trainings both virtually and in-person, to ensure everyone has the tools they need to speak up and fight back. But none of this work would be possible without your support, Peter. Your grassroots donations enable me to keep up the fight in Congress and enable my campaign to organize year-round — and I’m counting on you now as much as ever to keep going. Thank you, Peter. We have a lot of work ahead of us, but together we can grow our progressive movement, put a stop to MAGA's authoritarianism, and finally build a government that serves all the people. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Joe Kerr
subject: fighting fires in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’m not a career politician—I’m a firefighter stepping up to put out the fires in Washington.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86791?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8808%2E614464%2EHy134z)
Peter,
I’m not a career politician—I’m a firefighter stepping up to put out the fires in Washington.
I know what it’s like to rush into a burning building and save a life from a deadly fire. Hard-working Americans are struggling while career politicians like Young Kim add fuel to the flames.
**That’s why I’m running for Congress in California’s 40th District, and I need your help.[Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots and join me as a Founding Donor to help bring my firefighter know-how to the fight in Congress?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86791?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8808%2E614464%2EHy134z)**
**[CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86791?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8808%2E614464%2EHy134z)**
When I fought to maximize the healthcare benefits of our Orange County firefighters, I learned an important lesson: if you want to save a life, talk to a Democrat; if you want to save a dollar, talk to a Republican; you get them both on board, and maybe you get a deal.
Listen, the situation in Washington right now is dire. Teachers, farmers, healthcare workers, and everyone in between are struggling to get by, and the Trump White House is nowhere near providing clear solutions to our economic challenges.
We can’t afford any more distractions. I’m ready to work with anyone who is as invested in bettering their community as I am—just like I’ve done here in California, with Governors across the country and two presidents to create lasting solutions for working-class families on public safety, climate change, and so much more.**
**[I know how to bring people together to get things done—we need leadership that puts people first. Will you split a contribution between me and Heartland Patriots today to join our team as a founding donor and help us start our campaign off strong?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86791?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8808%2E614464%2EHy134z)**

name: SarahMcBride.com
subject: Send a powerful message to Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
March 31st.
#
In just a few weeks, we’ll hit our first major FEC fundraising deadline of 2025, and what we report will set the tone for the fights ahead.
**This is our first public fundraising report since Trump re-entered the White House, and we have the chance to show that people are fed up with the chaos and corruption.**
[**If you can afford it, will you pitch in to Sarah’s campaign today? We set a goal to raise $110,000 online this quarter, but we need your support to reach it!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250310-1?refcode=em20250310-1806&amount=5&refcode2=1806_21716_Kte2uH&akid=1806%2E21716%2EKte2uH)
Public opinion is shifting. Donald Trump and the unelected billionaires running the show know it. And the Republicans in Congress co-signing the Trump administration’s extreme plans know it.
That’s why they’re resorting to lies, theatrics, and petty name-calling to distract from the fact that they’re decimating the federal government and gearing up to cut Medicaid and food assistance to line the pockets of their wealthy donors.
**Now, we have a major opportunity to show them that folks nationwide see right through it.**
Every grassroots donation we receive before the March 31st FEC deadline will send a powerful message: **we won’t stand by while putting their wealthy donors ahead of working people.**
**Sarah is in this fight to build a government that works for _all_ of us. She’s fighting to protect essential programs like Medicaid and Medicare, SNAP, and Social Security and to lower costs for everyone.**
But to keep up this fight, she needs you in her corner. She’s counting on this grassroots team to step up and show that our movement is not backing down.
[**So please, if you can, pitch in $5 to help us hit our $110,000 goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250310-1?refcode=em20250310-1806&amount=5&refcode2=1806_21716_Kte2uH&akid=1806%2E21716%2EKte2uH)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250310-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250310-1806&refcode2=1806_21716_Kte2uH&akid=1806%2E21716%2EKte2uH)**
Thank you, and more soon!
— Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250310-1&t=1&refcode2=1806_21716_Kte2uH&akid=1806%2E21716%2EKte2uH)**

Peter!

I am no stranger to the racism that has infiltrated the airwaves of The View. Co-host Whoopi Goldberg has said I have "Clarence Thomas syndrome" as a Black Republican AND co-host Joy Behar said I'm a Republican because I "don't get" the idea of racism.

So I was unfortunately not surprised to see more race-baiting nonsense when I read the headlines that co-host Ana Navarro suggested that President Trump would be banning "all black people from the Super Bowl Halftime Show."

This is a despicable comment. And, Peter, I refuse to let this dangerous rhetoric go unanswered. Comments like Ana's are hateful and deceitful and do more to take our nation backwards than forwards.

The truth of my life disproves the racist lies of the radical Left. America is _**NOT**_ a racist country. It's the _**greatest country in the world!**_

I will never stop fighting for our shared values and I hope I'll continue to have your support right now.

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter! I am no stranger to the racism that has infiltrated the airwaves of The View. Co-host Whoopi Goldberg has said I have "Clarence Thomas syndrome" as a Black Republican AND co-host Joy Behar said I'm a Republican because I "don't get" the idea of racism. So I was unfortunately not surprised to see more race-baiting nonsense when I read the headlines that co-host Ana Navarro suggested that President Trump would be banning "all black people from the Super Bowl Halftime Show." This is a despicable comment. And, Peter, I refuse to let this dangerous rhetoric go unanswered. Comments like Ana's are hateful and deceitful and do more to take our nation backwards than forwards. The truth of my life disproves the racist lies of the radical Left. America is NOT a racist country. It's the greatest country in the world! I will never stop fighting for our shared values and I hope I'll continue to have your support right now. | | | "YES I'M WATCHING" Under President Trump's leadership our nation is on a path to greatness. And I'm committed to doing everything I can to help make that happen! "Let's leave the nasty race-baiting nonsense behind and take steps together for a brighter future." Tim Scott | | | President Trump made history with his return to the White House & it's time for our country to rally behind the values that make us Great- AMERICA IS BACK! name: Hillsdale College via Victory News
subject: A sense of wonder
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9daw423lcnondoq8jfstm39lvy6wre1phjy4n2bhl9l1lmke4i4ha06r6oesr3hn5xffaltrutg5z6gxb&__stmp=ssx88c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssx88c&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfnbvwki5p39hdgpqo2xjbi3ibprbyin6wugnw6rwa29xnay169rw4n7glo1fyoowfny5nyfcd44vmkil0pml2bt7l8jz0k4xpsrkgn29m6bqnh6ejg8kvz9opxyk6lal5px1o16ouelgvyr6994&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssx88c&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssx88c&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssx88c&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssx88c&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfnbvwki5p39hdgpqo2xjbi46orhjqg5ktcm0cw2d0a4ryqvdpixczdc1urdm7dqscpk5h2afqkrhqade5t6xal7ii1ivl94u4nmfonaxc87b9wpggjhxv9v1mhwr0v9nr2jfea67wubo8bc3jbk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssx88c&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssx88c&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

BREAKING: Beshear announces $118 million I-64 improvement project in Shelby County
**Beshear announces $118 million I-64 improvement project in Shelby County** Peter,

While the Trump Administration is laying off the federal workforce, decimating Medicaid in favor of tax breaks for the wealthy, and alternating between threatening our allies with tariffs and reversing course, Andy is focused on moving Kentucky forward and taking care of our people. He just announced a $118 million investment to improve I-64 in Shelby County — _a project that will ease congestion, make roads safer, and help folks get where they need to go faster._

Because at the end of the day, this is what good leadership looks like: focusing on the things that actually make life better for everyday Kentuckians. Andy isn’t playing political games — **he’s delivering real results that will help families, businesses, and communities for years to come.**

That’s why we need to have his back. While Andy is working to move Kentucky forward, the Trump administration is working to cut healthcare and lay off tens of thousands of federal workers.

[**If you want more smart, common-sense investments that make Kentucky safer, stronger, and more connected — chip in today to show your support. name: Team Bonta
subject: Trump’s anti-education agenda will hurt our kids the most
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
The Attorney General just filed another lawsuit against the Trump administration for ending crucial K-12 teaching preparation grants.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250310&t=1&akid=1684%2E1088799%2EzI8cd0)
**Rob just sued the Trump administration again.** This time, it’s to stop the termination of crucial K-12 teacher preparation grants.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250310?refcode=em20250310-1684&refcode2=1684_1088799_zI8cd0&akid=1684%2E1088799%2EzI8cd0)
As part of its war on diversity, equity, and inclusion, **the MAGA administration is trying to unlawfully eliminate $600 million worth of grants nationwide, including $148 million here in California,** for programs that train teachers and get more teachers into classrooms in rural and urban communities, and in harder-to-fill positions like math, science, and special education.
We already have a nationwide teacher shortage — if Trump is allowed to pursue this anti-education agenda, it’ll yank teachers out of schools and slow a pipeline of aspiring teachers for years to come. At the end of the day, those who will feel the impact of this unlawful action are our kids.
**[If you support Rob’s work to stop these K-12 education cuts from becoming a reality, chip in $5 or whatever you can to fuel our campaign today!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250310?refcode=em20250310-1684&amount=5&refcode2=1684_1088799_zI8cd0&akid=1684%2E1088799%2EzI8cd0)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250310?refcode=em20250310-1684&amount=5&refcode2=1684_1088799_zI8cd0&akid=1684%2E1088799%2EzI8cd0)**
This is Rob’s sixth lawsuit against the Trump administration. As long as the President and his far-right cabinet continue to break the law and attempt to hurt our communities, _it won’t be the last._
Thanks for having the AG’s back,
Team Bonta

The GOP-led Congress is barreling forward on MASSIVE Medicaid cuts despite public polling showing overwhelming majorities of Americans opposed to the cuts.

And a new poll shows how foolish and misguided the MAGA majority in Congress is: __over__ __60 percent of Republicans and Trump voters__ __support Medicaid__ and oppose cuts to the program.

In Florida’s 6th District, where I am running for Congress, nearly 14% of the population lives below the poverty line. Medicaid is a _literal lifeline_ for many of the residents of my district.

MAGA extremists like my opponent Randy Fine divide voters with fake patriotism and wedge issues like immigration. When Fine’s right wing economic policies are exposed and his harmful agenda is revealed, **voters quickly come over to our side**.

But to save Medicaid and fight for working people, we don’t need to beg and plead with the corrupt MAGA lackeys who control Congress—** _we can defeat them right here and right now, in less than 4 weeks_**.

subject: not a typo

body:
Peter, I’m about to pull back the curtain and tell you three critical facts about where things stand — and then I’m going to ask you to chip in $14. Donald Trump is taking a wrecking ball to our government — but we have an unprecedented opportunity to flip the House and hold him accountable once and for all. Will you rush in $14 before midnight to help Democrats win THREE upcoming special elections, flip the House blue, and make sure we put an end to Trump’s dangerous agenda? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, I need you to know three critical things:

1. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] I just blasted Trump during an Oversight Committee hearing for failing to lower costs for our families.

2. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] We’re heading into three special elections that could flip critical seats from red to blue.

3. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] If we win them, we’ll hand Trump a shocking defeat and put a check on his unfettered power.

That’s why we must build an unbeatable foundation of grassroots support, hold Trump accountable for his empty campaign promises, and win historic victories in these special elections. Can I count on you to rush in $14? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, I need you to make a critical choice in this difficult moment:

You can either let Trump continue to ignore the issues facing everyday families, win these special elections, and lock us out of power...

...Or you can stand up, do something bold, and help build a historic victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Will you stand with me and help flip these three critical seats? Even a donation of $14 on your part could make all the difference. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Thank you,

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

name: AOC
subject: We can't show up just for election season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We cannot give up on winning the hearts and minds of our fellow Americans.
If you have ever canvassed before and knocked on doors, you know that most people do not have neat worldviews that fit in one category or another.
The most important thing that you can do is find those people, and start to build relationships with them _now_.
Because a lot of people don't change how they vote based on a debate. **A lot of people will change how they vote based on someone they care about**.
When people start seeing actions happen around them... you know, first it's like, “Oh, there's a town hall down the street.” They're not going to _go_ , but they're going to _notice_ that it's happening.
People start getting the message eventually. And that heartbeat starts now.
This, to me, is one area where the Democratic Party has historically been quite weak. **We can't show up _just_ for election season**.
How many of us have had a family member, or someone that you care about, lost to this Trump dark web? How many young boys get sucked up into Andrew Tate stuff?
I don't even feel defensive or angry about it — I feel really bummed that the right wing is dooming a lot of little boys and men to loneliness because of these ideas that they have around other people.
That work is really complicated. **That's the work that we need to do**.
It is about applying pressure to elected officials, and it is _also_ about transforming each other.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
Alexandria is joining Bernie Sanders on the road to visit swing districts around the country to start this work _now_ : **building a mass movement for a better world, one person at a time**.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250310.ZH6nB9&refcode=em20250310-8316-P_FND_CTR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8316%2E2526796%2E4Tii8Y)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250310.ZH6nB9&refcode=em20250310-8316-P_FND_CTR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8316%2E2526796%2E4Tii8Y)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250310?refcode=em20250310-8316-P_FND_CTR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=8316_2526796_4Tii8Y&akid=8316%2E2526796%2E4Tii8Y)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250310-8316-P_FND_CTR_GOL&t=22&akid=8316%2E2526796%2E4Tii8Y)**

name: David Hogg
subject: Mark my words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I firmly believe the NRA’s days are numbered.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250310-1&t=1&akid=1833%2E587540%2EgTb7sF)
Mark my words, Peter: **Gen Z will outlive the NRA.**
_The Daily Beast_ analyzed the NRA’s tax returns last year. They aren’t pretty.
In fact, the pro-gun group’s revenue has been on the decline for years now, especially since Parkland.
_Last year, their fundraising was at its lowest point since 2008. And since 2018 they have lost over 1 million members._
**I firmly believe that the NRA’s days are numbered** — and as their power and influence fade into the dustbin of history, we will replace their corrupt, purchased politicians with a new generation of bold, courageous leaders who aren’t afraid to take urgent, necessary action to stop the scourge of gun violence in America.
**I co-founded Leaders We Deserve because Gen Z’s answer to the NRA is electing more and more young people to public office to counter their agenda.**
**[Will you rush a $5 contribution now to help power our game-changing work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250310-1?refcode=em20250310-1833&amount=5&refcode2=1833_587540_gTb7sF&akid=1833%2E587540%2EgTb7sF)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250310-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250310-1833&refcode2=1833_587540_gTb7sF&akid=1833%2E587540%2EgTb7sF)**
We founded Leaders We Deserve in 2023 to elect the next generation of leadership — and folks across the country are already helping us shatter expectations.
Not only have tens of thousands of people just like you joined our movement and helped spread the word about our mission, we’ve already elected _seven_ candidates since we started.
In the days leading up to Virginia’s 2023 elections, we hit the streets to knock on doors and get out the vote for **Nadarius Clark.** Thanks to our supporters’ donations, we were proud to invest more than $100,000 to support Nadarius’s campaign.
When all the ballots were counted, _Nadarius won by less than 2,000 votes._
Last November, we helped elect six more young progressive champions to state legislatures and Congress: **Sarah McBride, Molly Cook, Bryce Berry, Dante Pittman, Christine Cockley, and Oscar De Los Santos.**
Leaders We Deserve is already playing an integral role in electing the next generation of leaders, and we’re counting on your continued support so we can keep winning these fights in 2025, 2026, and beyond. **There is too much on the line for us to lose.**
**[Leaders We Deserve can only be successful with your continued support, so can you rush a $5 contribution today? Anything you can give will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250310-1?refcode=em20250310-1833&amount=5&refcode2=1833_587540_gTb7sF&akid=1833%2E587540%2EgTb7sF)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250310-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250310-1833&refcode2=1833_587540_gTb7sF&akid=1833%2E587540%2EgTb7sF)**
Thank you for your consideration,
David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
* * *

clean_body: I firmly believe the NRA’s days are numbered. Mark my words, Peter: Gen Z will outlive the NRA. The Daily Beast analyzed the NRA’s tax returns last year. They aren’t pretty. In fact, the pro-gun group’s revenue has been on the decline for years now, especially since Parkland. Last year, their fundraising was at its lowest point since 2008. And since 2018 they have lost over 1 million members. I firmly believe that the NRA’s days are numbered — and as their power and influence fade into the dustbin of history, we will replace their corrupt, purchased politicians with a new generation of bold, courageous leaders who aren’t afraid to take urgent, necessary action to stop the scourge of gun violence in America. I co-founded Leaders We Deserve because Gen Z’s answer to the NRA is electing more and more young people to public office to counter their agenda. We founded Leaders We Deserve in 2023 to elect the next generation of leadership — and folks across the country are already helping us shatter expectations. Not only have tens of thousands of people just like you joined our movement and helped spread the word about our mission, we’ve already elected seven candidates since we started. In the days leading up to Virginia’s 2023 elections, we hit the streets to knock on doors and get out the vote for Nadarius Clark. Thanks to our supporters’ donations, we were proud to invest more than $100,000 to support Nadarius’s campaign. When all the ballots were counted, Nadarius won by less than 2,000 votes. Last November, we helped elect six more young progressive champions to state legislatures and Congress: Sarah McBride, Molly Cook, Bryce Berry, Dante Pittman, Christine Cockley, and Oscar De Los Santos. Leaders We Deserve is already playing an integral role in electing the next generation of leaders, and we’re counting on your continued support so we can keep winning these fights in 2025, 2026, and beyond. There is too much on the line for us to lose. Thank you for your consideration, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

name: Juanita, United We Dream Action
subject: Trump’s gold card.
body:
Trump announced the U.S. would begin selling gold cards. | | | Peter, Trump just offered a pathway to citizenship for the low, low price of $5,000,000. Last month, Trump announced the U.S. would begin selling “gold cards,” claiming the scheme would encourage wealthy people to immigrate and eventually lead to a decrease in the federal deficit. _Spoiler alert: This couldn’t be further from the truth._ **[We’re setting the record straight on this unprecedented immigration proposal, but first, can you chip in $25 to fuel our efforts today? Trump didn’t offer a VIP ticket to citizenship because he’s against _all_ immigration — he’s pushing this scheme because he doesn’t want black, brown, or low-income immigrants to have access to citizenship.
It doesn’t end at the gold card, Peter. Earlier that same month, Trump signed an executive order to allow _specifically_ white South Africans to fast-track their U.S. immigration process. Meanwhile, ICE agents have been deployed to our churches, schools, and places of work to kidnap our neighbors and intimidate our communities.
It’s mind-boggling. _It’s cruel._**_It’s racist._**
As this administration continues to criminalize the very existence of immigrants through mass kidnappings and registries, United We Dream Action is fighting for freedom for all every day.
**[You can power our immigrant youth-led movement at a time when it's needed most. clean_body: Trump announced the U.S. would begin selling gold cards. | | | Peter, Trump just offered a pathway to citizenship for the low, low price of $5,000,000. Last month, Trump announced the U.S. would begin selling “gold cards,” claiming the scheme would encourage wealthy people to immigrate and eventually lead to a decrease in the federal deficit. Spoiler alert: This couldn’t be further from the truth. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Trump didn’t offer a VIP ticket to citizenship because he’s against all immigration — he’s pushing this scheme because he doesn’t want black, brown, or low-income immigrants to have access to citizenship. It doesn’t end at the gold card, Peter. Earlier that same month, Trump signed an executive order to allow specifically white South Africans to fast-track their U.S. immigration process. Meanwhile, ICE agents have been deployed to our churches, schools, and places of work to kidnap our neighbors and intimidate our communities. It’s mind-boggling. It’s cruel.It’s racist. As this administration continues to criminalize the very existence of immigrants through mass kidnappings and registries, United We Dream Action is fighting for freedom for all every day. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Thank you for helping us build the power we need to win protections and a path to citizenship for our communities. — Juanita, United We Dream Action Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Breakup Notice
subject: It's complicated... But your membership doesn't have to be.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team.
Now’s your chance to reactivate, Friend.
|
---
| | |
Friend...

I'm not sure how to say this...

But I think it's time for us to face the truth...

**Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost.** We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. _**But now, it seems like you've moved on.**_

But I think it's time for us to face the truth... Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost. We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. But now, it seems like you've moved on. | | | | "Generic Button" I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team. subject: Republicans are to blame, plain and simple.

Our government is headed straight for a shutdown, and Republicans are to blame, Peter.

Instead of working with Democrats to pass a responsible budget, they’re shutting us out—**choosing to push Donald Trump’s extreme agenda rather than listening to the people they were elected to serve.**

Instead of making sure families can put food on the table and keep up with rising costs, they’re threatening devastating cuts to Medicaid, food assistance, and other vital programs that millions of Americans rely on. Instead of ensuring federal workers, service members, and everyday Americans get paid, they’re willing to grind the government to a halt—just to score political points.

**This is not leadership. It’s reckless, it’s cruel, and it’s completely avoidable.**

Kim wasn’t elected to watch extremists play games with people’s livelihoods. She’s on the frontlines, fighting tooth and nail to pass a responsible budget and keep our government running. But she can’t do this alone—she needs to show massive public opposition to these political stunts. We need to make it clear: _Americans don’t want a shutdown. We don’t want cuts to the programs we count on. We don’t want government officials prioritizing Trump over their own constituents._

name: DNC HQ
subject: Something you can do right now
body:
Call your Republican Senator and say NO.
---
Derek — **i****t’s time to take action.** House Republicans passed Donald Trump’s budget resolution that targets Medicaid and SNAP benefits — _programs that millions depend on_ — aiming to cut these essential lifelines to fund tax breaks for billionaires and their powerful allies. These cuts could have devastating consequences for people across the country, stripping lifesaving health care access from millions and leaving working families unable to put food on the table. [But this fight isn’t over. Call your Republican senator and tell them to say NO to Trump’s tax scam.](http://democrats.org/CallYourGOPSenator/?refcode=em_20250310_2937_fr&akid=2937%2E22930333%2E4yQP1-) **[CALL TODAY](http://democrats.org/CallYourGOPSenator/?refcode=em_20250310_2937_fr&akid=2937%2E22930333%2E4yQP1-)** You can follow the script we’ve provided, letting your senator know that essential programs like Medicaid should be strengthened, not sacrificed for the benefit of the ultra-wealthy. This isn't just a policy debate — it's a fight for the well-being of people across the country. [Please, call your Republican senator today and urge them to say no to Trump’s tax scam. ](http://democrats.org/CallYourGOPSenator/?refcode=em_20250310_2937_fr&akid=2937%2E22930333%2E4yQP1-) Thank you for everything you do, The Democrats P.S. Here are some tips for calling so you can make the most impact:
1. Let your senator know you are their constituent! Introduce yourself and share where you live.
2. Make it personal. How does Trump’s tax scam affect you and your family?
3. End with a final ask of them — stand up for working families instead of folding to billionaires.

**[CALL TODAY](http://democrats.org/CallYourGOPSenator/?refcode=em_20250310_2937_fr&akid=2937%2E22930333%2E4yQP1-)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Peter – This is Troy Downing, a veteran, patriot, and proud Trump ally.

**I'm fed up with Washington's Swamp, and I know you are, too. That's why I'm fighting to take America back—and I need your help.**

President Trump is leading the charge to secure our borders, crush crime, and unleash American energy dominance. But the Deep State and the Left are hell-bent on stopping him. That's why we need a Congress that's got his back.

As a veteran of the U.S. Air Force, I've seen firsthand the damage that "woke" ideology can do to our military. However, President Trump is taking bold action to restore our military's greatness, and I'm proud to stand with him.

But here's the deal: _**we're at a crossroads.**_ We can either continue pushing forward with the America First agenda or let the Swamp win.

I know where I stand. What about you?

I implore you to join me in this fight, Peter. Stand with me, President Trump, and our MAGA allies as we take on the Establishment and fight for the future of our country. **[**Tap now to join our team and help us make America great again:**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMxMF9HQS1aUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTE5MTYtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMTBfR0EtWlAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjExOTE2LTI4OTkifQ/7I2rskanHiWsS2RADwGemw)**

name: Eric Warmoth, Finance Director
subject: This is what real leadership looks like.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Donald Trump is leading a Republican Party hell-bent on gutting our social safety nets.
Elon Musk is using his wealth to prop up right-wing extremism.
And Congressional Republicans are falling over themselves to prove their loyalty to our new extremist leaders.
But every single day, Lateefah Simon is standing up to their reckless agenda —fighting for working people, for seniors, for immigrants, and for a future where power isn’t hoarded by billionaires and right-wing politicians. Can we count on you to support Lateefah in the fight by becoming a recurring donor today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250310_monthly_act&recurring=1]
Just this past month, Lateefah:
✅ Called on Speaker Johnson to stop proposed cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, which millions rely on.
✅ Joined Rep. Maxine Waters and over 200 Democrats to fight back against the illegal effort to shut down the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, an agency that holds big banks accountable.
✅ Toured a research lab at UC Berkeley, learning firsthand how Republican-driven NIH cuts would halt crucial advancements in sickle cell and dementia research.
✅ Held a “Know Your Rights” roundtable for immigrants and refugees.
✅ Passed her first bill, the "Assisting Small Businesses, Not Fraudsters Act," through the House. 🎉
✅ Delivered the Working Families Party’s response to the President’s address, boldly advocating for working people. She even walked out on Trump, refusing to stand by and listen to him spew hate and bigotry.
She came to DC to fight for those left behind—and she’s never backed down.
This is what real leadership looks like. And this is why I’m asking you to become a monthly donor today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250310_monthly_act&recurring=1]
Our work takes resources. We’re not funded by billionaires like Musk or shady corporate PACs. We rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep Lateefah fighting—and knowing we can count on your donation each month makes a huge difference.
Even just $10 a month makes a massive impact. It ensures Lateefah and our team can plan ahead as we counter Trump’s extremism, expose MAGA’s harmful agenda, and deliver real results for the people who need them most. Can we count on you to step up today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250310_monthly_act&amount=10&recurring=1]
START A $10 MONTHLY DONATION → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250310_monthly_act&amount=10&recurring=1]
We can’t afford to back down. Not now, not ever.
Thank you,
Eric Warmoth
Finance Director, Team Lateefah
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250310_monthly_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250310_monthly_act] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.
