clean_body: [] Friend, Donald Trump is leading a Republican Party hell-bent on gutting our social safety nets. Elon Musk is using his wealth to prop up right-wing extremism. And Congressional Republicans are falling over themselves to prove their loyalty to our new extremist leaders. But every single day, Lateefah Simon is standing up to their reckless agenda —fighting for working people, for seniors, for immigrants, and for a future where power isn’t hoarded by billionaires and right-wing politicians. Can we count on you to support Lateefah in the fight by becoming a recurring donor today? [] Just this past month, Lateefah: ✅ Called on Speaker Johnson to stop proposed cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, which millions rely on. ✅ Joined Rep. Maxine Waters and over 200 Democrats to fight back against the illegal effort to shut down the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, an agency that holds big banks accountable. ✅ Toured a research lab at UC Berkeley, learning firsthand how Republican-driven NIH cuts would halt crucial advancements in sickle cell and dementia research. ✅ Held a “Know Your Rights” roundtable for immigrants and refugees. ✅ Passed her first bill, the "Assisting Small Businesses, Not Fraudsters Act," through the House. 🎉 ✅ Delivered the Working Families Party’s response to the President’s address, boldly advocating for working people. She even walked out on Trump, refusing to stand by and listen to him spew hate and bigotry. She came to DC to fight for those left behind—and she’s never backed down. This is what real leadership looks like. And this is why I’m asking you to become a monthly donor today. [] Our work takes resources. We’re not funded by billionaires like Musk or shady corporate PACs. We rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep Lateefah fighting—and knowing we can count on your donation each month makes a huge difference. Even just $10 a month makes a massive impact. It ensures Lateefah and our team can plan ahead as we counter Trump’s extremism, expose MAGA’s harmful agenda, and deliver real results for the people who need them most. Can we count on you to step up today? [] START A $10 MONTHLY DONATION → [] We can’t afford to back down. Not now, not ever. Thank you, Eric Warmoth Finance Director, Team Lateefah [] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion. To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] [] [] [] Lateefah for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 United States Paid for by Lateefah for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Justice Democrats
subject: ICE arrests Palestinian student activist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

On Saturday night, Department of Homeland Security (DHS) agents arrested
and detained Mahmoud Khalil, a Palestinian activist and recent Columbia
University graduate who helped lead pro-Palestinian protests and
solidarity events on campus last year.

These plain-clothes agents arrested Mahmoud claiming his student visa was
being revoked by the State Department, even though he has a green card.
They then said that is being revoked too. Mahmoud is now reportedly being
held in an ICE detention center in Louisiana.

Why are they doing this? Because of Donald Trump’s executive orders
prohibiting what his administration considers to be “anti-Semitism” and
“activities aligned to Hamas” — in other words, they’re targeting anyone
who leads or participates in pro-Palestinian actions.

Trump’s Secretary of State Marco Rubio later issued this threat on
Twitter:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250310-palestinian-activists/?source=em20250310-36491&akid=36491%2E1203867%2EENxCo_ ][IMG]

This is a blatant attack on our freedom of speech,
Peter. As Justice Democrats’ Rep. Summer Lee
said, “Kidnapping an activist and jailing him in the middle of the night
is a brazen act of authoritarianism. Punishing dissent by revoking legal
status is a dangerous precedent to set.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250310-palestinian-activists/?source=em20250310-36491&akid=36491%2E1203867%2EENxCo_ ]We must fight back and demand Mahmoud is freed. Add your name to our
petition calling for the immediate release of Mahmoud from DHS detention
NOW!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250310-palestinian-activists/?source=em20250310-36491&akid=36491%2E1203867%2EENxCo_ ]Add Your Name

We cannot let this far-right administration get away with violating the
rights of people like Mahmoud and criminalizing political dissent. If they
do, this will go far beyond punishing the pro-Palestinian movement and
could impact any one of us for speaking out against anything.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250310-36491-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36491_1203867_ENxCo_&akid=36491%2E1203867%2EENxCo_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36491%2E1203867%2EENxCo_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Is Trump a Russian asset?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
I’ll be holding the administration’s feet to the fire in the Senate to make sure they answer for every betrayal.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103621248/532696205/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmJjM2VmOC1lOWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1bRvCc6uIlTxgDkNRC0vQwvKHH0M8B6xed6gRVH6UQ=&emci=6817717b-e2fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ffbc3ef8-e9fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Is Trump a Russian asset? This question is more salient today than ever before given Trump's conduct. I put the question to Trump's nominee for Deputy Secretary of State last week. Here's why: Right now, every move Trump is making on Ukraine is straight out of the Kremlin's playbook:
* Spread propaganda that Ukraine started the war
* Reframe freedom-loving Ukraine as a dictatorship
* Cut off military aid
* Block intel sharing
* Demean Zelenskyy in the Oval Office
* Weaken the US alliance with Europe that has served our security for 80 years

If Trump were a Russian asset, is there anything more favorable he could be doing? Oh yes, Trump could also short-circuit our cyber campaign that responds to Russian hacking, election interference, and sabotage that have targeted both the US and our European allies. _Wait... he did that last week._ **Who benefits? Putin. Who loses? Us.** I'm not letting Trump cozy up to Putin without a fight. The American people deserve leaders who fight for them—not for corrupt deals or foreign dictators. clean_body: I’ll be holding the administration’s feet to the fire in the Senate to make sure they answer for every betrayal. | | | | Is Trump a Russian asset? This question is more salient today than ever before given Trump's conduct. I put the question to Trump's nominee for Deputy Secretary of State last week. Here's why: Right now, every move Trump is making on Ukraine is straight out of the Kremlin's playbook: Spread propaganda that Ukraine started the war Reframe freedom-loving Ukraine as a dictatorship Cut off military aid Block intel sharing Demean Zelenskyy in the Oval Office Weaken the US alliance with Europe that has served our security for 80 years If Trump were a Russian asset, is there anything more favorable he could be doing? Oh yes, Trump could also short-circuit our cyber campaign that responds to Russian hacking, election interference, and sabotage that have targeted both the US and our European allies. Wait... he did that last week. Who benefits? Putin. Who loses? Us. I'm not letting Trump cozy up to Putin without a fight. The American people deserve leaders who fight for them—not for corrupt deals or foreign dictators. I'll be holding the administration's feet to the fire in the Senate to make sure they answer for every betrayal. Onward! Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

Peter — Republicans are wreaking havoc on this country, but we're putting up a fight on all fronts.

**Our candidates** are battle-tested, and at every level of government, they're pushing back against the chaos and corruption of the Trump administration.
**Our agenda** is all about keeping you informed and engaged in new and exciting ways (more to come 👀). At the same time, we won't stop calling out Republicans who remain determined to strip Americans of their fundamental freedoms, whether on social media, in the press, or on the campaign trail.
**Our members** power this whole movement. We would not be able to do this work without this pro-choice community. That's why we are launching our FINAL 2025 Membership drive today!

clean_body: LAUNCHING: four-day March Membership drive | = 🚀 Today, we're launching our four-day March Membership Drive! This week is your FINAL opportunity this year to join the team supporting Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot and get your own membership card. = | = Peter — Republicans are wreaking havoc on this country, but we're putting up a fight on all fronts. Our candidates are battle-tested, and at every level of government, they're pushing back against the chaos and corruption of the Trump administration. Our agenda is all about keeping you informed and engaged in new and exciting ways (more to come 👀). At the same time, we won't stop calling out Republicans who remain determined to strip Americans of their fundamental freedoms, whether on social media, in the press, or on the campaign trail. Our members power this whole movement. We would not be able to do this work without this pro-choice community. That's why we are launching our FINAL 2025 Membership drive today! Our goal : We're hoping to sign up 10,000 more EMILYs List members over the next four days. This week is your very last chance to activate your membership for 2025! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With you in the fight, the EMILYs List Digital team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. ### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: I can't bear the thought of life without him
body:
| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=899cd79510af46e3a4fa5e73d795ba98&_e=SjTddQ8vs5fg8I7dEwhvFe8LinQ008nYEwGw6bot6VHz_b94oJXBDCecbINXsV4hlprNdDpxdI9Hwd9TqjUdpaOIE4eB1YpQDzYBHe_fhq3o6mjGRV3caDhHqyuMpKWVxORt-KbldzO2BFBFrtYX8kldGbb85e_VprWgr4jXhpjqg80fnFpqDcFur9XwTFx7XSquqyV5zhg7JKMJxS76HCVlevZOjC-cyule48KZ1y9EkEmISkdEzvm6cblg6v3ug_1Gh3XMcjHkSWMyaB4nA7BeT9GBUMK17dGdVGOmkSCbrgPcgEYdeFEEd9yVaybN_9e0a4fXJZGgAZ-WC2cLVhQIznadFjswdhD-DSWlph4YQJBdCGX4K64Ju_M2rrXrZ_2Vpb7LlLYPHoCCeCb4Ww%3D%3D)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=899cd79510af46e3a4fa5e73d795ba98&_e=SjTddQ8vs5fg8I7dEwhvFe8LinQ008nYEwGw6bot6VHz_b94oJXBDCecbINXsV4hlprNdDpxdI9Hwd9TqjUdpaOIE4eB1YpQDzYBHe_fhq3o6mjGRV3caDhHqyuMpKWVxORt-KbldzO2BFBFrtYX8kldGbb85e_VprWgr4jXhpjqg80fnFpqDcFur9XwTFx7XSquqyV5zhg7JKMJxS76HCVlevZOjC-cyule48KZ1y8-mugHilmLE4JbDu22PfyQJ9uu-Y8ne3O8DVkfWOQ-vn1nWQhy59cdsY9Vq0XYOCyyGG-sjT3lpPg-SVb2EScFjBSuzm3JFP8xQabkvpTKmUaq7any8h2Kwule2V_kHS3qIGyff3O15a24IwNZfQGD1bLsJ4E5WRgM3aWgkVlu9w%3D%3D)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=899cd79510af46e3a4fa5e73d795ba98&_e=SjTddQ8vs5fg8I7dEwhvFe8LinQ008nYEwGw6bot6VHz_b94oJXBDCecbINXsV4hlprNdDpxdI9Hwd9TqjUdpaOIE4eB1YpQDzYBHe_fhq3o6mjGRV3caDhHqyuMpKWVxORt-KbldzO2BFBFrtYX8kldGbb85e_VprWgr4jXhpjqg80fnFpqDcFur9XwTFx7XSquqyV5zhg7JKMJxS76HCVlevZOjC-cyule48KZ1y8PDZ4anGobYqTcnO5W85BvPnJplB7ibu0-o61aGTsxnlJwr8TNophophLSJs6ix-a6eEyXOghJPgajEH3Sxi1jOWeFqFjfKoAlOPb5hvPq-XA51yHNfgZiaz7HYFGt62-mIXZQVNs_bsBYKg8SHg_X20wAsSGZGHz4lSr0nEjjEw%3D%3D)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=899cd79510af46e3a4fa5e73d795ba98&_e=SjTddQ8vs5fg8I7dEwhvFe8LinQ008nYEwGw6bot6VHz_b94oJXBDCecbINXsV4hlprNdDpxdI9Hwd9TqjUdpaOIE4eB1YpQDzYBHe_fhq3o6mjGRV3caDhHqyuMpKWVxORt-KbldzO2BFBFrtYX8kldGbb85e_VprWgr4jXhpjqg80fnFpqDcFur9XwTFx7XSquqyV5zhg7JKMJxS76HCVlevZOjC-cyule48KZ1y9jcZJSh6pUXjUkjIs1yNNiXezeX33scWBSng50k8l8zVVk5LEYWZD8cHQy2Gg1IMr28-Pu3y3GIc1gGCaaimY8xVVjBSoTq0Y_cPwY44VbAh0-Abj65QpRxcVNilT-iRg3O3umQzLEegO6EZJGhe6Mhj-_L_MlFNPNRJCr7ZIQhQ%3D%3D)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=899cd79510af46e3a4fa5e73d795ba98&_e=SjTddQ8vs5fg8I7dEwhvFe8LinQ008nYEwGw6bot6VHz_b94oJXBDCecbINXsV4hlprNdDpxdI9Hwd9TqjUdpaOIE4eB1YpQDzYBHe_fhq3o6mjGRV3caDhHqyuMpKWVxORt-KbldzO2BFBFrtYX8kldGbb85e_VprWgr4jXhpjqg80fnFpqDcFur9XwTFx7XSquqyV5zhg7JKMJxS76HCVlevZOjC-cyule48KZ1y91P9WOTnf8Sg2j91vCwGsZY7Q0Cd7jafGXCL2JmlmSRwQuXZ87UjTYaJ9bzRnYP5N-riTTbfFic617UCV5Z0CeZeC-0O64t18n_-y1EeeIcMjs96Yey9qJuysqAIB6KxLpwUnKzRNC0dz0gFQZoO6t5dfGzWyamLJJ9GRmdHsWtQ%3D%3D)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=899cd79510af46e3a4fa5e73d795ba98&_e=SjTddQ8vs5fg8I7dEwhvFe8LinQ008nYEwGw6bot6VHz_b94oJXBDCecbINXsV4hlprNdDpxdI9Hwd9TqjUdpaOIE4eB1YpQDzYBHe_fhq3o6mjGRV3caDhHqyuMpKWVxORt-KbldzO2BFBFrtYX8kldGbb85e_VprWgr4jXhpjqg80fnFpqDcFur9XwTFx7XSquqyV5zhg7JKMJxS76HCVlevZOjC-cyule48KZ1y91Rzkeo3RrCt4fHC2TxGD7jTKR6gNqglUfosF4pe1b9ygzH51AMZpDNVjmfsh9SWt2Rb9Bl60nycIOgWmDTsdJ_bxDmYgs7ig40d5olU35InBzyRA9Bj_aupuj9SBSxrlEU6rcf2wUjXLfv7fVI3IifYYmvx4HptnHMrNp-fnG1A%3D%3D)**_
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=899cd79510af46e3a4fa5e73d795ba98&_e=SjTddQ8vs5fg8I7dEwhvFe8LinQ008nYEwGw6bot6VHz_b94oJXBDCecbINXsV4hlprNdDpxdI9Hwd9TqjUdpaOIE4eB1YpQDzYBHe_fhq3o6mjGRV3caDhHqyuMpKWVxORt-KbldzO2BFBFrtYX8kldGbb85e_VprWgr4jXhpjqg80fnFpqDcFur9XwTFx7XSquqyV5zhg7JKMJxS76HCVlevZOjC-cyule48KZ1y_M6SguFTXzLAFitanlg1O-GSYwSrPLB8exA8WPvqHh95ZI2u-X7kjBjcBZv5U4nW0oI2Xic2u75hD3RxEgSrvJuU7flB1kvGzqO7lRztnWzLLl_0qkx7GjN4_aKwwUcoHJBF5KRmZM1W5ISFifOSvRFcjNBuEm7RirtxrtW3N8Gg%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---

name: Kamala Harris & Tim Walz
subject: Something happening that you need to know about.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by cutting programs people need to survive -- programs like Medicaid, nutrition assistance, and even veterans health care
body:
There is something happening in Washington, D.C. that you need to know about.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=460%2E2563979%2ErgOzHt)

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hi, Tim Walz here.Tim Walz
Kamala too.Kamala Harris |
| Together again.Tim Walz
Because there is something happening in Washington, D.C. that you need to know about.Kamala Harris |
| As you read this, Donald Trump and his Republican Party are trying to pass massive tax breaks that will benefit the wealthiest people and corporations in the country.Tim Walz
Paid for by cutting programs people need to survive -- programs like Medicaid, nutrition assistance, and even veterans health care.Kamala Harris |
| It was all part of Project 2025. The project they denied over and over again.Tim Walz
And now it's happening.Kamala Harris |
| So we're asking Democrats everywhere to make their voices heard to stop the cuts to these lifesaving programs.Tim Walz
The Democratic National Committee is leading that effort, but they can't do it alone.Kamala Harris |
| The DNC is also working tirelessly to flip the House and the Senate in the next election so we can have a check on Trump in Congress.Tim Walz
That's why we're here, once again, asking:Kamala Harris |
| [Can you please use this link to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee? Their average online donation is around $50. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is lots and lots of people are donating to stop Trump and the Republicans from hurting millions of Americans just to fund tax cuts for the rich. ](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2774?source=em250310-kamala-tim&t=2&akid=460%2E2563979%2ErgOzHt)Tim Walz
If everyone reading this chipped in even just a few bucks, the DNC would have the resources they need to get it done.Kamala Harris |
| But not everyone does.Tim Walz
So we're counting on those who understand how important this moment is -- and how important a strong Democratic Party is -- to help out today.Kamala Harris | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2774?source=em250310-kamala-tim&t=3&akid=460%2E2563979%2ErgOzHt)
* * *
Thank you in advance for answering our call. It means a lot. – Tim & Kamala –
Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. name: Gay Valimont
subject: Trump’s Betrayal of Our Veterans—We Must Fight Back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Greetings, this is Gay Valimont, FL-1 candidate and proud supporter of our veterans.
I come from a proud military family. My loved ones served this country with honor, trusting that America would have their backs when they came home. But now, Trump is turning his back on them.
His plan to slash 80,000 Veterans’ Agency jobs will devastate veterans' healthcare, forcing longer wait times, cutting critical services, and leaving those who served without the care they earned.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/677275626579485130384657745369336A3471662F6356796636414F366C74646264613964336F7435594B7171653662384D7A652B5031344832513957736959/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-10%20at%204.25.57%E2%80%AFPM.png]
This isn’t just policy—it’s personal. Veterans sacrificed for us. Now Trump wants to balance the budget on their backs while funneling money into corporate profits. We cannot let this stand.
The VA expanded under President Biden to support veterans impacted by toxic burn pits and provide the care they deserve. But Trump is gutting those gains, firing independent watchdogs who keep the VA accountable, and putting politics ahead of patriotism. He’s not making the VA more efficient— he’s making it weaker.
I refuse to let this betrayal go unanswered. If you believe that our veterans deserve better, I need you with me. We only have 22 days until special elections. Before then, we must gather the support needed to win.
Will you chip in today to help me fight for our veterans and hold Trump accountable? Every dollar helps us send a loud and clear message: America takes care of those who serve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/677275626579485130384657745369336A3471662F6356796636414F366C74646264613964336F7435594B7171653662384D7A652B5031344832513957736959/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-10%20at%204.25.33%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Thank you for standing up for our veterans.
With gratitude,
Gay Valimont
Democratic Candidate, FL-1
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]
Paid For By Gay Valimont
Gay Valimont For Congress
PO Box 1258
Gulf Breeze, FL 32562
United States

Wisconsin’s radical Democrat governor just proposed a shocking change: officially scrubbing the words like “mother” and “father” from state laws and replacing them with gender-neutral language. Meanwhile, I’m in Washington fighting for ✅ Securing our border and blocking the left’s open-border agenda ✅ Holding the government accountable for its abuse of power ✅ Defending American jobs from China’s economic warfare ✅ Exposing the corruption of the Biden administration But the battle is far from over. As we can see, the left didn’t learn their lesson—they’re still pushing their radical policies as hard as ever. That’s why we can’t let up now. If we don’t fight back, they’ll keep steamrolling their agenda through. ********** ******** ******** ******** Together, we’ll the values that make Wisconsin - and America - great. subject: Project 2025 is alive and well
body:
Texas Organizing Project's aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10]Peter, Trump’s approval ratings are PLUMMETING, and his disastrous joint address certainly didn’t help.

His term so far has Project 2025 written all over it, and we need to fight back. Before we unpack his ratings, can you rush a contribution to support TOP PAC’s organizing efforts in Texas? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10]

RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10]

→ Trump and his administration continue to attack federal workers across the country with reckless firings from DOGE to threatening massive budget cuts to critical government programming.

→ The Department of Education continues to remain in jeopardy as Trump and his team waver on whether or not it will be disbanded. Such an executive order would hurt students in low-income areas the most, along with students who rely on learning accommodations.

→ Trump’s tariffs are having a negative impact on the economy and it’s clear that it’ll cost Americans more than save us. From sowing confusion about when and how they’ll be rolled out to the panic reflected in the falling stock market, it’s a disaster.

With all this in mind, it’s no wonder his approval ratings are circling the drain. Unfortunately, he’s still in office. That’s why we need to act now to curb the damage.

It’s more critical than ever for us to elect progressives who will protect freedoms for ALL Texans — regardless of race, income, age, or gender. Can we count on you to chip in any amount to support our mission to build a better Texas? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. body:
Tuesday night’s vote says it all | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9612e86bae2c41bd880aad5988402f99&_e=_doSL-aSdwgXe1UGo2vQRtXO3wrfCo8uhFZ5AWeciPrFdFN4P3H8fMbD-I9ICy5gsmwDoQ5FwCjZmnWXxlswcjVOk8WZ8XKM4kLm8Cil0XOsCVAvdhzSkjHo3h_b_upyG33AOCodalLnUzW2JWixP3T0ItAxm49hiGfhnchl2bxWosIN2UbxBDnK5KYuIiY_2lLVaFhturJmrhjpUqenwwKaLO2EJrz0BVj86W77Mr3WNSez7R1ArnAEHAOa38sfsGwE8WFSZr9MqDNg6f0ZwTKRvY7jG-_5hx5LWtLxktHE3x8ZnsSqTgm_Pu28IXLarprAYZJMFdvsPyx1hY7n4I2ZC3-FBpytaLPWHRwVy8ReAUd7xRm5GNnxsgKXfyQsCJzpQuJ9paXdMUfmwnBUkT7Jxkai9XD8EepYpFqHdE8%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

If, on any day since November, you’ve wondered why Democrats lost the election, you don’t need to look any further than Tuesday night’s failed vote to advance The Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act.

As the father of two girls, I was very proud to support this commonsense legislation that would have protected women's athletics. Women and girls deserve the right to compete against other women and girls - not men masquerading as women.

This isn’t crazy or controversial, yet every Democrat voting in the Senate on Tuesday evening opposed the bill.

This, in a nutshell, is why Democrats lost in November.

They’ve lost the pulse of the American people.

**[Will you contribute a few dollars today to help ensure we can continue advocating for this incredibly important legislation?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9612e86bae2c41bd880aad5988402f99&_e=_doSL-aSdwgXe1UGo2vQRtXO3wrfCo8uhFZ5AWeciPrFdFN4P3H8fMbD-I9ICy5gsmwDoQ5FwCjZmnWXxlswcjVOk8WZ8XKM4kLm8Cil0XOsCVAvdhzSkjHo3h_b_upyG33AOCodalLnUzW2JWixP3T0ItAxm49hiGfhnchl2bxWosIN2UbxBDnK5KYuIiY_2lLVaFhturJmrhjpUqenwwKaLO2EJrz0BVj86W77Mr3WNSez7R1ArnAEHAOa38sfsGwE8WFSZr9MqDNg6f0ZwUzaNaCkzEWrQm2FcBQFdfXnniTwFwiYBi9n8g0-XmNCf59BMUamZ8AbcbmBRnQXuEavuLDyFO3_xoW9N05Qk8aPVdv_QrVEhWDBf0XGKrAgVlNz7zaJzOTvIgkDxX2p2tLa8LcrfjK0Hjb5CD9ehko%3D)** **

[**CHIP IN $1 OR MORE IF YOU BELIEVE GIRLS’ SPORTS ARE FOR GIRLS**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9612e86bae2c41bd880aad5988402f99&_e=_doSL-aSdwgXe1UGo2vQRtXO3wrfCo8uhFZ5AWeciPrFdFN4P3H8fMbD-I9ICy5gsmwDoQ5FwCjZmnWXxlswcjVOk8WZ8XKM4kLm8Cil0XOsCVAvdhzSkjHo3h_b_upyG33AOCodalLnUzW2JWixP3T0ItAxm49hiGfhnchl2bxWosIN2UbxBDnK5KYuIiY_2lLVaFhturJmrhjpUqenwwKaLO2EJrz0BVj86W77Mr3WNSez7R1ArnAEHAOa38sfsGwE8WFSZr9MqDNg6f0ZwQSUgGrTVTYd1bEzd7tpA9P64fvF9MTdeLkxqn-pXPC51Aus2WzK6T1njoi6FTKJ6cVKq3-uFcXjNTdwLzbyGQAmYi5uBxu55guGdvJuscmsI_4KdtBkJlFrY2Jker7n9ICHFuW3PZaQ930ywxHcIYc%3D) **

name: Truth to Power
subject: This is what we can do together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39515%2E3422442%2EB9RQku)
Derek,
From defunding critical research to attacking life-saving vaccines, the Trump Administration has waged a dangerous war on science.
We can’t stay silent—and we aren’t.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250310-3?refcode=em20250310-39515&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39515_3422442_B9RQku&akid=39515%2E3422442%2EB9RQku)
Scientific advancements save lives and help all of us, even when they don’t make money for Big Pharma. We all benefit from how research and innovation strengthen our economy and make our country more globally competitive.
Scientists stand up for truth, and so do we here at Truth to Power. We stand with researchers and federal workers, and we join the chorus of voices calling on our government to support science.
We’re doing our part to elect more leaders who will invest in what our families need, including important research, instead of giveaways for the ultra-wealthy. **[Will you join us by chipping in $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250310-3?refcode=em20250310-39515&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39515_3422442_B9RQku&akid=39515%2E3422442%2EB9RQku)**
Thanks,
Team TTP

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250310-39515&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39515_3422442_B9RQku&akid=39515%2E3422442%2EB9RQku)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39515%2E3422442%2EB9RQku).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: DOGE is on the ballot this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
As Trump and Musk continue to tout DOGE and their firings of the federal workforce, the impact on Virginians and Virginia’s Governor’s race in November will be felt:

| As Trump and Musk continue to tout DOGE and their firings of the federal workforce, the impact on Virginians and Virginia’s Governor’s race in November will be felt:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103625087/532708120/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-03-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQ5MDIyMmEtZjNmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=774Fb84aIDV4RqrZckmB6fQouQtU5aEjXPSDZaw3ke0=)
While my opponent, as well as Virginia’s current Republican Governor, continue to praise DOGE’s cuts to the federal workforce, Virginian families are sitting at home scared. These aren’t just numbers on a page — they are real people with real jobs who are feeling the fallout.

Virginia is home to more than 320,000 federal workers – many of whom have dedicated their lives to public service. They don’t want to hear Governor Youngkin’s hollow reassurances that they’ll easily be able to find another job. These are hardworking men and women whose careers are more than just a paycheck – they are on a mission to which they have devoted themselves. This mission of public service should be admired, not attacked.

I’ve traveled across our Commonwealth and heard directly from Virginians about their concerns — it comes up no matter where I go. As Governor, I will always stand up for Virginia jobs, regardless of who occupies the Oval Office.

[_**Virginians deserve a leader who will stand up for them and their livelihoods. So, I hope you’ll join me in my campaign to flip the Governor’s office this November:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103625088/532708121/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-03-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQ5MDIyMmEtZjNmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=774Fb84aIDV4RqrZckmB6fQouQtU5aEjXPSDZaw3ke0=)

clean_body: As Trump and Musk continue to tout DOGE and their firings of the federal workforce, the impact on Virginians and Virginia’s Governor’s race in November will be felt: | As Trump and Musk continue to tout DOGE and their firings of the federal workforce, the impact on Virginians and Virginia’s Governor’s race in November will be felt: = While my opponent, as well as Virginia’s current Republican Governor, continue to praise DOGE’s cuts to the federal workforce, Virginian families are sitting at home scared. These aren’t just numbers on a page — they are real people with real jobs who are feeling the fallout. Virginia is home to more than 320,000 federal workers – many of whom have dedicated their lives to public service. They don’t want to hear Governor Youngkin’s hollow reassurances that they’ll easily be able to find another job. These are hardworking men and women whose careers are more than just a paycheck – they are on a mission to which they have devoted themselves. This mission of public service should be admired, not attacked. I’ve traveled across our Commonwealth and heard directly from Virginians about their concerns — it comes up no matter where I go. As Governor, I will always stand up for Virginia jobs, regardless of who occupies the Oval Office. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: What the media hides about birthright citizenship
body:
Did you know that America’s Founders rejected birthright citizenship—the idea that someone who is born within our country’s borders is automatically a citizen?

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/x1JecSo47FpTSU1xvK9l79VZ6-feaO3yUPWfVMUUnE22JB_Czr3GCbqbmNRS8fq_dgEl3Q95nXjcATPHsgd2O31-a5d2qXcT9u6n1bdcaxfE-VQ-V0QP3mhJURHzeGG0TEXWSA_yig7gkk6Bt3YqbL4vFf3z1Wb0zKYEqpmqZgx_mXRr0HN0bnzg/pOA9sIhJNNvtpQv2-koM85E4V_GivDbg/6)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/duN7PqvRjvPoCo22SZal82ieK3_KM6K19VFrcFgYsnATJJ4S-VkoMCDBf8xGFP21T3w0_p7Wk4yaSR2vPQmoDbLveW3jvnyjdOiKiif_LAxkR-6S1Idb1uInWof8ps1m0wSPeQv-fcJPBfC87FMjyjqz2joZdGkwYE7D9irBmgbjRbwiwhZ6PbKPQerpBELZpUKf8TQCao1ddk9-pHdXGUuOI9Hrx98j7AcC4fCBJ3V6AvvPQF8XjOLsFAWTMyerGcVs_FNNyjV0KOgEOoATfc2A4VuYo1RLMNMqLZPzEahKbq1Hhu0olGV63nRSCjh6yxT1xE98KEMMfDm_zVdVN0G2swPLRbUtQsYFApHngzFDzvFQ0Sker1OQA5HUpg5B_LBNpWFI0-hJvB9d4ALk4x-9OhT44pv6EuVSr6YW7WqBaWGL_mcbhgjrSBrepTJN0q7AS7StGYWZ92kdkOtaJ8Xm/a3nGI2kth4ZZxhKfRcyz-pUKCeXVy0CA/6)
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/E3uvxmC1uBwxY8ivDxLLvlvbwOrp57G9Dkm_BG79XjZjg0Zz0ze9S9AoXiVYtgqv4ZCyCULODSL69MZvbZPaT9-5h2ouaB00Jsp1vm62AMpCZofT4xMukjM4fmXiynXt57P74uznRamebQewGA7zFE5vI3OhUymo0IOoJkO0kyv5HsAxNlWQtVM0t-Z_4F3xqYJkpPEizynmEIUi_Lbx8gBFtS2N5vlfbdPjhuPbmZj_--tiB7o_QpeArlMLsRTA5zSw2NMbkBVT1JWtFW0FADoB4M_Ol1RkJdkB54csOoGZopSM2MMeI9qWxLayB8PZnQy9f05_GwF16rpfDRmzHq6JBnY-WlNg0mZ2U6zIhHeofy_zZtivSPu1mhU15kckWrKqFe5XpxqexIivWlnXQcA-fksRD5kTmXHSla8A3Fhscr3fpGAgF4f62NdjIJ40PZqsw2LthtiLMzT2x8m8gMET/9DFIgZXloxz4qBBT0BwdI8Qr9E5A8EGM/6)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12926443?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

My fellow legislators and I had a great first week of the 2025 Legislative Session! Over the last several months, we have been working hard for our individual communities and state during interim committee weeks, and now, we’re excited to build on our efforts during session. In the Free State of Florida, we stand firmly behind President Trump’s America-First priorities and are ready to be champions for freedom and common sense in the upcoming weeks. As the legislative session gets underway, I look forward to keeping you updated on my sponsored bills and any important news happening in our Capital City.

As always, my office is here to serve you! Please do not hesitate to [contact my team](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=fda5389497&e=d1c1b9864f) if you need assistance with anything. We would be happy to help in any way we can!

Before I left for Tallahassee, I had a productive week in the district. In today’s newsletter, I will share a quick recap of my activities back in Marion County.
---
| | **Monday, February 24 - Hate Ends Now: The Cattle Car Exhibit **
---
|
---
---
| On Monday, I had the honor of speaking to those who attended the **Hate Ends Now: The Cattle Car Exhibit** at Ocala Christian Academy. Now more than ever, it is necessary to come together to remember the egregious acts committed during the Holocaust. We must never forget and continue to educate, because as we have seen, history can and does repeat itself. **Together, we can make our world a better place and push back on hate and ignorance.** That is why it is so important for the Hate Ends Now: The Cattle Car Exhibit to continue educating those on getting involved in preventing hate crimes.
---
| | **Tuesday, February 25 - Press Conference with Governor Ron DeSantis**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| Tuesday’s press conference with Governor Ron DeSantis at the **Don Garlits Museum of Drag Racing** was exciting for Marion County. He announced the groundbreaking of the new auxiliary lanes to be added to the stretch of State Rd 44 in Wildwood to State Rd 326 in Ocala. With this part of the **Moving Florida Forward initiative** , we will finally begin to feel a sense of relief on I-75 in just a few years. This project was not set to start for another 10-15 years, but under the leadership of the Governor and Transportation Secretary Jared Perdue, we will see relief much sooner than that. **A question to leave with you: Did you know that the Ocala portion of I-75 is the most heavily trafficked stretch on I-75?**
---
| | **Wednesday, February 26 - Ocala Metro Chamber & Economic Partnership’s Annual Luncheon**
---
|
---
| In the middle of the week, it was great to join the **Ocala Metro Chamber & Economic Partnership** for their annual luncheon. At the luncheon, we discussed “how the power of partnership is what drives us forward.” The Ocala/ Marion County area would not be where it is today without the partnerships that take place between our businesses.
---
| | **Thursday, February 27 - Ribbon Cutting for the Expansion of Kimberly’s Center for Child Protection**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| On Thursday, I had the honor of attending the ribbon cutting for the much-needed building expansion of **Kimberly’s Center for Child Protection**. This expansion was made possible thanks to Governor DeSantis, the Marion County Board of Commissioners, and generous donors. The expansion will allow for DCF, local law enforcement, and Kimberly’s Center to provide more services to children who have been abused and neglected.
---
| | **Thursday, February 27 - University of Miami Sylvester Comprehensive Cancer Center’s 10-Year Anniversary Award Ceremony**
---
|
---
| Later that day, my staff attended the **University of Miami Sylvester Comprehensive Cancer Center’s 10-Year Anniversary Award Ceremony** at the Fire College. This event celebrated change makers in the effort to protect firefighters from cancer. _The awardees included:_ Charlie Frank, State Volunteer Fire Coordinator Bureau of Fire Standards and Training; Lieutenant Bert Vergara, Osceola County Fire Rescue; Chief Keith Powers, Jacksonville Fire and Rescue Department; Chief Robert Torres, Lauderhill Fire Rescue Department; Joanne Rice, Florida Division State Fire Marshal; Julius Halas, Florida Division State Fire Marshal 2009-2023.
---
|
---
| | Thank you for reading, and I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---

Vice President JD Vance **[snapped at a reporter during President Trump's first cabinet meeting](https://substack.com/redirect/3f441d9c-cf22-4c4e-859a-537fa3e8f25d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for suggesting that the President is "conceding to Russia" in ongoing negotiations to end the war.
[WatchVideo](https://substack.com/redirect/3f441d9c-cf22-4c4e-859a-537fa3e8f25d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3f441d9c-cf22-4c4e-859a-537fa3e8f25d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A reporter asked Trump which concessions he would like to see made by Russia. Trump told the reporter that he did not want to list any for the press at the time, but assured that he intends to put an end to the war.
"I don't want to tell you right now, but I can tell you, NATO you can forget about," then passing the question to Vance.
"As the President said, we are not going to do a negotiation publically with the media, we are going to do it in private with the President of Russia," Vance explained. "Every single time the President engages in diplomacy, you guys accuse him of conceding to Russia! He hasn't conceded anything to anyone, he is doing the job of a diplomat, and of course, he is diplomat-in-chief of the United States."
Watch the tense moment here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3f441d9c-cf22-4c4e-859a-537fa3e8f25d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| | POLL

# **The Government Just Said Your Money Isn 't Yours --**
## **[Here's How to Fight Back](https://substack.com/redirect/9d033315-ca76-434a-ac4b-32bcbefe99fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
What if I told you the government doesn't even consider your money YOUR property?
Sounds crazy, but that's exactly what the Department of Justice just argued in court--claiming cash isn't property, so they can seize it whenever they want.
That's right--According to the DOJ, YOUR hard-earned money isn't legally yours.
Now, think your savings are safe? Think again.
This argument just kicked the door wide open for Washington to freeze bank accounts, confiscate retirement savings, and wipe out wealth overnight.
But you don't have to stand for it.
**Because history proves one thing:** When governments go broke, they take from the people. It's happened before, and it's happening again.
That's why smart Americans are moving NOW to get their wealth out of the system--before the next financial lockdown hits.

Because once the trap is set, it'll be too late to escape.

# **Kevin O'Leary DESTROYS obnoxious Democrat when she interrupts him one too many times on CNN**
Businessman Kevin O'Leary **[exploded at a Democrat CNN panelist](https://substack.com/redirect/44ca2409-6052-4e2b-bc20-ae8ba21ecaef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for interrupting him repeatedly during a live CNN debate and citing academic studies to contradict his direct experience doing is business in China.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/44ca2409-6052-4e2b-bc20-ae8ba21ecaef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"Trump already raised tariffs on China!" said New York Times editor Catherine Rampell
"Not enough," O'Leary fired back. "It's time to raise tariff on China to 400%!"
Rampell quoted an academic study showing that U.S. consumers and companies felt the rising costs from existing tariffs on China.
"I love the academic studies!!" O'Leary snapped. "I'm doing REAL business in China! I'm actually doing business there!"
Watch the clash right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/44ca2409-6052-4e2b-bc20-ae8ba21ecaef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# The Golden Age Is Here, And The Democrats Are Melting
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c042d91-9b43-4269-b299-3d328f77ff93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Folks, I've seen a lot in my time, but I've never witnessed anything quite like President Donald Trump's speech to Congress this week.
It was a masterpiece, a home run, a grand slam of truth and strength! The Golden Age of America has arrived, and it's all because of this man, this leader, this titan of our time. Trump didn't just speak--he roared like a lion, setting the tone for national pride and power like no president has ever done before. Believe me, I know a thing or two about leadership, and this was it!
But you know what turned my stomach? Watching those petty, small-minded Democrats sit on their hands, refusing to stand or clap for the real heroes Trump honored. Take Laken Riley's mother--God bless her--a grieving mom whose daughter was stolen from her by a vicious murderer, allowed into this country by the chaos of an unsecured border. Trump gave her the respect she deserved, and what did the Democrats do? They sat there, stone-faced, like they were at a funeral for their own egos. Disgusting!
[Read the Full Piece](https://substack.com/redirect/61336cfc-7ecb-475d-8e5a-5c2ea353c45b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Drop the tough guy act, Elon
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Elon Musk called me a traitor today. He tweeted that in response to my visit to Ukraine and Poland over the weekend.
#

Elon Musk called me a traitor today.
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mar25/.ukJcqc&refcode=em250310-1-f&t=1&akid=5994%2E6688874%2EJtSzpx)
He tweeted that in response to my visit to Ukraine and Poland over the weekend. “You are a traitor” for having dinner with American soldiers deployed to Poland. “You are a traitor” for meeting with Ukrainians defending their country from a Russian invasion. “You are a traitor” for visiting with nurses and doctors in hospitals that treat Ukrainian soldiers wounded in combat.
When I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our national security, I’m going to stand with Ukraine until they win a peace that protects their sovereignty and safety.
Elon is only looking out for himself. And if he doesn’t understand that defending freedom is a basic tenet of what makes America great and keeps us safe, maybe he should leave it to those of us who do.
I’ll be honest with you, though. If the richest man on earth is lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back.
[**Please, if you can afford it, make a donation as we take on Elon and the Trump Administration. It adds up fast when lots of people are chipping in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mar25/.ukJcqc&refcode=em250310-1-f&t=2&akid=5994%2E6688874%2EJtSzpx)

Trump just dealt America another _major_ blow, team -- this time taking aim at the National Weather Service!

This critical federal agency issues THOUSANDS of tornado, flood, and severe weather warnings each year to protect American families, lives, and property. But Trump just fired HUNDREDS of its workers anyway -- **and now MAGA plans call for ENDING free weather reports entirely!**

We can't ignore Trump's reckless actions, so we're gathering as many Democratic signatures as possible to show we stand firmly behind the National Weather Service -- **but right now, your name is still missing! Please, sign on right away to show your support:**

**[Democrats from Pennsylvania are already signing on! Please, join them and add your name to back the National Weather Service before midnight>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21130?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250310-UrgentPetition-SupportNationalWeatherServicePetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250310-UrgentPetition-SupportNationalWeatherServicePetition-ETG-sl1&akid=19775%2E9716520%2EQK8R9V)**

Team DSCC

My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
| | [ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=dfb04e80be9641a4ae469136e2185979&_e=vF9kP3tFaSb1SHBN9p5XTXlF36UVufrypjnsy7EQWJjSK-yi9xJib_0M83yPOG8-0kQQaA71snGyE39Owi-JNTVXB2GWcPS5yom_YSwUxEjSAL_poF_8MzaD8UpJc7LIUj3hxRMwvu7mAm_r_iOf5qqJ2_PtgMdYxP0eEWVsHyZL3In8ddJLlJemhj6qKqO3OuTjjlO9cZNaSl-6BGc9keP0WRUZVlnHed6jqmsaUyT7YpeRCAJWZYK1NV9gm64ffCXua2wW4e_oxVstAKXDuZYizYR6ya6qenOf0568Xk_W5k0uFvl49wLHFqKuQPsG0S0XbE2fRZp_E0QorBiMLfb4fD2Q72SnsBIK8pLks_rS4ZV3HtvGdWOm_cKW1q9j28qdONhYPHXM2jSjzVA7FvCIToIUbeWFW42pUR0EnMW_UdrL0bZdo7PBtNrZME9E)

Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. **[I'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=dfb04e80be9641a4ae469136e2185979&_e=vF9kP3tFaSb1SHBN9p5XTXlF36UVufrypjnsy7EQWJjSK-yi9xJib_0M83yPOG8-0kQQaA71snGyE39Owi-JNTVXB2GWcPS5yom_YSwUxEjSAL_poF_8MzaD8UpJc7LIUj3hxRMwvu7mAm_r_iOf5qqJ2_PtgMdYxP0eEWVsHyZL3In8ddJLlJemhj6qKqO3OuTjjlO9cZNaSl-6BGc9keP0WRUZVlnHed6jqmsaUyT7YpeRCAJWZYK1NV9gm64ffCXua2wW4e_oxVstAKXDuZYizYR6ya6qenOf0568Xk-BpXXNPSphSFsVU_9G3SSf21_PngnUrlF4ditf0yFynj8_ke42f7Xhh3yMcLYJIoQ3FnyXY4B6sE0ewkr0a9DRnWwtLgAzoXl-jVDOo49hgxoBT1-crr2hIi0JSKytSP3x1-tAkItyfaIafQD4SdK7)**

Another Elon Musk Starship rocket just exploded mid-flight – the second such failure this year.
**As debris fell from the sky and onto people's homes, and the Federal Aviation Administration grounded flights into Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Palm Beach, and Orlando airports, I could not fail to see the parallel to Musk’s impact upon the lives of ordinary Americans across our nation.**
Last week Elon Musk was singled out for praise during Donald Trump's joint address to Congress – to the thunderous applause of the Republicans in the audience. Under his direction, talented and valuable federal workers have been shown the door en masse – including many veterans – as our government is being slashed and burned with absolutely zero thought, care, or strategy in mind. Truly everything about the Trump-Musk administration lacks efficiency, expertise, and empathy.
And now that Musk is purging the government according to his will – and now that Republicans are slashing budget from programs like Medicaid – they are further pillaging the government to make the richest man in the world even richer: Musk's company Starlink has rapidly expanded its footprint throughout the federal government, and he's allegedly trying to take over an FAA contract worth billions of dollars.
**The incompetency and corruption we're witnessing is offensive. The harmful consequences will be real and lasting. Our response, in turn, must be loud and clear: _[I need every single member of this team to join me in speaking out against Musk and Trump so we can hold this administration accountable: Please, sign my urgent petition right now to show you OPPOSE Elon Musk and his presence in our federal government.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103626154/532711447/-193758201?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1397-ot-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVmNDZkY2MtZjZmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TR8ZSt1CZC-USI-Aw7EQJosqIIOWo4IdP9nVwCr5G3Q=&emci=030a1935-d7fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5ef46dcc-f6fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9329426)_**
| | [Add my name:
I OPPOSE ELON MUSK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103626156/532711448/-193758201?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1397-ot-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVmNDZkY2MtZjZmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TR8ZSt1CZC-USI-Aw7EQJosqIIOWo4IdP9nVwCr5G3Q=&emci=030a1935-d7fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5ef46dcc-f6fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9329426)

body:
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/q1-2025-protectsocialsecurity [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/q1-2025-protectsocialsecurity]
Hi team,
If Donald Trump and Elon Musk have their way, Republicans will achieve their decades-long goal of dismantling Social Security.
Elon Musk and his so-called Department of Government Efficiency are cutting costs at the Social Security Administration, including slashing thousands of jobs, which will potentially disrupt the delivery of this earned benefit.
Tell Donald Trump and Elon Musk to keep their hands off Social Security >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/q1-2025-protectsocialsecurity]
https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2025/03/06/doge-is-driving-social-security-cuts-will-make-mistakes-acting-head-says-privately/ [https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2025/03/06/doge-is-driving-social-security-cuts-will-make-mistakes-acting-head-says-privately/]
Together, Trump and Musk want to drain the Social Security Administration of the expertise and workforce it needs to distribute benefits to over 73 million retired and disabled Americans – Americans who rely on those benefits to keep a roof over their heads, put food on the table, and make ends meet at the end of each month.
Donald Trump not only lied to the American people (shocker) when he said he wouldn’t touch Social Security during his campaign, but he is also pursuing reckless cuts that could have a devastating impact on millions of seniors and Americans with disabilities.
Michael wants to make sure everyone knows what Donald Trump and Elon Musk are up to. They are making cuts to Social Security, while they push forward their plan for tax giveaways to the wealthiest Americans.
Hell no. Join Michael in telling Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the Republican Party – get your hands off our Social Security >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/q1-2025-protectsocialsecurity]
HANDS OFF SOCIAL SECURITY [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/q1-2025-protectsocialsecurity]

clean_body: [] Hi team, If Donald Trump and Elon Musk have their way, Republicans will achieve their decades-long goal of dismantling Social Security. Elon Musk and his so-called Department of Government Efficiency are cutting costs at the Social Security Administration, including slashing thousands of jobs, which will potentially disrupt the delivery of this earned benefit. Tell Donald Trump and Elon Musk to keep their hands off Social Security >> [] [] Together, Trump and Musk want to drain the Social Security Administration of the expertise and workforce it needs to distribute benefits to over 73 million retired and disabled Americans – Americans who rely on those benefits to keep a roof over their heads, put food on the table, and make ends meet at the end of each month. Donald Trump not only lied to the American people (shocker) when he said he wouldn’t touch Social Security during his campaign, but he is also pursuing reckless cuts that could have a devastating impact on millions of seniors and Americans with disabilities. Michael wants to make sure everyone knows what Donald Trump and Elon Musk are up to. They are making cuts to Social Security, while they push forward their plan for tax giveaways to the wealthiest Americans. Hell no. Join Michael in telling Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the Republican Party – get your hands off our Social Security >> [] HANDS OFF SOCIAL SECURITY [] Thank you, Team Bennet [] [] [] [] Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: David Shadburn, LCV
subject: Shutdown imminent: Congress wants to rubber stamp DOGE & Musk's draconian cuts
body:
Sign your name today to tell Congress NO to cutting essential services

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIyMjUxMjIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE4MDE1MjgzNgS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | We’re running out of time, Peter.
---
| | Government funding runs out **at the end of this week, and if a deal isn’t reached by then, the federal government will shut down.** MAGA extremists want a funding patch that allows Donald Trump and Elon Musk to illegally gut even MORE federal government programs that help working families and lower energy costs.
---
| | This is wildly out of touch. **American families are already struggling with rising energy costs.** MAGA funding cuts degrade our air and water quality, raise energy costs, kill millions of good paying jobs, and threaten the health and safety of families across the country — just to give billionaires more tax breaks.
---
| | [**There is still time to pressure Congress before a government shutdown, Peter. Take action today and tell your member of Congress: NO cuts in the budget to critical services to appease Trump and Musk.**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_yzTgeRxqM~)
---
| | On their wishlist for this budget, Trump, Musk, and Republicans want to halt clean energy investments that would lower costs and produce more clean energy here in the United States. We can’t afford to let them put our economy and our future at risk.
---
| | Our families deserve clean air and water. **The profits of billionaires and corporations shouldn’t take priority over our health.**
---
| | The Constitution is clear: Congress — not the president, and certainly not the unelected Musk — holds the power of the purse. They can stop these illegal overreaches and defend against these extreme cuts. But to make it happen, we need to make our voices heard. **Without action by Congress, the government will shut down on Friday, Peter,** so we need to take action NOW. [**Send a message to your members of Congress urging them to take their power back and pass a budget WITHOUT cutting essential programs.**](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | Thank you for being in this fight, Peter.
---
| | Onward,
---
| | David ShadburnSenior Government Affairs Advocate, Climate Change & Clean Energy
League of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12225122&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE4MDE1MjgzNgS2&spReportId=MjE4MDE1MjgzNgS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12225122&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE4MDE1MjgzNgS2&spReportId=MjE4MDE1MjgzNgS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMVeZw~)

name: Yassamin HQ
subject: Yassamin just introduced her first legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, The fight for immigrant rights is at a critical moment. Just last month, Yassamin introduced her first piece of legislation as a Congresswoman, celebrating the invaluable contributions of immigrant communities across our nation. This legislation is a direct stand against the harmful policies left behind by the Trump Administration and the extreme right-wing's continuous attacks on immigrants' rights. As a proud daughter of immigrants, Yassamin knows personally the dreams and struggles of those seeking a better life in America. We must secure our borders with compassionate policies and create a fair pathway to citizenship that honors the rule of law. [**But she can't do this alone. To amplify our message and build momentum, we need strong grassroots support. Will you step up as a citizen co-sponsor and show your commitment to respecting the dignity of immigrants, refugees, and asylum seekers?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103626687/532713303/-1799552914?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20250310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgwZjUyZC1mOWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unypBsq2aG76SSAWudLOge-bvUq_MfXmjQhcUJ9G20I=&emci=e180f52d-f9fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eb80f52d-f9fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234) | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103626688/532713304/-1799552914?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20250310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgwZjUyZC1mOWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unypBsq2aG76SSAWudLOge-bvUq_MfXmjQhcUJ9G20I=&emci=e180f52d-f9fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eb80f52d-f9fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234)**

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Supreme Court Asked to Review California’s Retaliation against Judicial Watch Over YouTube Election Integrity Video
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a petition for a writ of certiorari in the United States Supreme Court concerning a Judicial Watch lawsuit asserting that the California Secretary of State retaliated against Judicial Watch because of an accurate election integrity video posted to YouTube just before the 2020 Election

| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 10, 2025

Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a petition for a writ of certiorari in the United States Supreme Court concerning a Judicial Watch lawsuit asserting that the California Secretary of State retaliated against Judicial Watch because of an accurate election integrity video posted to YouTube just before the 2020 Election. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch explains that the NVRA was intended both to “increase the number of eligible citizens who register” and “to protect the integrity of the electoral process’ and ‘ensure that accurate and current voter registration rolls are maintained.” It requires states to maintain “for at least 2 years” and “make available for public inspection” all records concerning the implementation of programs conducted for ensuring the accuracy of voter rolls. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it received 115 pages in this first production of records in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which show the Biden administration, following the Dobbs decision which overturned Roe v. Wade, considered declaring a “public health emergency” and using federal lands to provide abortion services. ---|--- | | | | | “Quite simply, there is a massive cover-up of what the Deep State knows about Tim Walz’s connections Chinese Communist Party,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Secretary Noem should quickly release any records in response to Judicial Watch’s lawsuit.” ---|--- | | | Judicial Watch A group funded by leftwing billionaire George Soros is suing the Trump administration for freezing the funds of another nonprofit, also bankrolled by Soros, that receives millions of dollars from the from the USAID. The Federalist The Washington D.C. Metropolitan Police Department is charging the conservative legal watchdog, Judicial Watch, more than $1.5 million to access bodycam footage of the Jan. 6 Capitol protests. On Tuesday, the non-profit published a press release outlining the department’s demands following a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit filed last summer. Judicial Watch filed the suit after local law enforcement refused to release the footage in August 2021. The Washington Times Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Monday the Trump administration is canceling 83% of the contracts funded by the U.S. Agency for International Development and keeping the rest under the State Department. “The 5200 contracts that are now cancelled spent tens of billions of dollars in ways that did not serve, (and in some cases even harmed), the core national interests of the United States,” Mr. Rubio wrote on X. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

I’ve endorsed fellow democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani for New York City Mayor, a position that represents more people than many U.S. Senators do. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWkUm3tUWcYgDlN_CN95wg3AJKEc88GMDbKrkU8FtDmbxE_ENS7QmJqM1zguyZbMHqhVqmkdrwZ2R4eXqLF6LnR07mN8t02Jyl7Y7Eb7dRPvJwz8v5Lrqo6fPmNXbnUU8cXLHy0s8IMBxQV1KiY9lLvE1QNrUv_-vzXki8a3wKw_Du1lpuNw8-S-CmxIDB0wQZOl7__2xx2f0ft7A8y__CZpNPCBDQpn1vgKTsIce1qqD2nKhF3MSfTuFwfokSjpwdp1Sg67iPd9yFZ6NZoLr7S1-2I0R6yrLJ75R0qFxX3pjNa_ffpc5mOxtsqNjqlD-wuBq5JOwSCvhchGrVwdusFQ/4eo/U-jt-KADTUunsmYIpTZ07g/h0/h001.2q3EBV4J9AFxk1W_kI__2d7VKXmWzbGiOXgDw5ZYuUs)
