Friend, I’ve endorsed fellow democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani for New York City Mayor, a position that represents more people than many U.S. Senators do. With under 4 months until the Democratic mayoral primary, polls show that he’s in second place. **He wrote:** _“Our momentum reflects the hunger across this city for politics that puts working people first.”_ **Unfortunately, progressive champion Zohran Mamdani is currently polling behind former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who recently joined the race.** Cuomo’s name recognition might help him win—even though he has abused his power, cut public services, violated state ethics laws, illegally lied to Congress, tried to cover up his order that led to 15,000 deaths of seniors from COVID, and resigned in disgrace after New York’s Attorney General affirmed that he had “forcibly touched and sexually harassed 11 women in the workplace.”1 **Now, Cuomo is part of the legal team defending genocidal war criminal Benjamin Netanyahu, Israel’s Prime Minister. There couldn’t be a clearer contrast between Cuomo and Mamdani, who said:** **_“We need a mayor focused on the cost of living crisis, not defending a genocide.”_** As a New York State Assemblymember, Zohran Mamdani has fought for the working class and introduced first-in-the-nation legislation to stop NY charities from funding Israeli war crimes. In November 2023 he led a hunger strike in front of the White House demanding a permanent ceasefire, which I joined. His bold vision for NYC mayor includes universal free childcare, fast and free buses, freezing rent for more than two million rent-stabilized tenants, and starting nonprofit city-owned grocery stores that sell affordable groceries. **Later this week is Zohran Mamdani’s next filing deadline, when his campaign will release its fundraising numbers so far.** It’s important to show strong continued support for this visionary candidate who’s fighting for a government that works for everyday people rather than billionaires. [**Will you split a donation today between my and Zohran’s bold campaigns for transformative progressive change? We’ll keep fighting for a government that puts people over profits and saves lives at home and abroad.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJtdGaaIvXhGlXdwrbrIy7ymNZ9CnA32EfcStIpRuTC9Fo79EbtBTG8DN-Fr4ldMIw0mpm7q8tH4aJXTwmZTd1YhbkDej5GQ8KYjjMu5TG9pXvCIrwqWyaAsHVJtd8uSrnyjY3wHQ6hmo2gWkg_Wa3wBEEMmMe1fUrQ487HFyZ0io2i0WSJXGjxF6rmMtZZAIqmvefn-mBUwlkNtDrDw0zoIgu6dOafskuOPXrnjCflKdfpqRiMRta0c6viuTC4egSDd1wJkKjWih4wURhtqvhL0JkKwxeBlrbBjzH4wmR_8O6jOQETxeMchVtTmomAJoA1rm0Rnu0O7J462wjkvV88SEOTxL7EsbH3y2wvAYPwmlJvqEcj432XzxUamE0lk0ckNNHd-VWuBzFxb-UzmyNBu7Kiao2-jw-oa6fte0_bZaC6lf9D-kiItDf-tkFcmUC02x4gUy7_2IYeh76B6NQcyhcMHTwOxB1sTqi2dZZ8DY/4eo/U-jt-KADTUunsmYIpTZ07g/h1/h001.yPIrw4ZkXAd5Wvscm0WMtQjdar6BioHqrEboVe8xq_E) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Zohran for NYC_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJxPF3Y4LKU1CKa1oQq8sRKWlgXiZr5sHe-hoqPSNmJAODUGacTgqDEZIk5n6_APkU4abTrXzSP2eM4MJ8Mw0wKAs6yMs5AqzfV93oKaB5IP5piCzd3hYZhOdavRyxAV8HmfRvbI2qCxAN7gn0o5GZ6YS9itfRRK7j50XpSR-HI0TxZLa3qTWtv_m15q0xLV0ocM3P5lg5F-fXw_dGuLdgHg2IJoyH70aU9vERp2fNCTKyxg-7dl8fpxgECP3X6ZNDwCrjkEoXtnGoyHKcLE3xzKaM67gtwS63RNJ0G-cKFQwv_Jaaz1OdHzVHkbnve0AgqYB2nv5xBEd2iHK2_LP9sLHqejiZCTG7CkDtO88G2Jp2s-eEtDk0xzni-JsXiThuEnvWi-89NfAZWiLfwU8o-4ts1S_afwOUNjGSefiooF0kk1EOxpDdcbJdBp878qoi3GLgdSzSA_963M3Z3LaFYx_TRlx0jsbbd75VZACki1gHvntV-4ln3rpP_yMc8MAzJCqC3mTdgHd778f9_JG3T_5gNwysLy-S6Anlxt6x_eY/4eo/U-jt-KADTUunsmYIpTZ07g/h2/h001.1q_HLSsRvHc7K6w52rH7jGGhQGKrsxoe4vRx-U_SxSs)

In this time when dehumanization endangers our communities and lawmakers are trying to criminalize protesters for exercising their First Amendment rights, we need more elected leaders who will stand up for our rights and see everyone as worthy of life and of dignity.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJtdGaaIvXhGlXdwrbrIy7ytvuO_dajrreNd6e27EjuicMl9cj9Str16h_GjBWvATj8Alak3ym3o75Wkuz-PrwaFxt-fnglgokj9CAyAHGiWrLOkgtE2F5McYHKoz6xjsGQVlujDN2zagkUJr1NPbGo6nI4pdLMPnNv1Y9yEY6RH55Bc6Jy7w4YgvQRxvz6JtIWav8wdEgpKRbEs-lze_vIyXDmQtonvtWS5qdDZDaOeFFlPCOniLsZyaSpwoLIp8l20bZXSCnwapiWFUayktFNMqQlvdU7HlnxCgZLXYSdqpLAG0rWW789dF9lymGaWvtQUlznsO9pj7YBRVcdCln4dx8itjOg-l5NjwGi1H_Vhd80LN46Y3FIgbUlfoM2jW6r5HA5c-gOJzbZTnghnJsevrZ0FjkujVvKKI0l3zca6ubTXM5sUAXjYIeb3k5zEVX5preo00SFu4PzRb12U86XuvpbuflYj3wmpWgl1LvXtw/4eo/U-jt-KADTUunsmYIpTZ07g/h8/h001.RWeMHYS5gfM8FMkQBgVGbD0gbMyXB1OrGYCbHrqr054)
NYC’s current mayor has praised Trump, sent police to attack pro-Palestine student protesters, and is facing a trial after being indicted for corruption. Meanwhile, Zohran volunteered with Students for Justice in Palestine while in college, and as a State Assemblymemer he has:
* Joined taxi drivers in hunger striking to achieve more than $450 million in transformative debt relief,
* Won over $100 million in the state budget for increased subway service and a successful fare-free bus pilot,
* Organized New Yorkers to defeat a proposed dirty power plant,
* And more!

**Zohran and I are both committed to helping working families thrive, and we don’t take any money from corporate PACs—instead relying on grassroots donations.**
[**Please split a donation today between my and Zohran Mamdani’s campaigns to defend and expand human rights, including the right to housing—before his big fundraising deadline later this week.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJtdGaaIvXhGlXdwrbrIy7ysniPlYnfQP64X7TrG9HTRNv2KFR2b9x-6GE3vPCfeOZWY3tBKi6c_3ID4S0EehOApRAk4AY19VwKijkCwLfwgrnXqg6jKeCTdxKTNeM39ekjDI781OQpxYo36yFOi7-GJKDQG0NlejJTHytDn25kINXU8TkntIrfkA3oTyUb8kUTXaSdnmRhnjs7aRBnnZIvJeAsbFcPkd4XtNUnXSCaIGhBYcCzjwYeI2BnCThGYReypRWfXnu70KSOY6o9JA4i1CuFp8cCl3ABUAg0zg8k1MDO9R-rTXDS0I3lhLQR1tRdArdEyuy-PoKilQdSouS96udSU31n1nvZqRWfZjoZU7p8X8kwRPomfXiYb-OBwVChOpG8xws5v9JjS3sF7hZhjZ_RBQV8Wg61_rn4LeJaxRnnZdW2Hh9zrJgM8FJ2CRsC3FLmKimH3pjbj7GTpOODlQlw9sZrxJswVjSXhjXT2U/4eo/U-jt-KADTUunsmYIpTZ07g/h9/h001.luEXlWgYYmTG5NLLO-xF3dTAW243LnN3BqrJYbes36k)

clean_body: I’ve endorsed fellow democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani for New York City Mayor, a position that represents more people than many U.S. Senators do. | | | Friend, I’ve endorsed fellow democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani for New York City Mayor, a position that represents more people than many U.S. Senators do. With under 4 months until the Democratic mayoral primary, polls show that he’s in second place. He wrote: “Our momentum reflects the hunger across this city for politics that puts working people first.” Unfortunately, progressive champion Zohran Mamdani is currently polling behind former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who recently joined the race. Cuomo’s name recognition might help him win—even though he has abused his power, cut public services, violated state ethics laws, illegally lied to Congress, tried to cover up his order that led to 15,000 deaths of seniors from COVID, and resigned in disgrace after New York’s Attorney General affirmed that he had “forcibly touched and sexually harassed 11 women in the workplace.”1 Now, Cuomo is part of the legal team defending genocidal war criminal Benjamin Netanyahu, Israel’s Prime Minister. There couldn’t be a clearer contrast between Cuomo and Mamdani, who said: “We need a mayor focused on the cost of living crisis, not defending a genocide.” As a New York State Assemblymember, Zohran Mamdani has fought for the working class and introduced first-in-the-nation legislation to stop NY charities from funding Israeli war crimes. In November 2023 he led a hunger strike in front of the White House demanding a permanent ceasefire, which I joined. His bold vision for NYC mayor includes universal free childcare, fast and free buses, freezing rent for more than two million rent-stabilized tenants, and starting nonprofit city-owned grocery stores that sell affordable groceries. Later this week is Zohran Mamdani’s next filing deadline, when his campaign will release its fundraising numbers so far. It’s important to show strong continued support for this visionary candidate who’s fighting for a government that works for everyday people rather than billionaires. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Zohran for NYC | | | | | | | | | | Note: People can donate up to $2,100 to Zohran’s campaign, and if you’re a New York City resident, the first $250 of your donation to Zohran will be matched 8 times thanks to the city’s public campaign finance program. In this time when dehumanization endangers our communities and lawmakers are trying to criminalize protesters for exercising their First Amendment rights, we need more elected leaders who will stand up for our rights and see everyone as worthy of life and of dignity. NYC’s current mayor has praised Trump, sent police to attack pro-Palestine student protesters, and is facing a trial after being indicted for corruption. Meanwhile, Zohran volunteered with Students for Justice in Palestine while in college, and as a State Assemblymemer he has: Joined taxi drivers in hunger striking to achieve more than $450 million in transformative debt relief, Won over $100 million in the state budget for increased subway service and a successful fare-free bus pilot, Organized New Yorkers to defeat a proposed dirty power plant, And more! Zohran and I are both committed to helping working families thrive, and we don’t take any money from corporate PACs—instead relying on grassroots donations. Thank you for continuing to build a better world that values human dignity for all. In solidarity, Rashida 1 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Survey Dept. [Heritage Action]
subject: What government agency do you want to cut waste, fraud, and abuse from next?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9ddmemwa2k5f6gfi0srwmfu88anwc6ewa1moxgd7zsne00kckcpr2kzr19zia6sfrq5qpqas6y3zfcb9i&__stmp=ssxgwy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxgwy&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfo8rzrzj3l9aw4vpyobo3mdbx69mdk1e6vdzdggtwt1a3z9o3dofwcdl9n9k6fs0c0t8wq7qnbd4q3bmg49sa6ldqt4ls7rpayx2nzx9ahcie1hvrzbdsf4ubbmfa9bgk67e9b5hc6kjv3kgefu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxgwy&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxgwy&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxgwy&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxgwy&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfo8rzrzj3l9aw4vpyobo3mdl88buvhiw3d7ok8tzj2iuqp72nqv047m5eqlqe8tiz2f93g2slw2stfw3l853mscsnm3iqurmrtrifa7y4j97bd2xodoqsrq7yl8mtfm77hwwco5cdiar879et9a&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxgwy&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxgwy&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Nikki was on _News Central_ this morning to discuss the Trump Administration’s failure to make good on his campaign promises to fix our economy. Instead, he is imposing reckless tariffs on our allies — that would have detrimental effects on the prices of everyday goods, auto parts and cars, and resources that we use to make housing more affordable. Here’s what she had to say:
| _“Tariffs can be used as a scalpel to incentivize more American manufacturing in the steel industry and support American workers. But the way the Trump administration is going about this — imposing blanket tariffs on some of our stronger trade partners like Canada — that’s going to negatively impact our economy..._ _[The Trump administration] said they were going to be bringing down costs.**They are doing literally the exact opposite of that."**_

name: Alan Cohn
subject: Our Freedoms are Under Threat
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103627039/532714614/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMxOTZkZmUtZmFmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ho4A7RhMZkutil93ZjVifKrGRsOA7OYNXYmc6HwaKc8=&emci=f391e7a9-f5fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=83196dfe-fafd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
A sign of the times we never imagined.
A respected international monitor of civic freedoms, CIVICUS, has just added the U.S. to a watchlist of nations where freedoms are under severe threat.
The organization cites the “Unparalleled attack on the rule of law in the United States, not seen since the days of McCarthyism in the twentieth century. Unprecedented executive orders designed to unravel democratic institutions and the rule of law.”
“The Trump administration seems hellbent on dismantling the system of checks and balances, which are the pillars of a democratic society,” according to CIVICUS.
Don’t look for the Supreme Court to save us and our democracy. It’s become a weapon in Trump’s toolkit.
And it’s why our movement to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS has never been more important.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress to enact 18-year term limits.
We’re raising what’s needed to back candidates for the House and Senate who pledge to support the TERM Act.
If you are as concerned as we are about what’s happening, please contribute what you can!
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103627042/532714624/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMxOTZkZmUtZmFmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ho4A7RhMZkutil93ZjVifKrGRsOA7OYNXYmc6HwaKc8=)

**[>>>We’re working with Hakeem Jeffries, Adam Schiff and others. We need majorities in both chambers. Please help us restore SCOTUS to its role as the essential institution protecting our democracy!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103627045/532714634/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMxOTZkZmUtZmFmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ho4A7RhMZkutil93ZjVifKrGRsOA7OYNXYmc6HwaKc8=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103627048/532714643/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMxOTZkZmUtZmFmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ho4A7RhMZkutil93ZjVifKrGRsOA7OYNXYmc6HwaKc8=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103627051/532714653/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMxOTZkZmUtZmFmZC1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ho4A7RhMZkutil93ZjVifKrGRsOA7OYNXYmc6HwaKc8=)

clean_body: Hi Friend, A sign of the times we never imagined. A respected international monitor of civic freedoms, CIVICUS, has just added the U.S. to a watchlist of nations where freedoms are under severe threat. The organization cites the “Unparalleled attack on the rule of law in the United States, not seen since the days of McCarthyism in the twentieth century. Unprecedented executive orders designed to unravel democratic institutions and the rule of law.” “The Trump administration seems hellbent on dismantling the system of checks and balances, which are the pillars of a democratic society,” according to CIVICUS. Don’t look for the Supreme Court to save us and our democracy. It’s become a weapon in Trump’s toolkit. And it’s why our movement to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS has never been more important. This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress to enact 18-year term limits. We’re raising what’s needed to back candidates for the House and Senate who pledge to support the TERM Act. If you are as concerned as we are about what’s happening, please contribute what you can! = = Alan Cohn Term Limit the Court The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court. Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court. =** = SPONSORED BY TERM LIMITS YES, INC. 7903 HAMPTON LAKE DR. TAMPA, FL 33647 Term Limits Yes, Inc. 7903 Hampton Lake Dr. Tampa, FL 33647 United States

If you remember, Biden removed me from my position at the Naval Academy and Spicer V Biden literally paved the way for Trump to remove all of Biden's political appointees. Dr. Ronnie Jackson rose to admiral in the Navy, Walt Nauta has over 20 years of service and Rep. Derrick Van Orden was a Navy SEAL. Over 50 different media outlets reported only that a number of "Trump loyalists" have been appointed. President Trump squashed rumors aboard Air Force One that there is a feud within the cabinet, reiterating the hundreds of billions of dollars of waste,fraud and abuse Elon is exposing and eliminating. President Trump finally squashed the Russian hoax law firm Perkins Coie by suspending their security clearance, 15 other law firms are under the microscope for lawfare and unlawful DEI practices. name: Congresswoman Boebert
subject: I Just GRILLED the Mayor of Denver
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9ddm9ks59lnh5clc2o0thkup9q4ywucka6269ji8g0u1rdbwz0p3c889giiaevmxln615vr3kg2vy8t9k&__stmp=ssxh7q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxh7q&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfo8o51lcdpjetxtlp8yfgodwllme6xurctwybfh3kqjruyo4c8q6vmnouvkpo96dfh9qc227n25cetxnzxfeei1oclpu3vqto3d9dqx9sywuzqo4pz09horu0ht4ibv0oobc8g6ko43rmo6cspm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxh7q&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxh7q&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxh7q&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxh7q&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfo8o51lcdpjetxtlp8yfgodgz1clkvp7zb0ni7umn0e9fo9gjhwp2cfv1zzfja8zcjxr9tj9kit2i7s4ebbrr5e1zeor1gqq2ky49r7xia2fx3v6mcyigkb6k5qxc93oy22ubt6fpfeilrta4fm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxh7q&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssxh7q&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Maud Maron
subject: Are Sanctuary Policies Hurting New Yorkers?
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers, while hardworking New Yorkers struggle to afford rent and manage the cost of living
body:
| |
---
| |
---
Friend, New York City’s sanctuary city policies are making Manhattan unlivable. Illegal migrants are housed in luxury hotels paid for by taxpayers, while hardworking New Yorkers struggle to afford rent and manage the cost of living. Crime is rising, shelters are overflowing, and partisans like Alvin Bragg are putting politics before the safety of law-abiding citizens. friend, do you think NYC’s sanctuary city policies are hurting New Yorkers? **Take our one-question poll now:**
---

Are Sanctuary Policies Hurting New Yorkers?

"membership" name="membership"> Select one YES, THEY ARE HURTING NEW YORKERS NO, THEY ARE NOT HURTING NEW YORKERS

---
[SUBMIT](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6e7dac5262ae4b06838f62879556d176&_e=d6w5Q7US3B4tUDCSrOx3LI7l_Xit4wl9_8m5-N4QcBdWYQNHW0h0yiy5I474d0DINrHy00r9aUungGbLhMIbXDfDk2v6LAlnAxyi05ayhbLTeVzOSVXdbCsztSLC7r2-wNx0snEzFAGqPmAxC9F9M6CD2OfTonS9bHXES5Sro8I9T5FJYkrkj82tLjEkfskDf6J97OYrgaQatpmd7BBubReXxLFK7IbLRgpCjRjJxSr88xa8INb9tiFOVtDnkg7n5WHkgoUYyCkYQ0WhxBd4EZzq0DytlnNqbRP9Kjd_LBuL-5pWwc_UV4yJnm7eIjQUJWLjdYxwVzWuXtF4pZed8u0egd8yawK-1-cMtUR1eSn2MaFEJUJHf3bGDpEUlAsg)
---
Thank you for lending your voice. As I ramp up my campaign to be Manhattan’s next District Attorney, your input and support are key to restoring common sense policies and making our city safe once again. Faithfully,
---
| |
---
|
---

Take our one-question poll now: Are Sanctuary Policies Hurting New Yorkers? * ✅ They tried to silence him. He got louder.

* ✅ They threw endless investigations at him. He came back stronger.

* ✅ They weaponized the courts. It only exposed their corruption.

* ✅ They overspent to destroy the dollar. He created DOGE to expose their reckless spending.

name: California Democratic Party
subject: Join us to save Medicaid! Help us make calls in these districts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM%20Logo%20%281%29.png]
Democrats,
The future of Medicaid is at stake and we need your voice.
Fifteen million Californians rely on Medicaid for health care, but the Republican budget would take it away. Becoming uninsured would have the biggest impact on the most vulnerable Americans, including low-income seniors, children, veterans, people with serious disabilities, and people who take care of their children or elderly parents. Republicans are doing this so they can give more big tax breaks to billionaires, wealthy CEOs, and the biggest companies.
That is why the California Democratic Party, our labor allies, and grassroots groups across the state are mobilizing to make urgent calls to fight the dangerous attacks that House Republicans have made against our healthcare. We need you to join us!
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/FightforourHealth.png]
Make calls into CA - 22! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/761667/]
Make calls into CA - 40! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/761662/]
Make calls into CA - 41! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/761659/]
We’re calling into battleground districts that represent our frontline defense against Medicaid cuts. Each call you make helps us protect healthcare for those who need it most.
In solidarity,
CADEM
Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee.
California Democratic Party
1830 9th St

clean_body: alt [] Democrats, The future of Medicaid is at stake and we need your voice. Fifteen million Californians rely on Medicaid for health care, but the Republican budget would take it away. Becoming uninsured would have the biggest impact on the most vulnerable Americans, including low-income seniors, children, veterans, people with serious disabilities, and people who take care of their children or elderly parents. Republicans are doing this so they can give more big tax breaks to billionaires, wealthy CEOs, and the biggest companies. That is why the California Democratic Party, our labor allies, and grassroots groups across the state are mobilizing to make urgent calls to fight the dangerous attacks that House Republicans have made against our healthcare. We need you to join us! alt [] Make calls into CA - 22! [] Make calls into CA - 40! [] Make calls into CA - 41! [] We’re calling into battleground districts that represent our frontline defense against Medicaid cuts. Each call you make helps us protect healthcare for those who need it most. In solidarity, CADEM Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: Josh Harder
subject: How Trump’s trade war will affect you
body:
Terrible idea.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103628812/532719317/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQxMGIxNjYtMDBmZS1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p0pXv-i6jetAFn323FDbByhFU7bR-0zOZdolYRcANm4=) | Peter, Donald Trump spent the entire campaign blaming President Biden for high prices and now he's driving us headfirst into a trade war. It’s actually ludicrous. A 25% tariff on all imports from Canada and Mexico will be catastrophic for Valley communities.
1. First off, we simply can't afford any more price increases, full stop.
2. And second, in an agricultural community like mine, crop exports are the lifeblood of our economy. If we can’t sell our cherries or almonds or grapes to our allies, our local economy crumbles and the jobs disappear.

The stock market is already taking a major blow and now, economists are even discussing a possible U.S. recession. What does this mean for you? The things we buy (like gas, cars, homes, and food) are going to get _much_ more expensive than they already are. **Look, Peter. This is really scary. It frustrates me that working-class families who are already struggling to make ends meet are going to have to tighten their belts even more.** [_**We need to speak out against this and make sure our voices are heard! Will you add your name to my petition if you oppose Trump’s trade war?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103628814/532719319/-661906951?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQxMGIxNjYtMDBmZS1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p0pXv-i6jetAFn323FDbByhFU7bR-0zOZdolYRcANm4=&emci=66615299-d2fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fd10b166-00fe-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103628816/532719321/-661906951?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQxMGIxNjYtMDBmZS1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p0pXv-i6jetAFn323FDbByhFU7bR-0zOZdolYRcANm4=&emci=66615299-d2fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fd10b166-00fe-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6455652) In Trump’s America, the rich are getting richer while the rest of us are falling behind. We deserve better and it’s up to us to fight back. \- Josh
---

clean_body: Terrible idea. | = | Peter, Donald Trump spent the entire campaign blaming President Biden for high prices and now he's driving us headfirst into a trade war. It’s actually ludicrous. A 25% tariff on all imports from Canada and Mexico will be catastrophic for Valley communities. 1. First off, we simply can't afford any more price increases, full stop. 2. And second, in an agricultural community like mine, crop exports are the lifeblood of our economy. If we can’t sell our cherries or almonds or grapes to our allies, our local economy crumbles and the jobs disappear. The stock market is already taking a major blow and now, economists are even discussing a possible U.S. recession. What does this mean for you? The things we buy (like gas, cars, homes, and food) are going to get much more expensive than they already are. Look, Peter. This is really scary. It frustrates me that working-class families who are already struggling to make ends meet are going to have to tighten their belts even more. In Trump’s America, the rich are getting richer while the rest of us are falling behind. We deserve better and it’s up to us to fight back. \- Josh *

Peter,
---
At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.
---
_But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason._
---
I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a **“ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,”** **RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, and forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...
---

__
---
And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice.

clean_body: But every word is God's honest truth. | Peter, At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that “our nation has suffered greatly,” but “after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.” Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time. But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason. I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth... While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is not yet finished. If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY , the TRUTH remains... ...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter. Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m still FIGHTING BACK. When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757 ... And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like YOU are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

name: Team Sarah
subject: Week in Review: No More Grocery Tax 🛒
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter, Last week, Governor Sanders called out Communist China and announced her plan to eliminate the grocery tax in Arkansas. And in case you missed it, check out Arkansas LAUNCH - a hub powered by the state to connect employers and job-seekers.
---
|
---

body:
It doesn’t take much schooling to know that abolishing the Department of Education will deeply, deeply hurt students, educators, and schools across Oregon.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103629661/532722062/476240477?amount=10&refcode=em_eng_2025.03.10_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTMyMjU0NjQtMDNmZS1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JSc2jsLGP7yVAdq45VwSEXFMDIGa8mtecx4NgdKTapo=)
The Donald Trump and Elon Musk path of destruction continues...
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103629665/532722066/468346919?refcode=em_eng_2025.03.10_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTMyMjU0NjQtMDNmZS1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JSc2jsLGP7yVAdq45VwSEXFMDIGa8mtecx4NgdKTapo=&emci=11e1377a-f2fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=53225464-03fe-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14434323)**
Because coming after Social Security/Medicaid, veterans healthcare, and federal employees who keep us safe just wasn’t enough, the billionaire bros have now set their sights on gutting funding for education.

Here’s what this actually means:

→ Gutting essential funding for school districts across Oregon.
→ Eliminating special education programs for millions of students with disabilities.
→ Decimating low income school districts.

**It doesn’t take much schooling to know that abolishing the Department of Education will deeply, deeply hurt students, educators, and schools across Oregon.**

And for what? Just so Elon Musk and Donald Trump can fund their billionaire tax cuts.

[**They’re trying to rig the system, so we need to send a message loud and clear for the DOGE bros to stay the hell away from the Department of Education. Will you sign Janelle’s petition today to fight back against Trump, Musk, and DOGE’s attempts to abolish the Department and harm Oregon students?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103629670/532722070/468346919?refcode=em_eng_2025.03.10_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTMyMjU0NjQtMDNmZS1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JSc2jsLGP7yVAdq45VwSEXFMDIGa8mtecx4NgdKTapo=&emci=11e1377a-f2fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=53225464-03fe-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14434323)

name: Team Latimer
subject: re: the PACT Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=rQwsBZ3%2B5YNsOqDtEvgq3oyJTBADnrhDgJaJpYBfOfZ8F5WlT1fUJSoPLYYTvxsAuZWIBKESvynCEPtyG2VkrKLYSpDKMTyiNOfcLjKfRujh2NjaKfm7LMKNYb0g9R%2BnKIkiHtAGJPK2obvdrGeV6%2BGZPdYc%2BFhYBI%2B0R5YC8NhEhQHKsCMA96LEv8QI5WjpDgeZrEMNXYCcuh7%2BjVUNQd2LqR%2FC5EIDx2uEpJXxmhhxLXnrOGIn1ib9TuaQp2QeKOd3o15h3TQYIrcRt%2FcdqC4tDnZ0DxpGq3R9CgDn4QF%2FXB8d5RgFbIvcTFjJvXExap2TmV9Op0kEvn6C216e4O42TMUr809PAE8FapXkqsCAdM7%2BkOCvyIggJQnvGz7QxZlOzJ0lR%2Bknv9Z7VO2Si7FMOzYythGeJlU3wfrxdDvXoZEY%2FydPU%2F4d3JPU6R1T)
---
| |
---
Three years ago, the PACT Act was passed on a bipartisan basis, expanding healthcare and benefits for thousands of U.S. veterans who have selflessly served our country. It was a victory for those who have risked everything for our safety and freedom. **Now, the Trump Administration is undermining this law by planning to slash 80,000 jobs at the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA).** [This is a shameful betrayal of veterans and their families. Will you add your name to our petition demanding Congress stand up for our veterans by protecting the PACT Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103629834/532722842/1249472785?source=SBD_GL_EM_EN_031025_1_1_PACTActPT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRkYWMxYTQtMDNmZS1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NG43EGXtXtI2jrE67AX72yKPN6Oro-Tu-bRhMugCY28=&emci=ceeb7a9e-03fe-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e4dac1a4-03fe-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21388742) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103629837/532722845/1249472785?source=SBD_GL_EM_EN_031025_1_1_PACTActPT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRkYWMxYTQtMDNmZS1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NG43EGXtXtI2jrE67AX72yKPN6Oro-Tu-bRhMugCY28=&emci=ceeb7a9e-03fe-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e4dac1a4-03fe-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21388742)
---
The PACT Act is the most impactful law in decades for veterans exposed to toxic substances during their service. It is a crucial step in fulfilling our obligation to care for those who have bravely fought to protect our freedom — and to support their families who have stood by them.
These cuts are an affront to the brave men and women who rely on the VA for their care and support – all to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest in our society.
[We can’t turn our back on those who have served our country. clean_body: George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Three years ago, the PACT Act was passed on a bipartisan basis, expanding healthcare and benefits for thousands of U.S. veterans who have selflessly served our country. It was a victory for those who have risked everything for our safety and freedom. Now, the Trump Administration is undermining this law by planning to slash 80,000 jobs at the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA). | The PACT Act is the most impactful law in decades for veterans exposed to toxic substances during their service. It is a crucial step in fulfilling our obligation to care for those who have bravely fought to protect our freedom — and to support their families who have stood by them. These cuts are an affront to the brave men and women who rely on the VA for their care and support – all to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest in our society. – Team Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. subject: Merit vs. DEI
body:
It’s time for merit to make a comeback.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/Hz_-fikI9i3TRgvJxfljeClsMplxm3Pjvm_mOrHz0JgMqnEdJj0YL0PGxt98AAEXW5Ypam6kW4eX4U6MQDHyzzWzfVx3xaRWzGJJx3qrVYb8xrsIQHO3AKAIG75b8BFd37vwdW2YFSeplNfS-A_CivNF8AbC7UQqOkH2wzw7M8t0EBEFaauojjR1/_njZcu1IBPJ-9xgrZK2RXl4aAPMuOafG/6)_

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/3bDiIpFi5b__eD7s1OZPYmQgX3xBaeI5Qlrqd5xYP-NizQWJLlZvUH3pGmbZxKPbNEZdFUY9VNLxyr0XX7VwokE7VPtVLNI-rZwqiKrDq291mzDAeOj6ZqjTChsXtIW2tH6Uv2IDT4swMQdssQtQbgr5nG-K13hKoYCtaX5uNIlQRe8vYJggcMnczNyYozDxnnYcPv8W42xttLUJCvg1V1pzUYWCySohHKjEzQtWhbWds3sG8C4X_P36UXttnOBCZwrVzvKv96DFQGYGfQQkWwh9JVbN67n1uqRZSFVKI0G81VJnJ9QvZcK5DkFvr8dguOmEppsr82gRC5teJ4qFG01TjiuWmA2eF7yDAwr9t6PHtiBisKY06tHgrFdtzyraLRBBX5b1gmzipRIdmxSkPVbVjK3O0zflwmxD9zEULJkJSIeE82gfgA/r41C63SB_4HEAHXHfiOD_-60F-mAcaa4/6)
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/Dd6kYDFT7Bw6LGQ4xo15heAqjg02SFwG1EoR-9J2sO9Kl3OJ7p4BBaLKaC6CopuS9OB0QQIyt8r1qR0MWQfGszK4Ofq8ppqfcFZ6uAUVoynWJSYMrrbXEW-5kWU4s6dLkrcKX-hH_ZwSvI_YJHeA6v_G9gsy5fHR-10bpBvn65KWgNUOwZgotEUACqK5LxJBfh6IlPRfIMS6DBMIlYFiscRHGytbv6cD08N15GtFV9npwbiOQemYJ8-g7bB4cjP43NU6vLwfmpj3p9kt63QfMj1DnlXtH9Pe608ixjtL6YkvdVaY8mnxzXdxpDGXv4_Rfgy-qaLUlh5JxeirCNO-Uae9HJwm5gT5ElELrcKN5Gy5h-rPctaiWN9mI5Cv_39dIHCPkvc40T3Qpi4adqfq7N4-6zgz-7GfFbthoi2L6JYQCmZ6lvaVeg/ItsV5wDTPe1C847kurP0LJhTeSgJMuAB/6).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/5XYp0qCeEtHh445bbOf7ufKLi8y9-6fbhMV-zbwtS0x9GKzIcKC9A5bfoQv8ARt107vTH8ZyshwjenPqtamTS_ZBD1bgwmas04qqviRfwJ1gngVSVqkQF0IQ4en5UPO91lMBeknoEAtTzc_9ZbZpV8EnMdWTleDwWsH2Cpl9J8yY7ciZDVuMw-7p1vTiseio7Ok58LvtOJGcOH4kemgOpkphlV42nZvTndGZf7rtU4pytzicrHK7_jKiTR7m7rEgAEZlbyPlXVtgLyW0kJEW9_qb0X2bn5sRAO-pXoD5JP5ApzWhZovi6qgY58hoXygc_lPUgW8LzxoE2kf1TX-eCp3531Sh0eY4ywWYZGIcC5u9pHGl0DTFdnp5kdvjTrF8pJ2rYCsS-lXwTSBU-V6ZpDGE9-_ijDhrB8C3b5SbwWE-DbriDaXEHg/g5oO0cuysBCnDxMIbUh1MA32A38QGhW0/6)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/PR-KbgYY-gVyKbT1gF9u37Z_99PtCBUvyaHhamtkk5UZ6_WGXe9WNmyV3vPCFXzPgi51ygW5sBV1mhfp3qsurIqYW0chJpA0SXV3ui-A6ricqa1j1z_iCF2upDsNm2BvDSFpTfGoAGEYO9ZqPXN_axtPg5t9v5BPEx4z1WxQ_6Zz3ZJ0XW7xWS9v5iDlvrGn3Z6NQWHXDUo7LOQTU7c2XD21xSSCGqA1HBmRGNhQ_5Z3UfDiB8Yt53pLcE3nItdYEVI4gD6rIodT_od87IxN0XN9mDem_HPeMbY6xFpPjC8ZfGGd77l-nDc_Fo38Y3J85iJsTPs4ERPvfNhxOn_w63siVWkM0Q6mDYz5GgEwYjE5lywWr8qG-lliLOHuqzjdx6W2WN1dADEZqdyjp4Xps5cncxgj3f4jW2CH3mlp4zkhCVPvMPPG9A/vDSU9Pp9ORFTvSWKKolC8uB9LNwfTL78/6)

Thank you!

You can easily do so after completing the DEFEAT DEI SURVEY , which you can access at this secure link: With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Please fill out your DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself. You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time. Thank you! .

Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002 Are you with us?

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Three things we can do this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here are some thoughts from today on what actions we can take right now,
this week, to get in the way of the Republican party’s attack on our way
of life:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1. Don’t give Trump more power

Trump and House Republicans are proposing a government funding bill that
will give Trump and Musk more unaccountable power. We must stop it. If we
do, it gives Democrats more leverage over the final spending bill and
begins to apply the brakes on MAGA’s rampage through our democracy.

Republicans have a razor-thin majority in the House. They’ve refused to
even listen to Democrats’ concerns about the legislation, much less
negotiate with Democrats to improve it. So let them pass it on their own,
if they can.

In the Senate, Republicans need 60 votes to move forward. They only have
53. Democrats must withhold their votes until Republicans meet them at the
negotiating table. It is literally the only leverage they have and they
must use it.

If these were normal times, if this was just about the size of the federal
budget, that would be one thing. But these are not normal times, and this
bill is all about giving Trump and Musk more power. Look what they’ve done
with it so far: decimated federal agencies responsible for public safety
and sacred commitments (e.g. TSA and the VA); entered corrupt deals with
corrupt public officials (e.g. Eric Adams); undermined the Constitution
and the rule of law (e.g. attempting to void the 14th Amendment); and the
list goes on. Why in the world would we enable this any further?

These aren’t your parents’ Republicans. These are MAGA cultists who have
chucked their oath to the Constitution out the window in an effort to
appease their dear leader. There is no goodwill to be earned, no future
compromise that can be purchased with capitulation today.

Congress begins voting on this as soon as tomorrow (Tuesday), with a
deadline to finish votes by Friday.

Call your Member of Congress and encourage them to vote NO on this funding
bill (called a “Continuing Resolution” or “CR”): 202-224-3121.

2. Get your Member of Congress to hold a town hall

What we are all doing must be working. Last week, the National Republican
Congressional Committee (NRCC) instructed its members to stop holding town
halls because, when confronted by their constituents’ questions about cuts
to Medicaid and the VA, Republican Reps weren’t able to provide any
answers. They froze and then they fled. The exchanges went viral. More of
the public became aware of just how dangerous the Trump/Musk regime is.
And now they fear it will cost them their re-elections.

[1]Screenshot of news article headlined "Republican House Members Told to
Stop Holding In-Person Town Halls"

Meanwhile, Democrats are holding town halls in their districts to huge
success. Look at this picture of Joaquin Castro’s town hall in San
Antonio. More than a thousand people showed up!

[2]Image of a crowded room facing a stage at Joaquin Castro's town hall.

Holding town halls helps Republicans remember that they serve you and not
Donald Trump. And town halls remind Democrats of how many of us have their
backs in the fight before them.

Check Indivisible’s town hall tracker to see if your Rep or Senator is
holding one: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64389?t=1001&akid=240017%2E444211%2ES_8vGm ]here.

If they aren’t, encourage your Member of Congress to hold a town hall this
month! You can reach them at: 202-224-3121

3. Fight the Texas voucher scam

The latest Texas school voucher bill (HB3) will be heard in the Public
Education Committee on Tuesday, 3/11. This is your chance to tell your
state reps that you are against vouchers and for fully funded, high
quality, public education.

If you live in Austin, near Austin or can get to Austin in time, you can
testify in person against vouchers in the John Reagan Building (room 140)
of the Texas Capitol.

Or you can submit a public comment: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64390?t=1002&akid=240017%2E444211%2ES_8vGm ]here.

Remember, Abbott and Republicans are trying to take $1 billion from Texas
taxpayers and give it to wealthy families who are already sending their
kids to private schools. This will come at the expense of public school
education, especially in rural and remote counties (more than 150 Texas
counties don’t have a private school to send your kid too, even if you
could afford the difference between what the voucher pays and what tuition
costs!).

It’s bad for the Texas taxpayer, bad for public educators, and bad for the
kids in our public school classrooms.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

These are three things that allow us to do what we can with what we have
where we are.

Keep the faith and keep up the fight!

- Beto

P.S. From the mountain this morning:

[5]Image of a shadowed mountaintop with the faintest edges of sun peeking
out from the top against an otherwise dark sky

[6]Image of the dark mountainside overlooking the glittering lights of the
city below as sunrise begins over the city in orange

[7]Image of the mountain trail, sunrise is finishing up and the scene is
illuminated. The trail gently descends towards the orange horizon. Three
dogs trot down the road.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=240017%2E444211%2ES_8vGm

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Mark Pocan came to Kenosha in WI-01 for a rally. The whole world needs to see what they support. This is disgusting. How many kids were present listening to this?

name: Truth to Power
subject: “going to have a disruption”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39518%2E3422442%2EW34evp)
Let’s take a walk down memory lane, Derek.
First, Donald Trump promised us on the campaign trail that he’d improve our economy.
Then, his harmful tariffs and chaotic announcements destabilized our economy and increased the risk of a recession.
Now, instead of owning the problem and reassuring the American people, Trump’s saying that “we’re going to have a disruption” and “there is a period of transition.”
It’s not just a “disruption” when workers lose their jobs during a recession. For those of us who actually need a paycheck to make ends meet, unemployment could mean skipping medicine, going hungry, or even losing our home.
We deserve leaders who understand the pain families feel in an economic downturn—and who fight like hell to deliver what families need to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.
**[Truth to Power supports candidates who put families front and center in their work. Can you chip in to help us elect leaders who actually care about the struggles real people face?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250310-4?refcode=em20250310-39518&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39518_3422442_W34evp&akid=39518%2E3422442%2EW34evp)**
Thanks,
TTP

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250310-39518&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39518_3422442_W34evp&akid=39518%2E3422442%2EW34evp)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39518%2E3422442%2EW34evp).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
